      \xxxParagraphNoStar
  }
  \newcommand{\xxxParagraphStar}[1]{\oldparagraph*{#1}\mbox{}}
  \newcommand{\xxxParagraphNoStar}[1]{\oldparagraph{#1}\mbox{}}
\fi
\ifx\subparagraph\undefined\else

\usepackage{longtable,booktabs,array}
\usepackage{calc} % for calculating minipage widths
% Correct order of tables after \paragraph or \subparagraph
\usepackage{etoolbox}
\makeatletter
\patchcmd\longtable{\par}{\if@noskipsec\mbox{}\fi\par}{}{}
\makeatother
% Allow footnotes in longtable head/foot
\IfFileExists{footnotehyper.sty}{\usepackage{footnotehyper}}{\usepackage{footnote}}
\makesavenoteenv{longtable}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\makeatletter
\newsavebox\pandoc@box
\newcommand*\pandocbounded[1]{% scales image to fit in text height/width
  \sbox\pandoc@box{#1}%
  \Gscale@div\@tempa{\textheight}{\dimexpr\ht\pandoc@box+\dp\pandoc@box\relax}%
  \Gscale@div\@tempb{\linewidth}{\wd\pandoc@box}%
  \ifdim\@tempb\p@<\@tempa\p@\let\@tempa\@tempb\fi% select the smaller of both
  \ifdim\@tempa\p@<\p@\scalebox{\@tempa}{\usebox\pandoc@box}%
  \else\usebox{\pandoc@box}%
  \fi%
}
% Set default figure placement to htbp
\def\fps@figure{htbp}
\makeatother

\CommentTok{\# }\AlertTok{TODO}\CommentTok{ (future work):}
\CommentTok{\# P1: ABG residual imbalance \textgreater{}0.10 — consider redefining target population / stratified standardization / overlap restriction.}
\CommentTok{\# P3: Separation/nonconvergence in adjusted outcome models — consider penalized logistic / level collapsing, and define reporting policy.}
\CommentTok{\# }\AlertTok{TODO}\CommentTok{ consider adding discontinuity (at 45 mmHg CO2 on ABG and 50 mmHg CO2 on VBG; start with raw binning and LOESS to evaluate if there\textquotesingle{}s a jump, then consider regression discontinuity or similar if so).}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\section{Data Pre-Processing and Unweighted
Analyses}\label{data-pre-processing-and-unweighted-analyses}

This code pulls in the master database (a STATA file) and does some
initial cleaning - this will only need to be run once, and then the data
can be accessed in the usual way.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# setup{-}packages chunk is the authoritative loader.}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{requireNamespace}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"kableExtra"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{quietly =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{requireNamespace}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"gtsummary"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{quietly =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{requireNamespace}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"purrr"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{quietly =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# globally tighten gtsummary/gt tables (smaller font + tighter padding)}
\NormalTok{gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{theme\_gtsummary\_compact}\NormalTok{()}

\NormalTok{project\_root }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ here}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{knitr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\NormalTok{opts\_knit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{set}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{root.dir =}\NormalTok{ project\_root)}

\CommentTok{\# keep figures anchored in PDF to reduce heading{-}only/blank pages}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (knitr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{is\_latex\_output}\NormalTok{()) \{}
\NormalTok{  knitr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\NormalTok{opts\_chunk}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{set}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{fig.pos =} \StringTok{"H"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: scale generic data.frames for PDF output}
\NormalTok{kable\_pdf }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(df, }\AttributeTok{caption =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{font\_size =} \DecValTok{7}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  kbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ knitr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{kable}\NormalTok{(df, }\AttributeTok{format =} \StringTok{"latex"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{booktabs =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{caption =}\NormalTok{ caption)}
\NormalTok{  kbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ kableExtra}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{kable\_styling}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    kbl,}
    \AttributeTok{latex\_options =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"hold\_position"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"scale\_down"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{font\_size     =}\NormalTok{ font\_size,}
    \AttributeTok{full\_width    =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{position      =} \StringTok{"center"}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{mark\_float\_emitted}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{  kbl}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: resolve a notebook display path relative to the repo root so the}
\CommentTok{\# canonical render path never depends on the notebook subdirectory.}
\NormalTok{display\_path }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(path, }\AttributeTok{must\_exist =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) \{}
  \FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(path, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(one\_path) \{}
\NormalTok{    path\_abs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{path\_abs}\NormalTok{(one\_path, }\AttributeTok{start =}\NormalTok{ project\_root),}
      \AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) }\ConstantTok{NA\_character\_}
\NormalTok{    )}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(path\_abs)) \{}
      \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Could not resolve display path: "}\NormalTok{, one\_path)}
\NormalTok{    \}}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (must\_exist }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(path\_abs)) \{}
      \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Missing display artifact: "}\NormalTok{, path\_abs)}
\NormalTok{    \}}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{(fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{path\_has\_parent}\NormalTok{(path\_abs, project\_root) }\SpecialCharTok{||} \FunctionTok{identical}\NormalTok{(path\_abs, project\_root))) \{}
      \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Display path escapes project root: "}\NormalTok{, path\_abs)}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{    fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{path\_rel}\NormalTok{(path\_abs, }\AttributeTok{start =}\NormalTok{ project\_root)}
\NormalTok{  \}, }\FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{USE.NAMES =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: pretty, relative paths for PDF output}
\NormalTok{pretty\_path }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(p) \{}
  \FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(p, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(one\_path) \{}
\NormalTok{    out }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{display\_path}\NormalTok{(one\_path, }\AttributeTok{must\_exist =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)[[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]], }\AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) }\ConstantTok{NA\_character\_}\NormalTok{)}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(out) }\SpecialCharTok{||}\NormalTok{ out }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"."} \SpecialCharTok{||} \FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\^{}}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{.}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{."}\NormalTok{, out)) \{}
      \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{basename}\NormalTok{(one\_path))}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{    out}
\NormalTok{  \}, }\FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{USE.NAMES =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: emit inline notebook graphics through one canonical path. For PDF}
\CommentTok{\# renders we cap the height explicitly so headings plus image can fit on the}
\CommentTok{\# page without triggering TeX pagination loops.}
\NormalTok{render\_inline\_graphic }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(file,}
                                  \AttributeTok{width =} \StringTok{"0.94}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{linewidth"}\NormalTok{,}
                                  \AttributeTok{height =} \StringTok{"0.72}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{textheight"}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  inline\_path }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{display\_path}\NormalTok{(file)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (knitr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{is\_latex\_output}\NormalTok{()) \{}
\NormalTok{    out }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
      \StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{begin\{center\}"}\NormalTok{,}
      \FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}
        \StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{includegraphics[width=\%s,height=\%s,keepaspectratio]\{\%s\}"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{        width, height, inline\_path}
\NormalTok{      ),}
      \StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{end\{center\}"}
\NormalTok{    )}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(knitr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{asis\_output}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(out, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{)))}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  knitr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{include\_graphics}\NormalTok{(inline\_path)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# Canonical PDF path: export all figure/table artifacts, keep executed source}
\CommentTok{\# visible, and reserve rendered output for manuscript{-}facing displays plus}
\CommentTok{\# compact provenance/status summaries. QA/debug figures remain sidecar artifacts.}
\NormalTok{VALIDATION\_INLINE\_ANALYSIS\_PREVIEWS }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{FALSE}

\CommentTok{\# helper: normalize manuscript{-}facing text to a plain{-}ASCII representation so}
\CommentTok{\# PDF labels/captions do not depend on platform{-}specific glyph handling.}
\NormalTok{safe\_manuscript\_text }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) \{}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(x) }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(x)) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(x)}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(x)}
\NormalTok{  replacements }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u00a0"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{" "}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2010"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"{-}"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2011"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"{-}"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2012"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"{-}"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2013"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"{-}"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2014"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"{-}"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2212"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"{-}"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2026"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"..."}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u03bc"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"u"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u00b5"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"u"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2264"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"\textless{}="}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2265"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"\textgreater{}="}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u0394"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"Delta"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u03b4"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"delta"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u03b2"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"beta"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2082"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"2"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u00b2"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"\^{}2"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u00b3"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"\^{}3"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2080"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"0"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2081"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"1"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2083"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"3"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2084"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"4"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2085"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"5"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2086"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"6"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2087"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"7"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2088"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"8"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2089"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"9"}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \ControlFlowTok{for}\NormalTok{ (i }\ControlFlowTok{in} \FunctionTok{seq\_along}\NormalTok{(replacements)) \{}
\NormalTok{    x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(replacements)[i], replacements[[i]], x, }\AttributeTok{fixed =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{iconv}\NormalTok{(x, }\AttributeTok{from =} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{to =} \StringTok{"ASCII//TRANSLIT"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{sub =} \StringTok{"?"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s+"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{" "}\NormalTok{, x)}
  \FunctionTok{trimws}\NormalTok{(x)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: flag non{-}ASCII manuscript labels early so validation renders fail}
\CommentTok{\# before the final PDF silently substitutes or drops glyphs.}
\NormalTok{is\_ascii\_text }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) \{}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(x) }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(x)) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
  \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"[\^{} {-}\textasciitilde{}]"}\NormalTok{, x)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: derive one stable manuscript caption from the centralized registry.}
\NormalTok{manuscript\_caption }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(label, title) \{}
\NormalTok{  label }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{safe\_manuscript\_text}\NormalTok{(label)}
\NormalTok{  title }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{safe\_manuscript\_text}\NormalTok{(title)}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(label) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(title))}
  \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{nzchar}\NormalTok{(title), label, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(label, }\StringTok{". "}\NormalTok{, title))}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: collapse component{-}level validation states into one build status.}
\NormalTok{collapse\_validation\_status }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(status\_values) \{}
\NormalTok{  status\_values }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(status\_values[}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(status\_values) }\SpecialCharTok{\&} \FunctionTok{nzchar}\NormalTok{(status\_values)])}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\StringTok{"FAIL"} \SpecialCharTok{\%in\%}\NormalTok{ status\_values) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"FAIL"}\NormalTok{)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\StringTok{"PASS\_WITH\_WARNINGS"} \SpecialCharTok{\%in\%}\NormalTok{ status\_values) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"PASS\_WITH\_WARNINGS"}\NormalTok{)}
  \StringTok{"PASS"}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: render a standalone table PDF that can be cited outside the notebook.}

\NormalTok{    tex\_dir }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{path\_dir}\NormalTok{(fallback)}
\NormalTok{    current\_path }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{Sys.getenv}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"PATH"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{unset =} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    path\_parts }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{strsplit}\NormalTok{(current\_path, .Platform}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{path.sep, }\AttributeTok{fixed =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)[[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]]}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{tex\_dir }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%}\NormalTok{ path\_parts) \{}
      \FunctionTok{Sys.setenv}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{PATH =} \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(tex\_dir, current\_path), }\AttributeTok{collapse =}\NormalTok{ .Platform}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{path.sep))}
\NormalTok{    \}}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(fallback)}
\NormalTok{  \}}

  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"Required LaTeX command not found on PATH: "}\NormalTok{, cmd,}
    \StringTok{". Install TinyTeX or expose the TeX bin directory before rendering."}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

    \AttributeTok{position      =} \StringTok{"center"}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  kbl\_txt }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{latex\_safe\_table\_text}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(kbl))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{identical}\NormalTok{(caption\_mode, }\StringTok{"numbered"}\NormalTok{)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{mark\_float\_emitted}\NormalTok{()}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(knitr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{asis\_output}\NormalTok{(kbl\_txt))}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  title\_i }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{identical}\NormalTok{(caption\_mode, }\StringTok{"none"}\NormalTok{)) }\ConstantTok{NULL} \ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ caption\_text}
  \FunctionTok{render\_table\_blocks}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    kbl\_txt,}
    \AttributeTok{title =}\NormalTok{ title\_i,}
    \AttributeTok{display\_label =}\NormalTok{ display\_label,}
    \AttributeTok{landscape =}\NormalTok{ landscape,}
    \AttributeTok{page\_break\_before =}\NormalTok{ page\_break\_before}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Package dependencies are managed via \texttt{renv} for reproducibility.
Use \texttt{renv::restore()} before rendering.

\subsubsection{Package Set Up}\label{package-set-up}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Consolidated package management {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\NormalTok{seed\_pkgs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"Matrix"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"WeightIt"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"broom"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"cobalt"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"codebookr"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"dagitty"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"digest"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"consort"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"dplyr"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"fastshap"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"flextable"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"fs"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"future"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"future.apply"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"gbm"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"ggdag"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ggplot2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"gt"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"gtsummary"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"haven"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"here"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"kableExtra"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"knitr"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"labelled"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"lubridate"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"mice"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"miceadds"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"mitools"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"naniar"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"officer"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"parallel"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"patchwork"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"pdftools"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"progressr"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"purrr"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"ragg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"renv"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"rlang"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"rms"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"scales"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"skimr"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"survey"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"tibble"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"tidyr"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"visdat"}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# helper: scan the notebook source for package usage so the render fails fast}
\CommentTok{\# if a collaborator has not restored the required \textasciigrave{}renv\textasciigrave{} environment.}
\NormalTok{extract\_notebook\_pkgs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(path) \{}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(path)) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{())}
\NormalTok{  lines }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readLines}\NormalTok{(path, }\AttributeTok{warn =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
  \CommentTok{\# Local extractor used for both \textasciigrave{}library(pkg)\textasciigrave{} and \textasciigrave{}pkg::fn()\textasciigrave{} patterns.}
\NormalTok{  capture\_group }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(pattern, x) \{}
\NormalTok{    hits }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{regexec}\NormalTok{(pattern, x, }\AttributeTok{perl =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    matches }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{regmatches}\NormalTok{(x, hits)}
\NormalTok{    vals }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(matches, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(m) }\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(m) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{) m[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{] }\ControlFlowTok{else} \ConstantTok{NA\_character\_}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{    vals[}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{nchar}\NormalTok{(vals))]}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  lib\_pkgs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{capture\_group}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"library}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s*}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s*[\textquotesingle{}}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{]?([A{-}Za{-}z][A{-}Za{-}z0{-}9.]*)[\textquotesingle{}}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{]?"}\NormalTok{, lines)}
\NormalTok{  ns\_pkgs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{capture\_group}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"([A{-}Za{-}z][A{-}Za{-}z0{-}9.]*)::[A{-}Za{-}z][A{-}Za{-}z0{-}9.\_]*"}\NormalTok{, lines)}
  \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(lib\_pkgs, ns\_pkgs))}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{qmd\_source }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ here}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Code Drafts"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ABG{-}VBG analysis 2026{-}4{-}21.qmd"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{notebook\_pkgs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{extract\_notebook\_pkgs}\NormalTok{(qmd\_source)}

\NormalTok{renv\_dep\_pkgs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{()}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\StringTok{"renv"} \SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{rownames}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{installed.packages}\NormalTok{())) \{}
\NormalTok{  renv\_dep\_pkgs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    \{}
\NormalTok{      dep\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ renv}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{dependencies}\NormalTok{(qmd\_source, }\AttributeTok{progress =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
      \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(dep\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Package)) }\FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(dep\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Package) }\ControlFlowTok{else} \FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{    \},}
    \AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) }\FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{base\_drop }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"base"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"datasets"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"graphics"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"grDevices"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"methods"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"stats"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"tools"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"utils"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{ignore\_pkgs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pkg"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{required\_pkgs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sort}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(seed\_pkgs, notebook\_pkgs), }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(base\_drop, ignore\_pkgs))))}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(renv\_dep\_pkgs)) \{}
\NormalTok{  renv\_only }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(renv\_dep\_pkgs, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(required\_pkgs, base\_drop, ignore\_pkgs))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(renv\_only)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Dependency audit note (renv::dependencies only): "}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{sort}\NormalTok{(renv\_only), }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# Fail fast if packages are missing (use renv to install)}
\NormalTok{missing\_pkgs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(required\_pkgs, }\FunctionTok{rownames}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{installed.packages}\NormalTok{()))}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(missing\_pkgs)) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"Missing packages: "}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(missing\_pkgs, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{),}
    \StringTok{". Install with renv::install(c(...)); if renv is absent, install \textquotesingle{}renv\textquotesingle{} first; then run renv::snapshot()."}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# Attach packages from one authoritative location.}
\NormalTok{ensure\_packages\_loaded }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(pkgs) \{}
  \FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(pkgs, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(pkg) \{}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{requireNamespace}\NormalTok{(pkg, }\AttributeTok{quietly =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)) \{}
      \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Required package is not available: "}\NormalTok{, pkg)}
\NormalTok{    \}}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"package:"}\NormalTok{, pkg) }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{search}\NormalTok{()) \{}
      \FunctionTok{suppressPackageStartupMessages}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{library}\NormalTok{(pkg, }\AttributeTok{character.only =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  \}))}
\NormalTok{\}}
\FunctionTok{ensure\_packages\_loaded}\NormalTok{(required\_pkgs)}

\CommentTok{\# Centralize outputs under Results/, with paths relative to project root}
\NormalTok{data\_dir\_param }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{Sys.getenv}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ABGVBG\_DATA\_DIR"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{unset =}\NormalTok{ params}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{data\_dir)}
\NormalTok{results\_dir\_param }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{Sys.getenv}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ABGVBG\_RESULTS\_DIR"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{unset =}\NormalTok{ params}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{results\_dir)}
\NormalTok{data\_dir\_name }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{path\_abs}\NormalTok{(data\_dir\_param, }\AttributeTok{start =}\NormalTok{ project\_root)}
\NormalTok{results\_dir }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{path\_abs}\NormalTok{(results\_dir\_param, }\AttributeTok{start =}\NormalTok{ project\_root)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{dir.exists}\NormalTok{(data\_dir\_name)) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Data directory does not exist: "}\NormalTok{, data\_dir\_name)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\NormalTok{fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{dir\_create}\NormalTok{(results\_dir, }\AttributeTok{recurse =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{fig\_dir      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{path}\NormalTok{(results\_dir, }\StringTok{"figs"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{fig\_path     }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{display\_path}\NormalTok{(fig\_dir, }\AttributeTok{must\_exist =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{"/"}\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\# helper: build paths under \textasciigrave{}Results/\textasciigrave{} from one canonical root so later code}
\CommentTok{\# never has to guess where artifacts should be written.}
\NormalTok{results\_path }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(...) fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{path}\NormalTok{(results\_dir, ...)}
\NormalTok{fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{dir\_create}\NormalTok{(fig\_dir, }\AttributeTok{recurse =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{knitr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\NormalTok{opts\_chunk}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{set}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{fig.path   =}\NormalTok{ fig\_path,}
  \AttributeTok{dev        =} \StringTok{"ragg\_png"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{dpi =} \DecValTok{300}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\# on macOS and some setups this prevents device headaches}
\FunctionTok{options}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{bitmapType =} \StringTok{"cairo"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: cohort flow helpers.}
\NormalTok{format\_count }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) \{}
  \FunctionTok{format}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(x), }\AttributeTok{big.mark =} \StringTok{","}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{trim =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{scientific =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{cohort\_flow\_input\_path }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{path}\NormalTok{(data\_dir\_name, }\StringTok{"full\_db.dta"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{cohort\_flow\_cols }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"encounter\_type"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# helper: read only the columns needed for Figure 1 so the cohort{-}flow section}
\CommentTok{\# stays fast and does not depend on unrelated variables.}
\NormalTok{read\_cohort\_flow\_input }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(path, }\AttributeTok{cols =}\NormalTok{ cohort\_flow\_cols) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(path))}
\NormalTok{  haven}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{read\_dta}\NormalTok{(path, }\AttributeTok{col\_select =}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(cols))}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: compute the count objects that feed the cohort{-}flow diagram. Keeping}
\CommentTok{\# this logic in one function makes later figure edits less error{-}prone.}
\NormalTok{compute\_cohort\_flow\_counts }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(df) \{}
\NormalTok{  encounter\_type\_num }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{encounter\_type))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{anyNA}\NormalTok{(encounter\_type\_num)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}
      \StringTok{"Cohort flow count input has missing encounter\_type values (n = "}\NormalTok{,}
      \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(encounter\_type\_num)), }\StringTok{")."}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  has\_abg\_num }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_abg))}
\NormalTok{  has\_vbg\_num }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_vbg))}
\NormalTok{  has\_abg\_num[}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(has\_abg\_num)] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{  has\_vbg\_num[}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(has\_vbg\_num)] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L}

\NormalTok{  analytic\_flag }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ encounter\_type\_num }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{  has\_abg\_flag }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ analytic\_flag }\SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ has\_abg\_num }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{  has\_vbg\_flag }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ analytic\_flag }\SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ has\_vbg\_num }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{  both\_flag }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ has\_abg\_flag }\SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ has\_vbg\_flag}
\NormalTok{  abg\_only\_flag }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ has\_abg\_flag }\SpecialCharTok{\&} \SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{has\_vbg\_flag}
\NormalTok{  vbg\_only\_flag }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ has\_vbg\_flag }\SpecialCharTok{\&} \SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{has\_abg\_flag}
\NormalTok{  neither\_flag }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ analytic\_flag }\SpecialCharTok{\&} \SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{has\_abg\_flag }\SpecialCharTok{\&} \SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{has\_vbg\_flag}
\NormalTok{  abg\_paco2\_flag }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ has\_abg\_flag }\SpecialCharTok{\&} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{paco2)}
\NormalTok{  vbg\_co2\_flag }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ has\_vbg\_flag }\SpecialCharTok{\&} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{vbg\_co2)}

\NormalTok{  analytic\_n }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(analytic\_flag, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(abg\_only\_flag, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(vbg\_only\_flag, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
              \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(both\_flag, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(neither\_flag, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{==}\NormalTok{ analytic\_n)}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(abg\_only\_flag, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(both\_flag, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{==}
              \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(has\_abg\_flag, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{))}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(vbg\_only\_flag, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(both\_flag, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{==}
              \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(has\_vbg\_flag, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{))}

  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{total\_extracted =} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(df),}
    \AttributeTok{excluded\_ambulatory =} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(encounter\_type\_num }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{analytic\_ed\_inpatient =}\NormalTok{ analytic\_n,}
    \AttributeTok{abg\_tested =} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(has\_abg\_flag, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{vbg\_tested =} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(has\_vbg\_flag, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{both\_abg\_vbg =} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(both\_flag, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{abg\_only =} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(abg\_only\_flag, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{vbg\_only =} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(vbg\_only\_flag, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{neither\_abg\_nor\_vbg =} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(neither\_flag, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{abg\_with\_paco2 =} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(abg\_paco2\_flag, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{vbg\_with\_vbg\_co2 =} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(vbg\_co2\_flag, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: add the shared comparability annotation beneath the two weighted}
\CommentTok{\# endpoints without changing the underlying consort graph geometry.}
\NormalTok{decorate\_weighted\_comparability }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(built\_graph, weighted\_nodes,}
\NormalTok{                                            label\_text,}
                                            \AttributeTok{text\_gp =}\NormalTok{ grid}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{gpar}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{col =} \StringTok{"grey25"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{cex =} \FloatTok{0.78}\NormalTok{),}
                                            \AttributeTok{label\_x =}\NormalTok{ grid}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{unit}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"npc"}\NormalTok{),}
                                            \AttributeTok{label\_y =}\NormalTok{ grid}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{unit}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.035}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"npc"}\NormalTok{)) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{inherits}\NormalTok{(built\_graph, }\StringTok{"gTree"}\NormalTok{))}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(weighted\_nodes) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L)}

\NormalTok{  band\_label }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ grid}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{textGrob}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{label =}\NormalTok{ label\_text,}
    \AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ label\_x,}
    \AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ label\_y,}
    \AttributeTok{just =} \StringTok{"center"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{gp =}\NormalTok{ text\_gp,}
    \AttributeTok{name =} \StringTok{"weighted\_comparability\_label"}
\NormalTok{  )}

  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{built\_graph =}\NormalTok{ built\_graph,}
    \AttributeTok{pre\_draw =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{post\_draw =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{() \{}
\NormalTok{      grid}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{grid.draw}\NormalTok{(band\_label)}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: export the cohort{-}flow graph to manuscript artifacts plus an optional}
\CommentTok{\# low{-}DPI inline preview while drawing the same built grob on each device to}
\CommentTok{\# avoid device{-}specific layout drift.}
\NormalTok{save\_cohort\_flow\_outputs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(graph, png\_file, pdf\_file,}
                                     \AttributeTok{width\_mm =} \DecValTok{180}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height\_mm =} \DecValTok{150}\NormalTok{,}
                                     \AttributeTok{dpi =} \DecValTok{600}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{bg =} \StringTok{"white"}\NormalTok{,}
                                     \AttributeTok{decorate\_fn =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{,}
                                     \AttributeTok{preview\_file =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{,}
                                     \AttributeTok{preview\_dpi =} \DecValTok{96}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  width\_in }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ width\_mm }\SpecialCharTok{/} \FloatTok{25.4}
\NormalTok{  height\_in }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ height\_mm }\SpecialCharTok{/} \FloatTok{25.4}
\NormalTok{  draw\_graph }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{new\_page =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{    built\_graph }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ consort}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{build\_grid}\NormalTok{(graph)}
\NormalTok{    decoration }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{NULL}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(decorate\_fn)) \{}
\NormalTok{      decoration }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{decorate\_fn}\NormalTok{(built\_graph)}
      \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{inherits}\NormalTok{(decoration, }\StringTok{"gTree"}\NormalTok{)) \{}
\NormalTok{        built\_graph }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ decoration}
\NormalTok{        decoration }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{NULL}
\NormalTok{      \} }\ControlFlowTok{else} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.list}\NormalTok{(decoration) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \FunctionTok{inherits}\NormalTok{(decoration}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{built\_graph, }\StringTok{"gTree"}\NormalTok{)) \{}
\NormalTok{        built\_graph }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ decoration}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{built\_graph}
\NormalTok{      \}}
\NormalTok{    \}}
    \CommentTok{\# Raster devices and inline replay paths often need an explicit new page,}
    \CommentTok{\# but a freshly opened PDF device already has page 1 active. Calling}
    \CommentTok{\# grid.newpage() there creates a blank first page and pushes the diagram to}
    \CommentTok{\# page 2, which LaTeX then includes incorrectly.}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{isTRUE}\NormalTok{(new\_page)) \{}
\NormalTok{      grid}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{grid.newpage}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{    \}}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.list}\NormalTok{(decoration) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \FunctionTok{is.function}\NormalTok{(decoration}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pre\_draw)) \{}
\NormalTok{      decoration}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{pre\_draw}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{    grid}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{grid.draw}\NormalTok{(built\_graph)}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.list}\NormalTok{(decoration) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \FunctionTok{is.function}\NormalTok{(decoration}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{post\_draw)) \{}
\NormalTok{      decoration}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{post\_draw}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{dir\_create}\NormalTok{(fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{path\_dir}\NormalTok{(png\_file), }\AttributeTok{recurse =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  \}}
  \FunctionTok{draw\_graph}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{new\_page =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}

  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(preview\_file)) \{}
\NormalTok{    fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{dir\_create}\NormalTok{(fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{path\_dir}\NormalTok{(preview\_file), }\AttributeTok{recurse =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  \}}

  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(png\_file), }\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(pdf\_file))}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: setup run config.}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(params}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{run\_mode))}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(params}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pilot\_frac))}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(params}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sample\_seed))}

\NormalTok{RUN\_MODE }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{match.arg}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{tolower}\NormalTok{(params}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{run\_mode), }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pilot"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"full"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{PILOT\_FRAC }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(params}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pilot\_frac)}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(PILOT\_FRAC), PILOT\_FRAC }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, PILOT\_FRAC }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}=} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{IS\_PILOT }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{identical}\NormalTok{(RUN\_MODE, }\StringTok{"pilot"}\NormalTok{)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (IS\_PILOT) \{}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{(PILOT\_FRAC }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0} \SpecialCharTok{\&\&}\NormalTok{ PILOT\_FRAC }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"RUN\_MODE=\textquotesingle{}pilot\textquotesingle{} requires 0 \textless{} PILOT\_FRAC \textless{} 1."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{isTRUE}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all.equal}\NormalTok{(PILOT\_FRAC, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))) \{}
    \FunctionTok{warning}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"RUN\_MODE=\textquotesingle{}full\textquotesingle{} ignores pilot\_frac and forces PILOT\_FRAC = 1."}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{call. =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  PILOT\_FRAC }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1}
\NormalTok{\}}
\NormalTok{SAMPLE\_SEED }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(params}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sample\_seed)}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(SAMPLE\_SEED))}

\NormalTok{pilot\_frac }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ PILOT\_FRAC}
\NormalTok{FULL\_RUN }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{identical}\NormalTok{(RUN\_MODE, }\StringTok{"full"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{MI\_BATCH\_THRESHOLD\_PILOT }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{5000}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{MI\_BATCH\_THRESHOLD\_FULL }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{200000}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{MI\_BATCH\_THRESHOLD }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (IS\_PILOT) MI\_BATCH\_THRESHOLD\_PILOT }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ MI\_BATCH\_THRESHOLD\_FULL}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(MI\_BATCH\_THRESHOLD), MI\_BATCH\_THRESHOLD }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{PLOT\_DROP\_POLICY }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"warn"}
\NormalTok{PROB\_EPS }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{1e{-}6}
\NormalTok{MAX\_SHAPE\_LEVELS }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{SPLINE\_GRID\_N }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{200}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{OR\_XLIM }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.25}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{16}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{TAIL\_N\_FINITE }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{TAIL\_WINDOW\_ITERS }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{BAL\_XLIM\_MAX }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{1.0}
\NormalTok{MC\_ERR\_RATIO\_THRESH }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{0.10}
\NormalTok{MAX\_LEVELS\_GBM }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{50}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{GBM\_MM\_EST\_BYTES\_WARN }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{6e9}
\NormalTok{MAX\_GBM\_MM\_COLS\_WARN }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{200}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{MAX\_GBM\_MM\_COLS\_STOP }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{400}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{MAX\_GBM\_FACTOR\_LEVELS\_WARN }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{30}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{MAX\_GBM\_FACTOR\_LEVELS\_STOP }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{60}\NormalTok{L}

\FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}

\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  files }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list.files}\NormalTok{(results\_dir, }\AttributeTok{full.names =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  base }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{basename}\NormalTok{(files)}

\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{    safe\_root }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{normalizePath}\NormalTok{(results\_dir, }\AttributeTok{winslash =} \StringTok{"/"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{mustWork =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# helper: remove heavyweight MI scratch artifacts after successful renders so}
\CommentTok{\# routine notebook runs do not silently accumulate stale intermediate objects.}

\NormalTok{  transient\_files }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}

\NormalTok{    fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{file\_delete}\NormalTok{(existing\_files)}
\NormalTok{  \}}

  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(existing\_dirs)) \{}
\NormalTok{    safe\_root }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{normalizePath}\NormalTok{(results\_dir, }\AttributeTok{winslash =} \StringTok{"/"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{mustWork =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{\}}

\FunctionTok{cleanup\_diagnostics\_outputs}\NormalTok{()}
\FunctionTok{cleanup\_mi\_transient\_outputs}\NormalTok{()}
\CommentTok{\# Ensure any stale Results artifacts from prior runs are removed}
\NormalTok{stale\_patterns }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"\^{}missingness\_by\_strata}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{.csv$"}\NormalTok{,}

  \StringTok{"\^{}mi\_logistic\_ps\_factor\_levels\_.*}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{.csv$"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"\^{}mi\_logistic\_ps\_.*}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{.(csv|rds)$"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"\^{}get\_imp\_usage}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{.csv$"}\NormalTok{,}

\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{stale\_files }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list.files}\NormalTok{(results\_dir, }\AttributeTok{full.names =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{stale\_files }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ stale\_files[}\FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(stale\_patterns, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{"|"}\NormalTok{), stale\_base)]}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(stale\_files)) fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{file\_delete}\NormalTok{(stale\_files)}

\subsection{Helper functions for model
diagnostics}\label{helper-functions-for-model-diagnostics}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Diagnostics helper functions for MI/IPW pipeline}

\CommentTok{\# helper: fail early if an analysis stage expects complete covariates but the}
\CommentTok{\# current data still contains missing values in those columns.}
\NormalTok{assert\_no\_na\_covars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(df, covars, }\AttributeTok{context =} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  missing }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(covars, }\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(df))}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(missing) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  na\_counts }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(df[, covars, }\AttributeTok{drop =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{], }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) }\FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(x)), }\FunctionTok{numeric}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(na\_counts }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)) \{}
\NormalTok{    msg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}
      \StringTok{"NA values found in covariates ("}\NormalTok{, context, }\StringTok{"): "}\NormalTok{,}
      \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(na\_counts)[na\_counts }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{], na\_counts[na\_counts }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{], }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    )}
    \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(msg)}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  \FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: collapse the raw \textasciigrave{}mice\textasciigrave{} logged{-}events table into counts that are}
\CommentTok{\# easier to review in diagnostics CSVs and notebook output.}
\NormalTok{summarize\_logged\_events }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(mids\_obj) \{}
\NormalTok{  ev }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ mids\_obj}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{loggedEvents}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(ev) }\SpecialCharTok{||} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(ev) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L) \{}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{variable =} \FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{(),}
      \AttributeTok{method =} \FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{(),}
      \AttributeTok{event =} \FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{(),}
      \AttributeTok{n =} \FunctionTok{integer}\NormalTok{(),}
      \AttributeTok{pct =} \FunctionTok{numeric}\NormalTok{(),}
      \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{    ))}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"dep"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"meth"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"out"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(ev)))}
\NormalTok{  tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{table}\NormalTok{(ev}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{dep, ev}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{meth, ev}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{out), }\AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(tbl) }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"variable"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"method"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"event"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"n"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tbl[tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{n }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, , drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{  tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tbl[}\FunctionTok{order}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{n), , drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{  tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pct }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{n }\SpecialCharTok{/} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{n)}
\NormalTok{  tbl}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: consistently pull propensity scores out of WeightIt objects.}
\NormalTok{extract\_weightit\_ps }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(w) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(w}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ps))}
  \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(w}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ps)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: effective sample size for a vector of weights.}
\NormalTok{ess }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(w) \{}
\NormalTok{  w }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ w[}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(w)]}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(w) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(w)}\SpecialCharTok{\^{}}\DecValTok{2} \SpecialCharTok{/} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(w}\SpecialCharTok{\^{}}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: quantify how much total weight is concentrated in the largest weights.}
\NormalTok{weight\_concentration }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(w, }\AttributeTok{top\_p =} \FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  w }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ w[}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(w)]}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(w) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  ord }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sort}\NormalTok{(w, }\AttributeTok{decreasing =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  n\_top }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L, }\FunctionTok{floor}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(ord) }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ top\_p))}
  \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(ord[}\FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(n\_top)]) }\SpecialCharTok{/} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(ord)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: summarize one set of inverse{-}probability weights and their matching}
\CommentTok{\# propensity scores for later diagnostics tables.}
\NormalTok{weight\_summary }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(w, ps, ps\_floor, truncated) \{}
\NormalTok{  w\_ok }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ w[}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(w)]}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(w\_ok) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  ps\_ok }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ps[}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(ps)]}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(ps\_ok) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  out }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{n =} \FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(w\_ok),}
    \AttributeTok{mean =} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(w\_ok, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{sd =}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{sd}\NormalTok{(w\_ok, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{min =} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(w\_ok, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{p01 =}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{quantile}\NormalTok{(w\_ok, }\FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{p05 =}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{quantile}\NormalTok{(w\_ok, }\FloatTok{0.05}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{p95 =}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{quantile}\NormalTok{(w\_ok, }\FloatTok{0.95}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{p99 =}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{quantile}\NormalTok{(w\_ok, }\FloatTok{0.99}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{max =} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(w\_ok, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{sum\_w =} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(w\_ok, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{ess =} \FunctionTok{ess}\NormalTok{(w\_ok),}
    \AttributeTok{top01\_weight\_share =} \FunctionTok{weight\_concentration}\NormalTok{(w\_ok, }\AttributeTok{top\_p =} \FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{ps\_floor =}\NormalTok{ ps\_floor,}
    \AttributeTok{trunc\_rate =} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(truncated, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{ps\_min =} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(ps\_ok, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{ps\_p01 =}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{quantile}\NormalTok{(ps\_ok, }\FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{ps\_p05 =}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{quantile}\NormalTok{(ps\_ok, }\FloatTok{0.05}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{ps\_p95 =}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{quantile}\NormalTok{(ps\_ok, }\FloatTok{0.95}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{ps\_max =} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(ps\_ok, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{  out}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: convert fitted propensities into the project{-}specific one{-}sided IPSW}
\CommentTok{\# weights used to standardize the tested cohorts back to the analytic cohort.}
\NormalTok{compute\_ipow\_weights }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(w, treat, }\AttributeTok{ps\_floor\_quantile =} \FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{,}
                                 \AttributeTok{stabilize =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# One{-}sided IPSW for this project:}
  \CommentTok{\# outcome models are fit only within the tested cohort, so only tested rows}
  \CommentTok{\# receive inverse{-}propensity weights. The target is the full analytic cohort,}
  \CommentTok{\# not the untested subgroup. We truncate extremely small propensities to avoid}
  \CommentTok{\# unstable huge weights, then optionally stabilize so treated weights average \textasciitilde{}1.}
\NormalTok{  ps }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{extract\_weightit\_ps}\NormalTok{(w)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(ps) }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(treat)) }\FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Propensity length mismatch."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  treat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(treat)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(treat }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L))) }\FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Treatment indicator must be 0/1."}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  ps\_obs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ps[treat }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L }\SpecialCharTok{\&} \FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(ps)]}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(ps\_obs)) }\FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"No treated observations with finite propensity."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  ps\_floor }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{quantile}\NormalTok{(ps\_obs, }\AttributeTok{probs =}\NormalTok{ ps\_floor\_quantile, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(ps\_floor) }\SpecialCharTok{||}\NormalTok{ ps\_floor }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}=} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) }\FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Invalid propensity floor."}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  w\_raw }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(ps))}
\NormalTok{  w\_raw[treat }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ ps[treat }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L]}

\NormalTok{  cap }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ ps\_floor}
\NormalTok{  truncated }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ treat }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L }\SpecialCharTok{\&} \FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(ps) }\SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ ps }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\NormalTok{ ps\_floor}
\NormalTok{  w\_trunc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ w\_raw}
\NormalTok{  w\_trunc[truncated] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ cap}

  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (stabilize) \{}
\NormalTok{    w\_trunc }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ w\_trunc }\SpecialCharTok{/} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(w\_trunc[treat }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L], }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  \}}

  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{weights   =}\NormalTok{ w\_trunc,}
    \AttributeTok{ps        =}\NormalTok{ ps,}
    \AttributeTok{ps\_floor  =}\NormalTok{ ps\_floor,}

\NormalTok{  n\_factor }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(df\_s, is.factor, }\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)))}

\CommentTok{\# helper: print a small preview with an optional title during debugging.}
\NormalTok{print\_head }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(df, }\AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{title =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{) \{}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(title)) }\FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(title)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(df) }\SpecialCharTok{||} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(df) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L) \{}
    \FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"No rows to display."}\NormalTok{)}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(}\ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  \FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(utils}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{head}\NormalTok{(df, n))}
  \FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: assert that an object is data{-}frame{-}like before downstream code tries}
\CommentTok{\# to treat it as tabular data.}
\NormalTok{assert\_is\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x, }\AttributeTok{context =} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{) \{}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(x)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(context, }\StringTok{": object is NULL"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{inherits}\NormalTok{(x, }\StringTok{"data.frame"}\NormalTok{)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(context, }\StringTok{": expected data.frame/tibble; got class="}\NormalTok{,}
         \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{class}\NormalTok{(x), }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{" typeof="}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{typeof}\NormalTok{(x))}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  \FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: stop with a readable message when required columns are missing.}
\NormalTok{assert\_has\_cols }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(df, cols, }\AttributeTok{context =} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  missing }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(cols, }\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(df))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(missing)) \{}

\NormalTok{  \}}
  \FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: obtain \textasciigrave{}nrow()\textasciigrave{} only after validating that the input is truly tabular.}
\NormalTok{safe\_nrow }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(df, }\AttributeTok{context =} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{) \{}
  \FunctionTok{assert\_is\_df}\NormalTok{(df, context)}
\NormalTok{  nr }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(df)}

    \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(context, }\StringTok{": nrow(df) returned invalid value: "}\NormalTok{,}
         \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{capture.output}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{str}\NormalTok{(nr)), }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{" "}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(nr)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: expose the cumulative plot{-}drop log for debugging and export.}
\NormalTok{plot\_drop\_log }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{() \{}
\NormalTok{  plot\_drop\_log\_df}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: record rows dropped during figure preparation so suspicious plotting}

                          \AttributeTok{n\_before =} \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{n\_after =} \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}\NormalTok{,}

\NormalTok{  plot\_drop\_log\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(}
    \FunctionTok{plot\_drop\_log}\NormalTok{(),}
    \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{plot =}\NormalTok{ plot\_name, }\AttributeTok{reason =}\NormalTok{ reason, }\AttributeTok{n\_dropped =}\NormalTok{ n\_dropped,}
               \AttributeTok{n\_before =}\NormalTok{ n\_before, }\AttributeTok{n\_after =}\NormalTok{ n\_after,}
               \AttributeTok{stage =}\NormalTok{ stage, }\AttributeTok{extra =}\NormalTok{ extra,}
               \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{identical}\NormalTok{(PLOT\_DROP\_POLICY, }\StringTok{"stop"}\NormalTok{)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Plot data dropped in "}\NormalTok{, plot\_name, }\StringTok{": "}\NormalTok{, reason)}
\NormalTok{  \} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
    \FunctionTok{warning}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Plot data dropped in "}\NormalTok{, plot\_name, }\StringTok{": "}\NormalTok{, reason, }\AttributeTok{call. =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: wrap model fitting so warnings, convergence flags, and simple}

\NormalTok{  warn\_msgs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.data.frame}\NormalTok{(cap}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{warnings)) cap}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{warnings}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{message }\ControlFlowTok{else} \FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{  warning\_n }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.data.frame}\NormalTok{(cap}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{warnings)) }\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(cap}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{warnings) }\ControlFlowTok{else} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{  top\_warning }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (warning\_n) warn\_msgs[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{] }\ControlFlowTok{else} \ConstantTok{NA\_character\_}

\NormalTok{    diag }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}

\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  phat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{fitted}\NormalTok{(fit), }\AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) }\ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  min\_phat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(phat))) }\ConstantTok{NA\_real\_} \ControlFlowTok{else} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(phat, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  copied }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{    src }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{artifact\_file\_path}\NormalTok{(source\_stub, ext, source\_subdir)}
\NormalTok{    dst }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{artifact\_file\_path}\NormalTok{(alias\_stub, ext, alias\_subdir)}

\NormalTok{      missing }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(missing, src)}

\NormalTok{    \}}

\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{    copied }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(copied, dst)}
\NormalTok{  \}}

      \StringTok{"Missing source artifact(s) for alias ["}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      alias\_stub,}

\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  \FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(copied)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{  hit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ feature\_names[}\FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(feature\_names, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(v) }\FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(v, clean\_term, }\AttributeTok{fixed =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))]}

  \ConstantTok{NA\_character\_}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: subsample rows reproducibly before SHAP{-}style calculations so}

  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(df) }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}=}\NormalTok{ n\_max) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(df)}
  \FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(seed)}
\NormalTok{  df[}\FunctionTok{sample.int}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(df), }\AttributeTok{size =}\NormalTok{ n\_max, }\AttributeTok{replace =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{), , drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{    best\_tree }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ gbm\_obj}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{n.trees}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  x\_use }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ x\_df[, feature\_names, drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{  char\_cols }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(x\_use)[}\FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(x\_use, is.character, }\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))]}

\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  )}

\CommentTok{\# helper: plot the top contribution features side by side for ABG and VBG so}

\NormalTok{  df\_top\_plot }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ df\_top }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(group) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{desc}\NormalTok{(mean\_abs\_shap), }\AttributeTok{.by\_group =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}

\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}

\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}

\NormalTok{    df\_top\_plot,}
\NormalTok{    ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}

\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{    ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{geom\_col}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{show.legend =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}

    \FunctionTok{theme\_pub}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{base\_size =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{        term }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"Overall (mean |SMD|)"}\NormalTok{,}

\NormalTok{        abs\_smd\_raw}
\NormalTok{      )}
\NormalTok{    )}

\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  method}

\NormalTok{    )}

\CommentTok{\# helper: standardize categorical odds{-}ratio outputs from the different model}
\CommentTok{\# tracks into one shared export/plot schema.}

                                             \AttributeTok{outcome\_col =} \StringTok{"outcome"}\NormalTok{,}

  \FunctionTok{assert\_is\_df}\NormalTok{(df, }\AttributeTok{context =}\NormalTok{ context)}

\NormalTok{  out }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}

    \AttributeTok{contrast =} \FunctionTok{normalize\_cat3\_key\_results\_contrast}\NormalTok{(}
      \FunctionTok{map\_cat3\_term\_contrast}\NormalTok{(df[[term\_col]]),}
      \AttributeTok{context =}\NormalTok{ context}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{OR =} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(df[[or\_col]])),}
    \AttributeTok{LCL =} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(df[[lcl\_col]])),}
    \AttributeTok{UCL =} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(df[[ucl\_col]]))}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(OR), }\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(LCL), }\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(UCL), OR }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, LCL }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, UCL }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}

  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(out)) }\FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(context, }\StringTok{": no finite OR rows after filtering."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  out}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{  out }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}

\NormalTok{    )}

\NormalTok{\}}
