      \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Outcome"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Odds Ratio (log scale, 95\% CI)"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{color =} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(color\_var)) }\StringTok{"Blood{-}gas type"} \ControlFlowTok{else} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{shape =} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(shape\_var)) }\StringTok{"PCO2 category"} \ControlFlowTok{else} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{caption =}\NormalTok{ caption}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{theme\_pub}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{base\_size =} \DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{    ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{plot.caption =}\NormalTok{ ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{hjust =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{axis.text.x =}\NormalTok{ ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{angle =} \DecValTok{15}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hjust =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{legend.position =} \StringTok{"bottom"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{legend.box =} \StringTok{"horizontal"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{plot.margin =}\NormalTok{ ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{margin}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    )}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(color\_var) }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(shape\_var)) \{}
\NormalTok{    p }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ p }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{guides}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{color =}\NormalTok{ ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{guide\_legend}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{nrow =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{byrow =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{shape =}\NormalTok{ ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{guide\_legend}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{nrow =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{byrow =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  \}}

  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(facet\_var)) \{}
\NormalTok{    p }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ p }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{facet\_wrap}\NormalTok{(stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{as.formula}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textasciitilde{}"}\NormalTok{, facet\_var)))}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  p}
\NormalTok{\}}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: preflight scan for very long source lines that can stress LaTeX code{-}block rendering.}
\NormalTok{qmd\_src\_scan }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{resolve\_current\_qmd}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{qmd\_lines }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readLines}\NormalTok{(qmd\_src\_scan, }\AttributeTok{warn =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{risk\_threshold }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{220}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{line\_nchars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{nchar}\NormalTok{(qmd\_lines, }\AttributeTok{type =} \StringTok{"chars"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{allowNA =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{keepNA =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{risk\_idx }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{which}\NormalTok{(line\_nchars }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ risk\_threshold)}
\NormalTok{risk\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(risk\_idx)) \{}
  \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{line\_no =}\NormalTok{ risk\_idx,}
    \AttributeTok{n\_chars =}\NormalTok{ line\_nchars[risk\_idx],}
    \AttributeTok{line\_preview =} \FunctionTok{substr}\NormalTok{(qmd\_lines[risk\_idx], }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{200}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
  \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{line\_no =} \FunctionTok{integer}\NormalTok{(),}
    \AttributeTok{n\_chars =} \FunctionTok{integer}\NormalTok{(),}
    \AttributeTok{line\_preview =} \FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{(),}
    \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}
\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(risk\_df, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"latex\_codeblock\_risk\_scan.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: setup model diagrams.}

\CommentTok{\# Toggle to show diagrams inline in the PDF}
\NormalTok{show\_model\_diagrams }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{FALSE}

\NormalTok{model\_diagram\_dir }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{path}\NormalTok{(results\_dir, }\StringTok{"figs"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"model{-}diagrams"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{dir\_create}\NormalTok{(model\_diagram\_dir)}

\CommentTok{\# helper: turn free{-}text model names into filesystem{-}safe stubs for diagram}
\CommentTok{\# export without changing the displayed label.}
\NormalTok{.make\_safe\_name }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) \{}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"[\^{}A{-}Za{-}z0{-}9]+"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"{-}"}\NormalTok{, x)}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"(\^{}{-}|{-}$)"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{""}\NormalTok{, x)}
  \FunctionTok{tolower}\NormalTok{(x)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: recover the response and predictor names from a model formula before}
\CommentTok{\# drawing a simple DAG representation.}
\NormalTok{.extract\_model\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(fml) \{}
\NormalTok{  tt }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{terms}\NormalTok{(fml)}
\NormalTok{  response }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{all.vars}\NormalTok{(stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{update}\NormalTok{(fml, . }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  response }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(response)) response[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{] }\ControlFlowTok{else} \ConstantTok{NA\_character\_}
\NormalTok{  term\_labels }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{attr}\NormalTok{(tt, }\StringTok{"term.labels"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  preds }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{unlist}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(term\_labels, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(t) \{}
    \FunctionTok{all.vars}\NormalTok{(stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{as.formula}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textasciitilde{}"}\NormalTok{, t)))}
\NormalTok{  \})))}
\NormalTok{  preds }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(preds, response)}
  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{response =}\NormalTok{ response, }\AttributeTok{preds =}\NormalTok{ preds)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: build a minimal DAG from a model formula so the notebook can export}
\CommentTok{\# lightweight model{-}structure diagrams alongside the analysis.}
\NormalTok{.build\_model\_dag }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(fml) \{}
\NormalTok{  vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{.extract\_model\_vars}\NormalTok{(fml)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(vars}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{response) }\SpecialCharTok{||} \FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(vars}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{preds) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L) \{}
    \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Model diagram: formula has no response or predictors: "}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{deparse}\NormalTok{(fml))}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  edges }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\%s {-}\textgreater{} \%s"}\NormalTok{, vars}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{preds, vars}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{response), }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{  "}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  dagitty}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{dagitty}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"dag \{ \%s \}"}\NormalTok{, edges))}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: render and save one model diagram with a size that adapts to the}
\CommentTok{\# number of variables in the formula.}
\NormalTok{save\_model\_diagram }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(name, fml, }\AttributeTok{width =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  dag }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{.build\_model\_dag}\NormalTok{(fml)}

\NormalTok{  vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{.extract\_model\_vars}\NormalTok{(fml)}
\NormalTok{  n\_pred  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(vars}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{preds)}
\NormalTok{  n\_nodes }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ n\_pred }\SpecialCharTok{+} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L}

\NormalTok{  label\_size }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (n\_pred }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=} \DecValTok{35}\NormalTok{) }\FloatTok{1.4} \ControlFlowTok{else} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (n\_pred }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=} \DecValTok{25}\NormalTok{) }\FloatTok{1.8} \ControlFlowTok{else} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (n\_pred }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=} \DecValTok{15}\NormalTok{) }\FloatTok{2.2} \ControlFlowTok{else} \FloatTok{2.8}
\NormalTok{  point\_size }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (n\_pred }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=} \DecValTok{25}\NormalTok{) }\FloatTok{2.0} \ControlFlowTok{else} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (n\_pred }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=} \DecValTok{15}\NormalTok{) }\FloatTok{2.5} \ControlFlowTok{else} \FloatTok{3.0}

\NormalTok{  base\_width  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(width)) }\DecValTok{8} \ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ width}
\NormalTok{  base\_height }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(height)) }\DecValTok{6} \ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ height}
\NormalTok{  width  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(base\_width,  }\FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{24}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.4} \SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ n\_nodes }\SpecialCharTok{+} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  height }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(base\_height, }\FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{16}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.25} \SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ n\_nodes }\SpecialCharTok{+} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{  layout }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (n\_pred }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=} \DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{) }\StringTok{"sugiyama"} \ControlFlowTok{else} \StringTok{"nicely"}
\NormalTok{  dag\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ggdag}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tidy\_dagitty}\NormalTok{(dag, }\AttributeTok{layout =}\NormalTok{ layout)}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{data}

\NormalTok{  p }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    dag\_data,}
\NormalTok{    ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ x, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ y, }\AttributeTok{xend =}\NormalTok{ xend, }\AttributeTok{yend =}\NormalTok{ yend)}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{    ggdag}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{geom\_dag\_edges}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{    ggdag}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{geom\_dag\_point}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{size =}\NormalTok{ point\_size) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{    ggdag}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{geom\_dag\_text\_repel}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{label =}\NormalTok{ name),}
      \AttributeTok{size =}\NormalTok{ label\_size,}
      \AttributeTok{max.overlaps =} \ConstantTok{Inf}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{    ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{scale\_x\_continuous}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{expand =}\NormalTok{ ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{expansion}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{mult =} \FloatTok{0.15}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{    ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{scale\_y\_continuous}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{expand =}\NormalTok{ ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{expansion}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{mult =} \FloatTok{0.15}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{    ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{theme\_void}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{    ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =}\NormalTok{ name) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
\NormalTok{    ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{plot.title =}\NormalTok{ ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hjust =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{plot.margin =}\NormalTok{ ggplot2}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{margin}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    )}

\NormalTok{  file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{path}\NormalTok{(model\_diagram\_dir, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{.make\_safe\_name}\NormalTok{(name), }\StringTok{".png"}\NormalTok{))}
  \FunctionTok{save\_diag\_plot}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{file =}\NormalTok{ file, }\AttributeTok{p =}\NormalTok{ p, }\AttributeTok{width =}\NormalTok{ width, }\AttributeTok{height =}\NormalTok{ height, }\AttributeTok{dpi =} \DecValTok{300}\NormalTok{)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{isTRUE}\NormalTok{(show\_model\_diagrams)) }\FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(p)}
\NormalTok{  file}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{model\_diagrams }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{()}
\CommentTok{\# helper: save one model diagram and register its path for later reuse.}
\NormalTok{register\_model\_diagram }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(name, fml, }\AttributeTok{width =} \DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{save\_model\_diagram}\NormalTok{(name, fml, }\AttributeTok{width =}\NormalTok{ width, }\AttributeTok{height =}\NormalTok{ height)}
\NormalTok{  model\_diagrams[[name]] }\OtherTok{\textless{}\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ file}
  \FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(file)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: batch{-}register a named list of model formulas as diagram exports.}
\NormalTok{register\_model\_diagrams }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(forms, }\AttributeTok{width =} \DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  purrr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{iwalk}\NormalTok{(forms, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(fml, nm) \{}
    \FunctionTok{register\_model\_diagram}\NormalTok{(nm, fml, }\AttributeTok{width =}\NormalTok{ width, }\AttributeTok{height =}\NormalTok{ height)}
\NormalTok{  \})}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: setup shapviz.}
\CommentTok{\# Keep SHAP enabled in both pilot and full so the report has figure parity}
\CommentTok{\# across IPSW sections. Sampling controls below limit runtime/memory.}
\NormalTok{RUN\_SHAP }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{SHAP\_TOP\_N }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{SHAP\_SAMPLE\_N }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{2000}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{SHAP\_NSIM }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{20}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{MI\_SHAP\_SAMPLE\_N\_FULL }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{400}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{MI\_SHAP\_SAMPLE\_N\_PILOT }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1000}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{MI\_SHAP\_SAMPLE\_N }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (RUN\_MODE }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"full"}\NormalTok{) MI\_SHAP\_SAMPLE\_N\_FULL }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ MI\_SHAP\_SAMPLE\_N\_PILOT}
\NormalTok{MI\_SHAP\_MAX\_TERMS }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{50000}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{MI\_SHAP\_FAIL\_OPEN }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{TRUE}

\NormalTok{HAS\_FASTSHAP }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{requireNamespace}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"fastshap"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{quietly =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (RUN\_SHAP }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{HAS\_FASTSHAP) \{}
  \FunctionTok{warning}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"fastshap is not installed; SHAP figures will be skipped. "}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Install with renv::install(\textquotesingle{}fastshap\textquotesingle{})."}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{call. =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# The canonical report path does not inject per{-}chunk runtime text into the PDF.}
\NormalTok{knitr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\NormalTok{opts\_chunk}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{set}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{runtimelog =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: seed escrow.}
\NormalTok{seed\_escrow }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{component =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"Multiple imputation (mice)"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"ABG propensity GBM (non{-}MI)"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"VBG propensity GBM (non{-}MI)"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"MI PS (glm RCS) seeds (ABG per imputation)"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"MI PS (glm RCS) seeds (VBG per imputation)"}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{seed =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"20251206"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"42"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"42"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"20251206 + imputation index"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"30251206 + imputation index"}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{render\_table\_pdf}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  seed\_escrow,}
  \AttributeTok{caption =} \StringTok{"Seed escrow for MI and GBM runs"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{file\_stub =} \StringTok{"seed\_escrow"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{digits =} \DecValTok{0}
\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{center}\textbf{Seed escrow for MI and GBM runs}\end{center}

\begin{table}[!h]
\centering\begingroup\fontsize{7}{9}\selectfont

\resizebox{\ifdim\width>\linewidth\linewidth\else\width\fi}{!}{
\begin{tabular}{ll}
\toprule
component & seed\\
\midrule
Multiple imputation (mice) & 20251206\\
ABG propensity GBM (non-MI) & 42\\
VBG propensity GBM (non-MI) & 42\\
MI PS (glm RCS) seeds (ABG per imputation) & 20251206 + imputation index\\
MI PS (glm RCS) seeds (VBG per imputation) & 30251206 + imputation index\\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}}
\endgroup{}
\end{table}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Make gt tables robust in PDF: full width, caption, small font}
\NormalTok{gt\_pdf }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x, }\AttributeTok{title =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{subtitle =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  out }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ x }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tab\_options}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{table.width              =}\NormalTok{ gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{pct}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{table.align              =} \StringTok{"left"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{table.font.size          =}\NormalTok{ gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{px}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{data\_row.padding         =}\NormalTok{ gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{px}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{column\_labels.font.size  =}\NormalTok{ gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{px}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{heading.title.font.size  =}\NormalTok{ gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{px}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{heading.subtitle.font.size =}\NormalTok{ gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{px}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{opt\_align\_table\_header}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{align =} \StringTok{"left"}\NormalTok{)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(title))    out }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ out }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tab\_caption}\NormalTok{(title)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(subtitle)) out }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ out }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tab\_source\_note}\NormalTok{(subtitle)}
\NormalTok{  out}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Converts the data from a STATA format to rdata if the rdata file does
not exist. If it does already exist, it just loads that.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: stage1 start.}
\FunctionTok{append\_mem\_snapshot}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"stage1"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"start"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"pre"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# data\_dir\_name resolved in setup{-}packages from params/env}
\NormalTok{stata\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{file.path}\NormalTok{(data\_dir\_name, }\StringTok{"full\_db.dta"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{stata\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read\_dta}\NormalTok{(stata\_file)}

\CommentTok{\# Sanitize variable labels for PDF/TOC safety (avoid Unicode subscripts)}
\NormalTok{sanitize\_label\_text }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) \{}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(x)) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(x)}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2080"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"0"}\NormalTok{, x, }\AttributeTok{fixed =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2081"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"1"}\NormalTok{, x, }\AttributeTok{fixed =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2082"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"2"}\NormalTok{, x, }\AttributeTok{fixed =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2083"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"3"}\NormalTok{, x, }\AttributeTok{fixed =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2084"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"4"}\NormalTok{, x, }\AttributeTok{fixed =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2085"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"5"}\NormalTok{, x, }\AttributeTok{fixed =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2086"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"6"}\NormalTok{, x, }\AttributeTok{fixed =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2087"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"7"}\NormalTok{, x, }\AttributeTok{fixed =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2088"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"8"}\NormalTok{, x, }\AttributeTok{fixed =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textbackslash{}u2089"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"9"}\NormalTok{, x, }\AttributeTok{fixed =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  x}
\NormalTok{\}}
\CommentTok{\# helper: replace Unicode subscripts in variable labels before PDF rendering so}
\CommentTok{\# gt/kable output stays stable across LaTeX engines.}
\NormalTok{sanitize\_var\_labels }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(df) \{}
\NormalTok{  labs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ labelled}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{var\_label}\NormalTok{(df)}
\NormalTok{  labs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(labs, sanitize\_label\_text)}
\NormalTok{  labelled}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{var\_label}\NormalTok{(df) }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ labs}
\NormalTok{  df}
\NormalTok{\}}
\NormalTok{stata\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sanitize\_var\_labels}\NormalTok{(stata\_data)}

\NormalTok{var\_labels }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ labelled}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{var\_label}\NormalTok{(stata\_data)}
\NormalTok{value\_labels }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(stata\_data, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) }\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.labelled}\NormalTok{(x)) }\FunctionTok{val\_labels}\NormalTok{(x))}
\FunctionTok{saveRDS}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{var\_labels =}\NormalTok{ var\_labels, }\AttributeTok{value\_labels =}\NormalTok{ value\_labels),}
  \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"stata\_labels.rds"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsubsection{Configuration for the IPW
models}\label{configuration-for-the-ipw-models}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: propensity config.}
\NormalTok{drop\_vars\_ultra\_missing }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"bnp"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"spo2"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{cat\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"sex"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"race\_ethnicity"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"location"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"encounter\_type"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{numeric\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"age\_at\_encounter"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"curr\_bmi"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"temp\_new"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"sbp"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"dbp"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"hr"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"sodium"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"serum\_cr"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"serum\_hco3"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"serum\_cl"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"serum\_lac"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"serum\_k"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"wbc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"plt"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"serum\_phos"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"serum\_ca"}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{co2\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_o2sat"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{covars\_gbm }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"age\_at\_encounter"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"sex"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"race\_ethnicity"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"curr\_bmi"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"copd"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"asthma"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"osa"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"chf"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"acute\_nmd"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"phtn"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"ckd"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"dm"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"location"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"encounter\_type"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"temp\_new"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"sbp"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"dbp"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"hr"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"sodium"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"serum\_cr"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"serum\_hco3"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"serum\_cl"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"serum\_lac"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"serum\_k"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"wbc"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"plt"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"serum\_phos"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"serum\_ca"}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{covars\_gbm }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(covars\_gbm, drop\_vars\_ultra\_missing)}
\NormalTok{covars\_ps }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ covars\_gbm}

\CommentTok{\# Core adjustment set for conditional prognostic models}
\NormalTok{adj\_core }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"age\_at\_encounter"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"sex"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"race\_ethnicity"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"location"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"encounter\_type"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{gbm\_params }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{n.trees           =} \DecValTok{800}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{interaction.depth =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{shrinkage         =} \FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{bag.fraction      =} \FloatTok{0.8}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n.minobsinnode    =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{cv.folds          =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{stop.method       =} \StringTok{"smd.max"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{n.cores           =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(gbm\_params}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{stop.method }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"smd.max"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{SPLINE\_BASIS }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"ns"}
\NormalTok{SPLINE\_DF }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{L}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(SPLINE\_BASIS }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ns"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"rcs"}\NormalTok{))}
\CommentTok{\# helper: cap GBM parallelism on large renders so pilot/full runs stay within a}
\CommentTok{\# conservative memory budget.}
\NormalTok{get\_gbm\_cores }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{() \{}
\NormalTok{  n\_rows }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(subset\_data)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(n\_rows) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&}\NormalTok{ n\_rows }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{200000}\NormalTok{L) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L)}
\NormalTok{  gbm\_params}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{n.cores}
\NormalTok{\}}
\NormalTok{ps\_trunc\_quantile }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{0.01}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(ps\_trunc\_quantile }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, ps\_trunc\_quantile }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{formula\_abg      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{reformulate}\NormalTok{(covars\_gbm, }\AttributeTok{response =} \StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{formula\_vbg      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{reformulate}\NormalTok{(covars\_gbm, }\AttributeTok{response =} \StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Model diagrams: propensity models (GBM PS)}
\FunctionTok{register\_model\_diagram}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"PS model: ABG test (GBM)"}\NormalTok{, formula\_abg, }\AttributeTok{width =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{7}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{register\_model\_diagram}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"PS model: VBG test (GBM)"}\NormalTok{, formula\_vbg, }\AttributeTok{width =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{7}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# }\AlertTok{TODO}\CommentTok{: consider stop.method = "es.mean" (ATS version) if smd.max remains unstable on full N.}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: build subset data.}
\CommentTok{\# Start from the complete extracted dataset.}
\NormalTok{subset\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ stata\_data}

\CommentTok{\# In pilot mode, sample a reproducible fraction for faster iteration.}
\CommentTok{\# In full mode, PILOT\_FRAC should be 1 and no sampling is applied.}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (IS\_PILOT) \{}
  \FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(SAMPLE\_SEED)}
\NormalTok{  subset\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{sample\_frac}\NormalTok{(stata\_data, }\AttributeTok{size =}\NormalTok{ PILOT\_FRAC)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\NormalTok{sampled\_n }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(subset\_data)}

\CommentTok{\# Emit and persist row counts so each render is auditable.}
\FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"DATA: full\_n="}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(stata\_data), }\StringTok{" | sampled\_n="}\NormalTok{, sampled\_n)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{IS\_PILOT }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&}\NormalTok{ PILOT\_FRAC }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"RUN\_MODE=\textquotesingle{}full\textquotesingle{} but PILOT\_FRAC \textless{} 1. Set pilot\_frac=1 or run\_mode=\textquotesingle{}pilot\textquotesingle{}."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# Remove encounters with legacy code 1 before encounter{-}type normalization.}
\NormalTok{subset\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(encounter\_type }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{subset\_n }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(subset\_data)}

\FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"DATA: analysis\_subset\_n="}\NormalTok{, subset\_n)}

\NormalTok{run\_rowcounts }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{run\_id =}\NormalTok{ diag\_run\_id,}
  \AttributeTok{run\_ts =}\NormalTok{ diag\_run\_ts,}
  \AttributeTok{run\_mode =}\NormalTok{ RUN\_MODE,}
  \AttributeTok{pilot\_frac =}\NormalTok{ PILOT\_FRAC,}
  \AttributeTok{full\_n =} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(stata\_data),}
  \AttributeTok{sampled\_n =}\NormalTok{ sampled\_n,}
  \AttributeTok{subset\_n =}\NormalTok{ subset\_n,}
  \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(run\_rowcounts, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"run\_rowcounts.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Normalize once early and reuse everywhere}

\CommentTok{\# Keep raw copy for missingness reporting}
\NormalTok{subset\_data\_raw }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data}
\NormalTok{encounter\_type\_raw }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data\_raw}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{encounter\_type}

\CommentTok{\# helper: coerce mixed binary encodings onto an explicit \{0,1,NA\} integer scale}
\CommentTok{\# before factors and models are built.}
\NormalTok{to01 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# Convert mixed encodings (logical/factor/character/numeric labels)}
  \CommentTok{\# to a strict integer indicator in \{0, 1, NA\}.}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{inherits}\NormalTok{(x, }\StringTok{"haven\_labelled"}\NormalTok{)) x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unclass}\NormalTok{(x)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.logical}\NormalTok{(x)) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(x))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.factor}\NormalTok{(x))  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(x)}
\NormalTok{  out }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(x))}
\NormalTok{  xs  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(x))}
\NormalTok{  is\_num }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(xs)}
\NormalTok{  out[is\_num }\SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ xs }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(xs[is\_num }\SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ xs }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)])}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{is\_num)) \{}
\NormalTok{    idx }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{which}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{is\_num)}
\NormalTok{    s }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{trimws}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{tolower}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(x[idx])))}
    \CommentTok{\# Explicit text mappings used in this project.}
    \CommentTok{\# We support both binary labels and testing{-}status labels.}
\NormalTok{    out[idx[s }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"0"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"no"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"false"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"female"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"f"}\NormalTok{)]] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{    out[idx[s }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"1"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"yes"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"true"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"male"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"m"}\NormalTok{)]]   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{    out[idx[s }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"no test"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"not tested"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"untested"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"control"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"absent"}\NormalTok{)]] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{    out[idx[s }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"test"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"tested"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"treated"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"present"}\NormalTok{)]] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  out}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: harmonize encounter{-}type source values onto the canonical}
\CommentTok{\# Emergency/Inpatient factor used throughout the notebook.}
\NormalTok{normalize\_encounter\_type }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# Harmonize encounter type across numeric codes and free{-}text variants.}
  \CommentTok{\# Output is the canonical factor used in all models/tables:}
  \CommentTok{\# Emergency / Inpatient.}
\NormalTok{  s\_chr }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{trimws}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{tolower}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(x)))}
\NormalTok{  num\_from\_text }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"[\^{}0{-}9]+"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{""}\NormalTok{, s\_chr)))}
\NormalTok{  lab }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\ConstantTok{NA\_character\_}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(s\_chr))}
\NormalTok{  lab[}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(num\_from\_text) }\SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ num\_from\_text }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"Emergency"}
\NormalTok{  lab[}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(num\_from\_text) }\SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ num\_from\_text }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"Inpatient"}
\NormalTok{  is\_na }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(lab)}
\NormalTok{  is\_em }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{bemerg(?:ency)?}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{b"}\NormalTok{, s\_chr) }\SpecialCharTok{|}
           \FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"(\^{}|[\^{}a{-}z])ed([\^{}a{-}z]|$)"}\NormalTok{, s\_chr) }\SpecialCharTok{|}
           \FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{ba\&e}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{b"}\NormalTok{, s\_chr) }\SpecialCharTok{|}
           \FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{bemergency}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s+dept}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{b"}\NormalTok{, s\_chr)}
\NormalTok{  is\_ip }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{binpatient}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{b"}\NormalTok{, s\_chr) }\SpecialCharTok{|}
           \FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{binpt}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{b"}\NormalTok{,     s\_chr) }\SpecialCharTok{|}
           \FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{binpat}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{b"}\NormalTok{,    s\_chr) }\SpecialCharTok{|}
           \FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"(\^{}|[\^{}a{-}z])ip([\^{}a{-}z]|$)"}\NormalTok{, s\_chr)}
\NormalTok{  lab[is\_na }\SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ is\_em] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"Emergency"}
\NormalTok{  lab[is\_na }\SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ is\_ip] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"Inpatient"}
  \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(lab, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Emergency"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Inpatient"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: robustly coerce labelled/factor/character inputs to numeric while}
\CommentTok{\# stripping non{-}numeric symbols that appear in imported EHR fields.}
\NormalTok{coerce\_num }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# Robust numeric coercion for labelled/factor/character inputs.}
  \CommentTok{\# Non{-}numeric symbols are stripped to avoid parse failures.}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{inherits}\NormalTok{(x, }\StringTok{"haven\_labelled"}\NormalTok{)) x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unclass}\NormalTok{(x)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.factor}\NormalTok{(x)) x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(x)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.character}\NormalTok{(x)) x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"[\^{}0{-}9.+{-}]"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{""}\NormalTok{, x)}
  \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(x))}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# Reference factor levels are captured once from source data.}
\CommentTok{\# We then reuse them to keep category ordering stable across stages.}
\NormalTok{levels\_ref }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{sex =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Female"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Male"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{race\_ethnicity =} \FunctionTok{levels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(stata\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{race\_ethnicity)),}
  \AttributeTok{location =} \FunctionTok{levels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(stata\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{location)),}
  \AttributeTok{encounter\_type =} \FunctionTok{levels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{normalize\_encounter\_type}\NormalTok{(stata\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{encounter\_type))}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# helper: perform the one{-}time global type normalization that the rest of the}
\CommentTok{\# notebook assumes, while preserving row count.}
\NormalTok{normalize\_types }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(df, }\AttributeTok{levels\_ref =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# 1) Drop variables intentionally excluded due to extreme missingness.}
\NormalTok{  df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ df[, }\FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(df), drop\_vars\_ultra\_missing), drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}

  \CommentTok{\# 2) Coerce core numeric/lab/gas variables to numeric once.}
\NormalTok{  num\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(numeric\_vars, co2\_vars), }\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(df))}
  \ControlFlowTok{for}\NormalTok{ (nm }\ControlFlowTok{in}\NormalTok{ num\_vars) df[[nm]] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{coerce\_num}\NormalTok{(df[[nm]])}

  \CommentTok{\# 3) Force sex to the canonical binary factor.}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"sex"} \SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(df))}
\NormalTok{  df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sex }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{to01}\NormalTok{(df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sex), }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L), }\AttributeTok{labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Female"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Male"}\NormalTok{))}

  \CommentTok{\# 4) Normalize encounter type into Emergency/Inpatient.}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"encounter\_type"} \SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(df))}
\NormalTok{  df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{encounter\_type }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{normalize\_encounter\_type}\NormalTok{(df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{encounter\_type)}

\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: detect machine{-}local execution resources without changing analysis outputs.}
\NormalTok{parse\_positive\_int\_env }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(env\_name) \{}
\NormalTok{  raw\_val }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{trimws}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{Sys.getenv}\NormalTok{(env\_name, }\AttributeTok{unset =} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{nzchar}\NormalTok{(raw\_val)) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  parsed\_val }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(raw\_val))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(parsed\_val) }\SpecialCharTok{||}\NormalTok{ parsed\_val }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}=} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L) \{}
    \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(env\_name, }\StringTok{" must be a positive integer when set; got: \textquotesingle{}"}\NormalTok{, raw\_val, }\StringTok{"\textquotesingle{}."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  parsed\_val}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{detect\_physical\_ram\_gb }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{default\_gb =} \DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{L) \{}

    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{value =}\NormalTok{ override\_val, }\AttributeTok{source =} \StringTok{"env:ABGVBG\_MI\_RAM\_GB"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  sys\_name }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{Sys.info}\NormalTok{()[[}\StringTok{"sysname"}\NormalTok{]]}
\NormalTok{  ram\_bytes }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{identical}\NormalTok{(sys\_name, }\StringTok{"Darwin"}\NormalTok{)) \{}
\NormalTok{    sysctl\_out }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}
      \FunctionTok{system2}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"sysctl"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"{-}n"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"hw.memsize"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{stdout =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{stderr =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) }\FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{    )}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(sysctl\_out) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L) ram\_bytes }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(sysctl\_out[[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L]]))}
\NormalTok{  \} }\ControlFlowTok{else} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{identical}\NormalTok{(sys\_name, }\StringTok{"Linux"}\NormalTok{)) \{}
\NormalTok{    meminfo\_path }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"/proc/meminfo"}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(meminfo\_path)) \{}
\NormalTok{      meminfo\_line }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readLines}\NormalTok{(meminfo\_path, }\AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L, }\AttributeTok{warn =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      ram\_kb }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"[\^{}0{-}9]"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{""}\NormalTok{, meminfo\_line)))}
      \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(ram\_kb)) ram\_bytes }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ram\_kb }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{1024}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  \}}

  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(ram\_bytes) }\SpecialCharTok{||}\NormalTok{ ram\_bytes }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}=} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) \{}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{value =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(default\_gb), }\AttributeTok{source =} \StringTok{"default"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  ram\_gb }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L, }\FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{floor}\NormalTok{(ram\_bytes }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (}\DecValTok{1024}\SpecialCharTok{\^{}}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{))))}
  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{value =}\NormalTok{ ram\_gb, }\AttributeTok{source =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"auto:"}\NormalTok{, sys\_name))}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{choose\_mi\_batch\_start }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(ram\_gb) \{}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(ram\_gb) }\SpecialCharTok{||}\NormalTok{ ram\_gb }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}=} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) }\FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ram\_gb must be a positive finite value."}\NormalTok{)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (ram\_gb }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}=} \DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{L) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (ram\_gb }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}=} \DecValTok{16}\NormalTok{L) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L)}
  \DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{mi\_ram\_info }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{detect\_physical\_ram\_gb}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{default\_gb =} \DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{L)}
\NormalTok{MI\_RAM\_GB }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ mi\_ram\_info}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{value}
\NormalTok{MI\_RAM\_GB\_SOURCE }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ mi\_ram\_info}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{source}
\NormalTok{MI\_BATCH\_START\_OVERRIDE }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{parse\_positive\_int\_env}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ABGVBG\_MI\_BATCH\_START"}\NormalTok{)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(MI\_BATCH\_START\_OVERRIDE)) \{}
\NormalTok{  MI\_BATCH\_START }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ MI\_BATCH\_START\_OVERRIDE}
\NormalTok{  MI\_BATCH\_START\_SOURCE }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"env:ABGVBG\_MI\_BATCH\_START"}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{  MI\_BATCH\_START }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{choose\_mi\_batch\_start}\NormalTok{(MI\_RAM\_GB)}
\NormalTok{  MI\_BATCH\_START\_SOURCE }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"auto:"}\NormalTok{, MI\_RAM\_GB\_SOURCE)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\CommentTok{\# Write run config JSON for portability}
\NormalTok{json\_escape }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) }\FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{, x)}
\NormalTok{run\_cfg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{run\_id =}\NormalTok{ diag\_run\_id,}
  \AttributeTok{run\_mode =}\NormalTok{ RUN\_MODE,}
  \AttributeTok{pilot\_frac =}\NormalTok{ PILOT\_FRAC,}
  \AttributeTok{mi\_ram\_gb =}\NormalTok{ MI\_RAM\_GB,}
  \AttributeTok{mi\_ram\_gb\_source =}\NormalTok{ MI\_RAM\_GB\_SOURCE,}
  \AttributeTok{mi\_batch\_threshold =}\NormalTok{ MI\_BATCH\_THRESHOLD,}

  \AttributeTok{sampled\_n =}\NormalTok{ sampled\_n,}
  \AttributeTok{subset\_n =} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(subset\_data)}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{json\_lines }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"\{"}\NormalTok{,}
  \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"  }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{run\_id}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{: }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{json\_escape}\NormalTok{(run\_cfg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{run\_id), }\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{,"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"  }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{run\_mode}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{: }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{json\_escape}\NormalTok{(run\_cfg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{run\_mode), }\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{,"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"  }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{pilot\_frac}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{: "}\NormalTok{, run\_cfg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pilot\_frac, }\StringTok{","}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"  }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{mi\_ram\_gb}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{: "}\NormalTok{, run\_cfg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{mi\_ram\_gb, }\StringTok{","}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"  }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{mi\_ram\_gb\_source}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{: }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{json\_escape}\NormalTok{(run\_cfg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{mi\_ram\_gb\_source), }\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{,"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"  }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{mi\_batch\_threshold}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{: "}\NormalTok{, run\_cfg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{mi\_batch\_threshold, }\StringTok{","}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"  }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{mi\_batch\_start}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{: "}\NormalTok{, run\_cfg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{mi\_batch\_start, }\StringTok{","}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"  }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{mi\_batch\_start\_source}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{: }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{json\_escape}\NormalTok{(run\_cfg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{mi\_batch\_start\_source), }\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{,"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"  }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{data\_dir}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{: }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{json\_escape}\NormalTok{(run\_cfg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{data\_dir), }\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{,"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"  }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{results\_dir}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{: }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{json\_escape}\NormalTok{(run\_cfg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{results\_dir), }\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{,"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"  }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{full\_n}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{: "}\NormalTok{, run\_cfg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{full\_n, }\StringTok{","}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"  }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{sampled\_n}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{: "}\NormalTok{, run\_cfg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sampled\_n, }\StringTok{","}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"  }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{subset\_n}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{: "}\NormalTok{, run\_cfg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{subset\_n),}
  \StringTok{"\}"}
\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{writeLines}\NormalTok{(json\_lines, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"run\_config.json"}\NormalTok{))}

Codebook artifact path: Results/codebookr.docx. Generation is skipped in
pilot mode to keep notebook validation renders fast.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: codebook export full.}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{identical}\NormalTok{(RUN\_MODE, }\StringTok{"pilot"}\NormalTok{)) \{}
  \FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Skipping codebookr.docx generation in pilot mode."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{  study\_codebook }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ codebookr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{codebook}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    stata\_data,}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Full TrinetX"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \StringTok{"Dataset Documentation"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{description =} \StringTok{"This dataset contains patient{-}level records from the TrinetX database. }
\StringTok{                   It has been processed and converted from the original Stata file."}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{  codebook\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"codebookr.docx"}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(study\_codebook, codebook\_file)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsubsection{Outcome Variable
Creation}\label{outcome-variable-creation}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: derive death 60d.}
\NormalTok{subset\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \DocumentationTok{\#\# 1. Did the patient die?}
    \AttributeTok{died =} \FunctionTok{if\_else}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(death\_date), }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L, }\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L),}

    \DocumentationTok{\#\# 2. Absolute death date (if death\_date is an offset)}
    \AttributeTok{death\_abs =} \FunctionTok{if\_else}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(death\_date),}
\NormalTok{                        encounter\_date }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ death\_date,}
                        \FunctionTok{as.Date}\NormalTok{(}\ConstantTok{NA}\NormalTok{)),}

    \DocumentationTok{\#\# 3. Year month (YM) for encounter and death}
    \AttributeTok{enc\_ym   =} \FunctionTok{floor\_date}\NormalTok{(encounter\_date, }\AttributeTok{unit =} \StringTok{"month"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{death\_ym =} \FunctionTok{floor\_date}\NormalTok{(death\_abs      , }\AttributeTok{unit =} \StringTok{"month"}\NormalTok{),}

    \DocumentationTok{\#\# 4. Reference censoring date: 1 Jun 2024}
    \AttributeTok{ref\_ym =} \FunctionTok{ymd}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"2024{-}06{-}01"}\NormalTok{),}

    \DocumentationTok{\#\# 5. Months from encounter to death or censoring}
    \AttributeTok{months\_death\_or\_cens =} \FunctionTok{case\_when}\NormalTok{(}
      \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(death\_ym) }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \FunctionTok{interval}\NormalTok{(enc\_ym, death\_ym) }\SpecialCharTok{\%/\%} \FunctionTok{months}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}
      \ConstantTok{TRUE}             \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \FunctionTok{interval}\NormalTok{(enc\_ym, ref\_ym)   }\SpecialCharTok{\%/\%} \FunctionTok{months}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    ),}

    \DocumentationTok{\#\# 6. Remove impossible values}
    \AttributeTok{months\_death\_or\_cens =} \FunctionTok{if\_else}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      months\_death\_or\_cens }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \DecValTok{0} \SpecialCharTok{|}\NormalTok{ months\_death\_or\_cens }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{16}\NormalTok{,}
      \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}\NormalTok{, months\_death\_or\_cens}
\NormalTok{    ),}

    \DocumentationTok{\#\# 7. Death within one or two months}
    \AttributeTok{died\_1mo =} \FunctionTok{if\_else}\NormalTok{(died }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ months\_death\_or\_cens }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}  \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L, }\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L),}
    \AttributeTok{died\_2mo =} \FunctionTok{if\_else}\NormalTok{(died }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ months\_death\_or\_cens }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}=} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L, }\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L),}

    \DocumentationTok{\#\# 8. Month of death (missing if censored)}
    \AttributeTok{death\_time =} \FunctionTok{if\_else}\NormalTok{(died }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, months\_death\_or\_cens, }\ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}\NormalTok{),}

    \DocumentationTok{\#\# 9. Death within 60 days (new variable)}
    \AttributeTok{death\_60d =} \FunctionTok{if\_else}\NormalTok{(died }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ death\_abs }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}=}\NormalTok{ (encounter\_date }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{days}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{60}\NormalTok{)), }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L, }\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L)}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{enc\_ym, }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{death\_ym)}

\NormalTok{subset\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{death\_60d =} \FunctionTok{if\_else}\NormalTok{(died }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ death\_abs }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}=}\NormalTok{ (encounter\_date }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{days}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{60}\NormalTok{)), }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L, }\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L)}
\NormalTok{  )}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}
