\subsection{Baseline tables}\label{baseline-tables}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Robust derivation of analysis variables + helper for Table 1 production}
\CommentTok{\# {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: label binary 0/1 → "No"/"Yes"}
\NormalTok{bin\_lab }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) \{}
\NormalTok{  y }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{to01}\NormalTok{(x)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(y))) \{}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(y, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"No"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Yes"}\NormalTok{)))}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(y, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"No"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Yes"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: preserve labeled factors if already present; otherwise map numeric codes}
\NormalTok{label\_from\_codes }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x, codes, labels) \{}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.factor}\NormalTok{(x)) \{}
\NormalTok{    lev }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{levels}\NormalTok{(x)}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(lev }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%}\NormalTok{ labels)) \{}
      \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(x, }\AttributeTok{levels =}\NormalTok{ labels))}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{    lev\_num }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(lev))}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(lev\_num)) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(lev\_num }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%}\NormalTok{ codes)) \{}
      \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(x)), }\AttributeTok{levels =}\NormalTok{ codes, }\AttributeTok{labels =}\NormalTok{ labels))}
\NormalTok{    \}}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(x)}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  x\_num }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(x)))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(x\_num))) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(x, }\AttributeTok{levels =}\NormalTok{ labels))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(x\_num }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%}\NormalTok{ codes, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(x\_num, }\AttributeTok{levels =}\NormalTok{ codes, }\AttributeTok{labels =}\NormalTok{ labels))}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(x)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{subset\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \DocumentationTok{\#\# ensure 0/1 numerics (avoids factor‑level coercion)}
    \FunctionTok{across}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(has\_abg, has\_vbg),}
           \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \FunctionTok{to01}\NormalTok{(.)),}
    
    \DocumentationTok{\#\# derive ABG / VBG status groups (binary test status only)}
    \AttributeTok{abg\_group =} \FunctionTok{case\_when}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      has\_abg }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"No ABG"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      has\_abg }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{,}
      \ConstantTok{TRUE}         \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Missing"}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{vbg\_group =} \FunctionTok{case\_when}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      has\_vbg }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"No VBG"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      has\_vbg }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{,}
      \ConstantTok{TRUE}         \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Missing"}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    
    \DocumentationTok{\#\# factorise groups with explicit NA/Missing level}
    \AttributeTok{abg\_group =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      abg\_group,}
      \AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"No ABG"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Missing"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{vbg\_group =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      vbg\_group,}
      \AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"No VBG"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Missing"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    
    \DocumentationTok{\#\# labelled covariates (robust to factor or numeric codes)}
    \AttributeTok{sex\_label =} \FunctionTok{label\_from\_codes}\NormalTok{(sex, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Female"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Male"}\NormalTok{)),}
    \AttributeTok{race\_ethnicity\_label =} \FunctionTok{label\_from\_codes}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      race\_ethnicity,}
      \DecValTok{0}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{,}
      \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"White"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Black or African American"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Hispanic"}\NormalTok{,}
        \StringTok{"Asian"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"American Indian"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Pacific Islander"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Unknown"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{location\_label =} \FunctionTok{label\_from\_codes}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      location,}
      \DecValTok{0}\SpecialCharTok{:}\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}
      \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"South"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Northeast"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Midwest"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"West"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{encounter\_type\_label =} \FunctionTok{label\_from\_codes}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      encounter\_type,}
      \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{),}
      \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Emergency"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Inpatient"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{osa\_label      =} \FunctionTok{bin\_lab}\NormalTok{(osa),}
    \AttributeTok{asthma\_label   =} \FunctionTok{bin\_lab}\NormalTok{(asthma),}
    \AttributeTok{copd\_label     =} \FunctionTok{bin\_lab}\NormalTok{(copd),}
    \AttributeTok{chf\_label      =} \FunctionTok{bin\_lab}\NormalTok{(chf),}
    \AttributeTok{nmd\_label      =} \FunctionTok{bin\_lab}\NormalTok{(nmd),}
    \AttributeTok{phtn\_label     =} \FunctionTok{bin\_lab}\NormalTok{(phtn),}
    \AttributeTok{ckd\_label      =} \FunctionTok{bin\_lab}\NormalTok{(ckd),}
    \AttributeTok{diabetes\_label =} \FunctionTok{bin\_lab}\NormalTok{(dm)}
\NormalTok{  )}

\CommentTok{\# variables to summarise}
\NormalTok{vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"age\_at\_encounter"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"curr\_bmi"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"sex\_label"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"race\_ethnicity\_label"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"location\_label"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"osa\_label"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"asthma\_label"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"copd\_label"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"chf\_label"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"nmd\_label"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"phtn\_label"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ckd\_label"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"diabetes\_label"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"encounter\_type\_label"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{vars\_baseline }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(vars, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{vars\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(vars\_baseline, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{vars\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(vars\_baseline, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Table 1 constructor}
\NormalTok{make\_table1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(data, group\_var, }\AttributeTok{caption =} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  group\_sym }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ rlang}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{sym}\NormalTok{(group\_var)}

\NormalTok{  df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!!}\NormalTok{group\_sym),                   }\CommentTok{\# drop explicit NA}
           \SpecialCharTok{!!}\NormalTok{group\_sym }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \StringTok{"Missing"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}          \CommentTok{\# drop “Missing” cohort}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!!}\AttributeTok{group\_sym :=} \FunctionTok{droplevels}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!!}\NormalTok{group\_sym)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}  \CommentTok{\# only drop group levels}
    \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(group\_var, vars\_baseline)))}

\NormalTok{  empty\_fac }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{which}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(df, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(z) }\FunctionTok{is.factor}\NormalTok{(z) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{levels}\NormalTok{(z)) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L, }\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(empty\_fac) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) \{}
    \FunctionTok{warning}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"0{-}level factor columns detected: "}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(empty\_fac, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{),}
            \StringTok{". Converting to character to prevent gtsummary failure."}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{call. =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    df[empty\_fac] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(df[empty\_fac], as.character)}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  df }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tbl\_summary}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{by   =} \SpecialCharTok{!!}\NormalTok{group\_sym,}
    \AttributeTok{statistic =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{all\_continuous}\NormalTok{()  }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"\{mean\} ± \{sd\}; \{N\_miss\}/\{N\_obs\} missing (\{p\_miss\}\%)"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{all\_categorical}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"\{n\} (\{p\}\%)"}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{digits  =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{all\_continuous}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{missing =} \StringTok{"no"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{label =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      age\_at\_encounter     }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Age"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      curr\_bmi             }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"BMI"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      sex\_label            }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Sex"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      race\_ethnicity\_label }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Race/Ethnicity"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      location\_label       }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Location"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      osa\_label            }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"OSA"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      asthma\_label         }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Asthma"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      copd\_label           }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"COPD"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      chf\_label            }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"CHF"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      nmd\_label            }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"NMD"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      phtn\_label           }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"PHTN"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      ckd\_label            }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"CKD"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      diabetes\_label       }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Diabetes"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      encounter\_type\_label }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Encounter Type"}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{add\_overall}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{last =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{modify\_header}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{label =} \StringTok{"Variable"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{modify\_caption}\NormalTok{(caption)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sex\_label)) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L }\SpecialCharTok{||} \FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{levels}\NormalTok{(subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sex\_label)) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L) \{}
  \FunctionTok{warning}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"sex\_label is all NA or has zero levels; check sex normalization/mapping."}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{call. =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"sex"} \SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(subset\_data))}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# build tables}
\NormalTok{table1A }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{make\_table1}\NormalTok{(subset\_data, }\StringTok{"abg\_group"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{caption =} \StringTok{"Table 1A: ABG cohorts"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{table1B }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{make\_table1}\NormalTok{(subset\_data, }\StringTok{"vbg\_group"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{caption =} \StringTok{"Table 1B: VBG cohorts"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{tbl1a\_pdf }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{to\_pdf\_table}\NormalTok{(table1A, }\AttributeTok{font\_size =} \DecValTok{7}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{landscape =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{label\_col\_width =} \StringTok{"2.0in"}\NormalTok{,}
                          \AttributeTok{longtable =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{tbl1b\_pdf }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{to\_pdf\_table}\NormalTok{(table1B, }\AttributeTok{font\_size =} \DecValTok{7}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{landscape =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{label\_col\_width =} \StringTok{"2.0in"}\NormalTok{,}
                          \AttributeTok{longtable =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{tbl1a\_pdf}
\end{Highlighting}

\CommentTok{\# Status factors (column labels are taken from factor levels)}
\NormalTok{subset\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{abg\_status =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(has\_abg, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}
                        \AttributeTok{labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Did not get ABG"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Did get ABG"}\NormalTok{)),}
    \AttributeTok{vbg\_status =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(has\_vbg, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}
                        \AttributeTok{labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Did not get VBG"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Did get VBG"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  )}

\CommentTok{\# ABG table with "Everyone" column first}
\NormalTok{tbl1\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(vars\_baseline), abg\_status) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tbl\_summary}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{by =}\NormalTok{ abg\_status,}
    \AttributeTok{statistic =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{all\_continuous}\NormalTok{()  }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"\{mean\} ± \{sd\}; \{N\_miss\}/\{N\_obs\} missing (\{p\_miss\}\%)"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{all\_categorical}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"\{n\} (\{p\}\%)"}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{digits  =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{all\_continuous}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{missing =} \StringTok{"no"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{label =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      age\_at\_encounter     }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Age"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      curr\_bmi             }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"BMI"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      sex\_label            }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Sex"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      race\_ethnicity\_label }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Race/Ethnicity"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      location\_label       }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Location"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      osa\_label            }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"OSA"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      asthma\_label         }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Asthma"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      copd\_label           }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"COPD"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      chf\_label            }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"CHF"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      nmd\_label            }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"NMD"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      phtn\_label           }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"PHTN"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      ckd\_label            }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"CKD"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      diabetes\_label       }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Diabetes"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      encounter\_type\_label }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Encounter Type"}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{add\_overall}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{last =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{col\_label =} \StringTok{"Everyone"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bold\_labels}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{modify\_header}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{label =} \StringTok{"**Variable**"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# VBG table with "Everyone" column first}
\NormalTok{tbl1\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(vars\_baseline), vbg\_status) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tbl\_summary}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{by =}\NormalTok{ vbg\_status,}
    \AttributeTok{statistic =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{all\_continuous}\NormalTok{()  }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"\{mean\} ± \{sd\}; \{N\_miss\}/\{N\_obs\} missing (\{p\_miss\}\%)"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{all\_categorical}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"\{n\} (\{p\}\%)"}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{digits  =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{all\_continuous}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{missing =} \StringTok{"no"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{label =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      age\_at\_encounter     }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Age"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      curr\_bmi             }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"BMI"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      sex\_label            }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Sex"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      race\_ethnicity\_label }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Race/Ethnicity"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      location\_label       }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Location"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      osa\_label            }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"OSA"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      asthma\_label         }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Asthma"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      copd\_label           }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"COPD"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      chf\_label            }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"CHF"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      nmd\_label            }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"NMD"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      phtn\_label           }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"PHTN"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      ckd\_label            }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"CKD"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      diabetes\_label       }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Diabetes"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      encounter\_type\_label }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Encounter Type"}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{add\_overall}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{last =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{col\_label =} \StringTok{"Everyone"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bold\_labels}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}

\NormalTok{tbl1\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tbl1\_abg }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{modify\_caption}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{strip\_manual\_table\_number}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"**Table 1A. Baseline summary: Everyone and ABG status**"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{tbl1\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tbl1\_vbg }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}

\CommentTok{\# merged table for Word export (Table 1: Everyone + ABG/VBG status)}
\NormalTok{tbl1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tbl\_merge}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(tbl1\_abg, tbl1\_vbg),}
  \AttributeTok{tab\_spanner =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"**ABG status**"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"**VBG status**"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Export machine{-}readable Table 1 artifacts from the same gtsummary objects}
\CommentTok{\# used for manuscript rendering, so the notebook remains the single source}
\CommentTok{\# of truth for final table outputs.}
\CommentTok{\# gtsummary is convenient for display, but manuscript drafting and QA also need}
\CommentTok{\# a plain rectangular file. We therefore reconstruct the displayed statistics}
\CommentTok{\# from the hidden gtsummary body/header objects and align the ABG/VBG panels on}
\CommentTok{\# their shared row structure before exporting a combined CSV/PDF version.}
\NormalTok{clean\_gts\_text }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) \{}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(x)}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{*}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{*"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{""}\NormalTok{, x)}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s*\textless{}br}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s*/?\textgreater{}}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s*"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{" "}\NormalTok{, x, }\AttributeTok{perl =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s*}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{n}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s*"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{" "}\NormalTok{, x, }\AttributeTok{perl =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{trimws}\NormalTok{(x)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: reconstruct a rectangular export table from one gtsummary object so}
\CommentTok{\# manuscript tables can be audited outside the PDF.}
\NormalTok{extract\_tbl\_summary\_csv }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(tbl, panel\_name) \{}
\NormalTok{  body }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{table\_body }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{any\_of}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"variable"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"var\_type"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"row\_type"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"var\_label"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"label"}\NormalTok{)),}
\NormalTok{      dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{starts\_with}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"stat\_"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{row\_id =}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{row\_number}\NormalTok{())}

\NormalTok{  header\_map }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{table\_styling}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{header }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\^{}stat\_"}\NormalTok{, .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{column)) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{transmute}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{column =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{column,}
      \AttributeTok{group\_label =} \FunctionTok{clean\_gts\_text}\NormalTok{(.data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{label)}
\NormalTok{    )}

\NormalTok{  body }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    tidyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{pivot\_longer}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{cols =}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{starts\_with}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"stat\_"}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{names\_to =} \StringTok{"column"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{values\_to =} \StringTok{"stat"}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{left\_join}\NormalTok{(header\_map, }\AttributeTok{by =} \StringTok{"column"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{panel =}\NormalTok{ panel\_name,}
      \AttributeTok{var\_label =} \FunctionTok{clean\_gts\_text}\NormalTok{(.data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{var\_label),}
      \AttributeTok{label =} \FunctionTok{clean\_gts\_text}\NormalTok{(.data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{label)}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{row\_id, .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{panel, .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{variable, .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{var\_type,}
\NormalTok{      .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{row\_type, .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{var\_label, .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{label,}
\NormalTok{      .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{group\_label, .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{stat}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    tidyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{pivot\_wider}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{names\_from =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{group\_label, }\AttributeTok{values\_from =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{stat) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(.data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{row\_id)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{tbl1\_abg\_csv }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{extract\_tbl\_summary\_csv}\NormalTok{(tbl1\_abg, }\StringTok{"ABG status"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{tbl1\_vbg\_csv }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{extract\_tbl\_summary\_csv}\NormalTok{(tbl1\_vbg, }\StringTok{"VBG status"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{table1\_key\_cols }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"row\_id"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"variable"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"var\_type"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"row\_type"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"var\_label"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"label"}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{identical}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  tbl1\_abg\_csv[, table1\_key\_cols, }\AttributeTok{drop =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{],}
\NormalTok{  tbl1\_vbg\_csv[, table1\_key\_cols, }\AttributeTok{drop =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{))}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{identical}\NormalTok{(tbl1\_abg\_csv}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Everyone, tbl1\_vbg\_csv}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Everyone))}

\NormalTok{abg\_group\_cols }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(tbl1\_abg\_csv), }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(table1\_key\_cols, }\StringTok{"panel"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Everyone"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{vbg\_group\_cols }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(tbl1\_vbg\_csv), }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(table1\_key\_cols, }\StringTok{"panel"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Everyone"}\NormalTok{))}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(abg\_group\_cols) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L, }\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(vbg\_group\_cols) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L)}

\NormalTok{tbl1\_combined\_internal }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tbl1\_abg\_csv }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{row\_id, .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{panel, .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{variable, .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{var\_type, .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{row\_type,}
\NormalTok{    .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{var\_label, .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{label, .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Everyone, dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(abg\_group\_cols)}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{left\_join}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    tbl1\_vbg\_csv }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{      dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(.data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{row\_id, dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(vbg\_group\_cols)),}
    \AttributeTok{by =} \StringTok{"row\_id"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{.data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{row\_id)}

\NormalTok{tbl1\_combined\_csv }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tbl1\_combined\_internal }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{transmute}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{Characteristic =}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{if\_else}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{row\_type }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"level"}\NormalTok{,}
      \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"  "}\NormalTok{, .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{label),}
\NormalTok{      .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{label}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{Everyone =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Everyone,}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Did not get ABG}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ .data[[abg\_group\_cols[[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L]]]],}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Did get ABG}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ .data[[abg\_group\_cols[[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L]]]],}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Did not get VBG}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ .data[[vbg\_group\_cols[[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L]]]],}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Did get VBG}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ .data[[vbg\_group\_cols[[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L]]]]}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{across}\NormalTok{(dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{everything}\NormalTok{(), }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{if\_else}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(.x), }\StringTok{""}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(.x))))}

\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(tbl1\_abg\_csv, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"table1\_abg\_status.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(tbl1\_vbg\_csv, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"table1\_vbg\_status.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(tbl1\_combined\_internal, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"table1\_combined\_internal.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(tbl1\_combined\_csv, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"table1\_combined.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}

\FunctionTok{write\_standalone\_table\_pdf}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  tbl1\_combined\_csv,}
  \AttributeTok{caption =} \StringTok{"Baseline characteristics of the analytic cohort overall and by receipt of arterial and venous blood gas testing"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{file\_stub =} \StringTok{"table1\_combined"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{wide =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{digits =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{max\_cols =} \DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{display\_label =} \StringTok{"Table 1"}
\NormalTok{)}

                             \AttributeTok{longtable =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{tbl1\_vbg\_pdf }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{to\_pdf\_table}\NormalTok{(tbl1\_vbg, }\AttributeTok{font\_size =} \DecValTok{7}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{landscape =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{label\_col\_width =} \StringTok{"2.0in"}\NormalTok{,}
                             \AttributeTok{longtable =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: co2 category definitions.}
\NormalTok{ABG\_CO2\_VAR }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"paco2"}
\NormalTok{VBG\_CO2\_VAR }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}
\NormalTok{ABG\_CO2\_LOW }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{35}
\NormalTok{ABG\_CO2\_HIGH }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{45}
\NormalTok{VBG\_CO2\_LOW }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{40}
\NormalTok{VBG\_CO2\_HIGH }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{50}
\NormalTok{CO2\_SPEC }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{ABG =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{var =}\NormalTok{ ABG\_CO2\_VAR, }\AttributeTok{normal\_lo =}\NormalTok{ ABG\_CO2\_LOW, }\AttributeTok{normal\_hi =}\NormalTok{ ABG\_CO2\_HIGH),}
  \AttributeTok{VBG =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{var =}\NormalTok{ VBG\_CO2\_VAR, }\AttributeTok{normal\_lo =}\NormalTok{ VBG\_CO2\_LOW, }\AttributeTok{normal\_hi =}\NormalTok{ VBG\_CO2\_HIGH)}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{CO2\_SPEC}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ABG}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ref }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ (CO2\_SPEC}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ABG}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{normal\_lo }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ CO2\_SPEC}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ABG}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{normal\_hi) }\SpecialCharTok{/} \DecValTok{2}
\NormalTok{CO2\_SPEC}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{VBG}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ref }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ (CO2\_SPEC}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{VBG}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{normal\_lo }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ CO2\_SPEC}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{VBG}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{normal\_hi) }\SpecialCharTok{/} \DecValTok{2}
\CommentTok{\# Reference values for spline OR curves (midpoint of normal range)}
\NormalTok{ABG\_CO2\_REF }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ CO2\_SPEC}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ABG}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ref}
\NormalTok{VBG\_CO2\_REF }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ CO2\_SPEC}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{VBG}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ref}
\NormalTok{CO2\_CAT\_LEVELS }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Normal"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Low"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"High"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{CO2\_CAT\_CONTRAST\_LEVELS }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(CO2\_CAT\_LEVELS, }\StringTok{"Normal"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# helper: bucket a continuous CO2 value into the manuscript\textquotesingle{}s low/normal/high}
\CommentTok{\# three{-}level exposure definition.}
\NormalTok{make\_co2\_cat3 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x, low\_cut, high\_cut) \{}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(x))}
\NormalTok{  out }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{case\_when}\NormalTok{(}
    \FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(x)       }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \ConstantTok{NA\_character\_}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{    x }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\NormalTok{ low\_cut    }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Low"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{    x }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ high\_cut   }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"High"}\NormalTok{,}
    \ConstantTok{TRUE}           \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"Normal"}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(out, }\AttributeTok{levels =}\NormalTok{ CO2\_CAT\_LEVELS)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{subset\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{pco2\_cat\_abg =} \FunctionTok{make\_co2\_cat3}\NormalTok{(.data[[ABG\_CO2\_VAR]], ABG\_CO2\_LOW, ABG\_CO2\_HIGH),}
    \AttributeTok{pco2\_cat\_vbg =} \FunctionTok{make\_co2\_cat3}\NormalTok{(.data[[VBG\_CO2\_VAR]], VBG\_CO2\_LOW, VBG\_CO2\_HIGH)}
\NormalTok{  )}

\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Normal"} \SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{levels}\NormalTok{(subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pco2\_cat\_abg),}
          \StringTok{"Normal"} \SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{levels}\NormalTok{(subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pco2\_cat\_vbg))}

\CommentTok{\# helper: warn when a tested{-}cohort category is sparse enough to make later}
\CommentTok{\# categorical{-}model estimates unstable.}
\NormalTok{warn\_low\_counts }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(cat, label) \{}
\NormalTok{  tab }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{table}\NormalTok{(cat, }\AttributeTok{useNA =} \StringTok{"no"}\NormalTok{)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(tab) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(tab }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{warning}\NormalTok{(label, }\StringTok{": low counts in CO2 categories: "}\NormalTok{,}
            \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(tab), tab, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{call. =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{\}}
\FunctionTok{warn\_low\_counts}\NormalTok{(subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pco2\_cat\_abg[subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_abg }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{\&} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{paco2)],}
                \StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{warn\_low\_counts}\NormalTok{(subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pco2\_cat\_vbg[subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_vbg }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{\&} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{vbg\_co2)],}
                \StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Fail{-}fast if any binary CO2 indicator references remain in this QMD}
\NormalTok{qmd\_path }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{resolve\_current\_qmd}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{txt }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readLines}\NormalTok{(qmd\_path, }\AttributeTok{warn =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{pat\_var }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"hypercap"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"\_on\_"}\NormalTok{)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(pat\_var, txt))) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Binary CO2 indicator variable references remain in the QMD."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# ABG cohort (has\_abg == 1)}
\NormalTok{tbl2\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(has\_abg }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}

\NormalTok{    ),}

\NormalTok{    )}

\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Keep merged object for Word export only.}
\NormalTok{tbl2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tbl\_merge}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{tbls =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(tbl2\_abg, tbl2\_vbg),}
  \AttributeTok{tab\_spanner =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"**ABG (PaCO2)**"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"**VBG (PvCO2)**"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  gtsummary}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{modify\_caption}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{strip\_manual\_table\_number}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"**Table 2. Baseline summary by CO2 category within ABG and VBG cohorts**"}\NormalTok{))}
\end{Highlighting}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: tbl2 outcome panel.}
\NormalTok{outcome\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{outcome\_labels }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{imv\_proc =} \StringTok{"IMV"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{niv\_proc =} \StringTok{"NIV"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{death\_60d =} \StringTok{"Death (60d)"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{hypercap\_resp\_failure =} \StringTok{"Hypercapnic RF"}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{rate\_panel }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  subset\_data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(has\_abg }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(outcome\_vars), pco2\_cat\_abg) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{    tidyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{pivot\_longer}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(outcome\_vars), }\AttributeTok{names\_to =} \StringTok{"outcome"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{values\_to =} \StringTok{"event"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(pco2\_cat\_abg, outcome) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{summarise}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{events =} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(event }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{denom  =} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(event)),}
      \AttributeTok{rate   =}\NormalTok{ events }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ denom,}
      \AttributeTok{.groups =} \StringTok{"drop\_last"}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{group =} \StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{co2\_group =} \FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(pco2\_cat\_abg)),}
\NormalTok{  subset\_data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(has\_vbg }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(outcome\_vars), pco2\_cat\_vbg) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{    tidyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{pivot\_longer}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(outcome\_vars), }\AttributeTok{names\_to =} \StringTok{"outcome"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{values\_to =} \StringTok{"event"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(pco2\_cat\_vbg, outcome) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{summarise}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{events =} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(event }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{denom  =} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(event)),}
      \AttributeTok{rate   =}\NormalTok{ events }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ denom,}
      \AttributeTok{.groups =} \StringTok{"drop\_last"}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{group =} \StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{co2\_group =} \FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(pco2\_cat\_vbg))}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{ungroup}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{outcome      =} \FunctionTok{recode}\NormalTok{(outcome, }\SpecialCharTok{!!!}\NormalTok{outcome\_labels),}
    \AttributeTok{rate\_fmt     =} \FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\%s/\%s (\%.1f\%\%)"}\NormalTok{, events, denom, }\DecValTok{100} \SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ rate),}
    \AttributeTok{co2\_group    =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(co2\_group, }\AttributeTok{levels =}\NormalTok{ CO2\_CAT\_LEVELS)}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(group, outcome, co2\_group, rate\_fmt) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
\NormalTok{  tidyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{pivot\_wider}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{names\_from =}\NormalTok{ co2\_group, }\AttributeTok{values\_from =}\NormalTok{ rate\_fmt) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(group, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{)),}
          \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(outcome, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"IMV"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"NIV"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Death (60d)"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Hypercapnic RF"}\NormalTok{)))}

\NormalTok{kableExtra}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{kbl}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  rate\_panel,}
  \AttributeTok{format    =} \StringTok{"latex"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{booktabs  =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{longtable =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{col.names =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Cohort"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Outcome"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Normal"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Low"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"High"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{caption   =} \StringTok{"Table 2a. Crude outcomes by CO2 category"}\NormalTok{,}

\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}

\subsection{Three-level PCO2 categories
(unweighted)}\label{three-level-pco2-categories-unweighted}

Three groups using low/normal/high CO2 categories

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: or data three level unweighted.}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_vbg"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(subset\_data)))}


\CommentTok{\# helper: fit one three{-}level categorical outcome model, optionally restricted}
\CommentTok{\# to the tested cohort and optionally using sampling weights.}
\NormalTok{fit\_cat3\_model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(data, outcome, cat\_var, group\_name,}
                           \AttributeTok{adj\_vars =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{,}
                           \AttributeTok{analysis\_variant =} \StringTok{"unweighted"}\NormalTok{,}
                           \AttributeTok{weight\_var =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{,}
                           \AttributeTok{treat\_var =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(outcome }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(data), cat\_var }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(data))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(weight\_var)) }\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(weight\_var }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(data))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(treat\_var)) }\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(treat\_var }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(data))}

\NormalTok{  dat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ data}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(treat\_var)) \{}
\NormalTok{    dat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dat }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{      dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(.data[[treat\_var]] }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  keep\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(outcome, cat\_var, adj\_vars, weight\_var))}
\NormalTok{  dat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dat }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(keep\_vars)) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
      \SpecialCharTok{!!}\AttributeTok{cat\_var :=}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{relevel}\NormalTok{(}
        \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(.data[[cat\_var]], }\AttributeTok{levels =}\NormalTok{ CO2\_CAT\_LEVELS),}
        \AttributeTok{ref =} \StringTok{"Normal"}
\NormalTok{      ),}
      \SpecialCharTok{!!}\AttributeTok{outcome :=} \FunctionTok{to01}\NormalTok{(.data[[outcome]])}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(.data[[cat\_var]]), }\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(.data[[outcome]]))}

  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(dat) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L }\SpecialCharTok{||}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{n\_distinct}\NormalTok{(dat[[outcome]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L) \{}
    \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"fit\_cat3\_model: insufficient outcome variation after filtering for "}\NormalTok{, group\_name, }\StringTok{" / "}\NormalTok{, outcome)}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  rhs\_terms }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(cat\_var, adj\_vars)}
\NormalTok{  f }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{reformulate}\NormalTok{(rhs\_terms, }\AttributeTok{response =}\NormalTok{ outcome)}
\NormalTok{  fit\_call }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(weight\_var)) \{}
    \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{() }\FunctionTok{glm}\NormalTok{(f, }\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ dat, }\AttributeTok{family =}\NormalTok{ binomial, }\AttributeTok{control =} \FunctionTok{glm.control}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{maxit =} \DecValTok{50}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  \} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{    dat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dat }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{      dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{.wt\_cat3 =} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(.data[[weight\_var]]))) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{      dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(.wt\_cat3), .wt\_cat3 }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(dat) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L) \{}
      \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"fit\_cat3\_model: no rows with finite positive weights for "}\NormalTok{, group\_name, }\StringTok{" / "}\NormalTok{, outcome)}
\NormalTok{    \}}
    \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{() \{}
\NormalTok{      design }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ survey}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{svydesign}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{ids =} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{weights =} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{.wt\_cat3, }\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ dat)}
\NormalTok{      survey}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{svyglm}\NormalTok{(f, }\AttributeTok{design =}\NormalTok{ design, }\AttributeTok{family =} \FunctionTok{quasibinomial}\NormalTok{(),}
                     \AttributeTok{control =} \FunctionTok{glm.control}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{maxit =} \DecValTok{50}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  fit\_res }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_with\_diagnostics}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    fit\_call,}
    \AttributeTok{context =} \FunctionTok{make\_context}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{stage =} \StringTok{"outcome"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{component =} \StringTok{"cat3"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{analysis\_variant =}\NormalTok{ analysis\_variant,}
      \AttributeTok{model\_type =} \StringTok{"cat3"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{group =}\NormalTok{ group\_name,}
      \AttributeTok{outcome =}\NormalTok{ outcome,}
      \AttributeTok{imputation =} \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{batch =} \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{append\_outcome\_diag}\NormalTok{(fit\_res}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{diag)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(fit\_res}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{fit)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"fit\_cat3\_model: model fit failed for outcome="}\NormalTok{, outcome,}
         \StringTok{" cat\_var="}\NormalTok{, cat\_var, }\StringTok{" group="}\NormalTok{, group\_name)}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  fit\_res}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{fit}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: pull the low/high{-}versus{-}normal odds{-}ratio rows out of one fitted}
\CommentTok{\# three{-}level categorical model.}
\NormalTok{extract\_cat3\_or\_terms }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(fit\_obj, outcome, cat\_var, group\_name, model\_type) \{}
\NormalTok{  broom}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tidy}\NormalTok{(fit\_obj, }\AttributeTok{exponentiate =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{conf.int =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(term }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \StringTok{"(Intercept)"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{startsWith}\NormalTok{(term, cat\_var)) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{outcome =}\NormalTok{ outcome,}
      \AttributeTok{group =}\NormalTok{ group\_name,}
      \AttributeTok{model =}\NormalTok{ model\_type}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: thin convenience wrapper retained for legacy unweighted categorical}
\CommentTok{\# OR outputs built from the shared fitting helper above.}
\NormalTok{run\_logit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(data, outcome, exposure, group\_name, }\AttributeTok{adj\_vars =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{model\_type =} \StringTok{"Crude"}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  fit\_obj }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_cat3\_model}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ data,}
    \AttributeTok{outcome =}\NormalTok{ outcome,}
    \AttributeTok{cat\_var =}\NormalTok{ exposure,}
    \AttributeTok{group\_name =}\NormalTok{ group\_name,}
    \AttributeTok{adj\_vars =}\NormalTok{ adj\_vars,}
    \AttributeTok{analysis\_variant =} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(adj\_vars)) }\StringTok{"unweighted"} \ControlFlowTok{else} \StringTok{"crude"}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{extract\_cat3\_or\_terms}\NormalTok{(fit\_obj, outcome, exposure, group\_name, model\_type)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{outcomes\_unw }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{unw\_three\_level\_forms }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"ABG 3{-}level: IMV \textasciitilde{} CO2 category + X"}      \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{reformulate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_abg"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\AttributeTok{response =} \StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"ABG 3{-}level: NIV \textasciitilde{} CO2 category + X"}      \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{reformulate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_abg"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\AttributeTok{response =} \StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"ABG 3{-}level: Death60d \textasciitilde{} CO2 category + X"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{reformulate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_abg"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\AttributeTok{response =} \StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"ABG 3{-}level: HCRF \textasciitilde{} CO2 category + X"}     \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{reformulate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_abg"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\AttributeTok{response =} \StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"VBG 3{-}level: IMV \textasciitilde{} CO2 category + X"}      \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{reformulate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\AttributeTok{response =} \StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"VBG 3{-}level: NIV \textasciitilde{} CO2 category + X"}      \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{reformulate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\AttributeTok{response =} \StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"VBG 3{-}level: Death60d \textasciitilde{} CO2 category + X"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{reformulate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\AttributeTok{response =} \StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"VBG 3{-}level: HCRF \textasciitilde{} CO2 category + X"}     \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{reformulate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\AttributeTok{response =} \StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{register\_model\_diagrams}\NormalTok{(unw\_three\_level\_forms)}

\NormalTok{crude\_cat3\_fits\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setNames}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  outcomes\_unw,}
  \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(o) }\FunctionTok{fit\_cat3\_model}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    subset\_data, o, }\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{adj\_vars =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{analysis\_variant =} \StringTok{"crude"}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{), outcomes\_unw)}
\NormalTok{crude\_cat3\_fits\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setNames}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  outcomes\_unw,}
  \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(o) }\FunctionTok{fit\_cat3\_model}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    subset\_data, o, }\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{adj\_vars =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{analysis\_variant =} \StringTok{"crude"}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{), outcomes\_unw)}

\NormalTok{adjusted\_cat3\_fits\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setNames}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  outcomes\_unw,}
  \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(o) }\FunctionTok{fit\_cat3\_model}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    subset\_data, o, }\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{adj\_vars =}\NormalTok{ adj\_core,}
    \AttributeTok{analysis\_variant =} \StringTok{"unweighted"}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{), outcomes\_unw)}
\NormalTok{adjusted\_cat3\_fits\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setNames}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  outcomes\_unw,}
  \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(o) }\FunctionTok{fit\_cat3\_model}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    subset\_data, o, }\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{adj\_vars =}\NormalTok{ adj\_core,}
    \AttributeTok{analysis\_variant =} \StringTok{"unweighted"}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{), outcomes\_unw)}

\NormalTok{unw\_results\_crude }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(outcomes\_unw, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(o) }\FunctionTok{extract\_cat3\_or\_terms}\NormalTok{(crude\_cat3\_fits\_abg[[o]], o, }\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Crude"}\NormalTok{)),}
  \FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(outcomes\_unw, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(o) }\FunctionTok{extract\_cat3\_or\_terms}\NormalTok{(crude\_cat3\_fits\_vbg[[o]], o, }\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Crude"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{unw\_results\_adj }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(outcomes\_unw, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(o) }\FunctionTok{extract\_cat3\_or\_terms}\NormalTok{(adjusted\_cat3\_fits\_abg[[o]], o, }\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Adjusted"}\NormalTok{)),}
  \FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(outcomes\_unw, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(o) }\FunctionTok{extract\_cat3\_or\_terms}\NormalTok{(adjusted\_cat3\_fits\_vbg[[o]], o, }\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Adjusted"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{unw\_threelevel\_results }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ unw\_results\_adj }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{method =} \StringTok{"Unweighted adjusted"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{unw\_plot\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{build\_or\_plot\_df}\NormalTok{(unw\_combined\_or\_df, }\StringTok{"or{-}plot{-}three{-}level{-}unweighted"}\NormalTok{,}
                            \AttributeTok{expected\_exposure\_levels =}\NormalTok{ CO2\_CAT\_CONTRAST\_LEVELS)}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.data.frame}\NormalTok{(unw\_plot\_df))}

                                      \AttributeTok{default\_limits =}\NormalTok{ OR\_XLIM)}
\NormalTok{unw\_p\_or }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{plot\_or\_safe}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  unw\_plot\_df,}

  \AttributeTok{axis\_spec =}\NormalTok{ unw\_axis\_spec,}
  \AttributeTok{title  =} \StringTok{"Adjusted odds ratios by PCO2 category (ABG, VBG)"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{caption =} \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"Adjusted for age, sex, race/ethnicity, location, and encounter type."}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Reference = patients in the normal PCO2 range."}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Low: \textless{}35 mmHg (ABG) or \textless{}40 mmHg (VBG); High: \textgreater{}45 mmHg (ABG) or \textgreater{}50 mmHg (VBG)."}\NormalTok{,}

    \AttributeTok{sep =} \StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{)}

\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Observed outcome rates by CO2 bin
(unweighted)}\label{observed-outcome-rates-by-co2-bin-unweighted}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: summarize raw event rates in 1{-}mmHg CO2 bins to inspect local jumps.}
\NormalTok{co2\_rate\_unw\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{compute\_co2\_bin\_rates}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{df =}\NormalTok{ subset\_data }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(has\_abg }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{co2\_var =} \StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{outcomes =}\NormalTok{ CO2\_RATE\_OUTCOMES,}
  \AttributeTok{outcome\_labels =}\NormalTok{ CO2\_RATE\_OUTCOME\_LABELS,}
  \AttributeTok{weight\_var =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{q =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.98}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{bin\_width =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{cohort\_label =} \StringTok{"ABG"}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{co2\_rate\_unw\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{compute\_co2\_bin\_rates}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{df =}\NormalTok{ subset\_data }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(has\_vbg }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{co2\_var =} \StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{outcomes =}\NormalTok{ CO2\_RATE\_OUTCOMES,}
  \AttributeTok{outcome\_labels =}\NormalTok{ CO2\_RATE\_OUTCOME\_LABELS,}
  \AttributeTok{weight\_var =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{q =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.98}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{bin\_width =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{cohort\_label =} \StringTok{"VBG"}
\NormalTok{)}

\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(co2\_rate\_unw\_abg, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"co2\_binned\_rates\_unweighted\_abg.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(co2\_rate\_unw\_vbg, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"co2\_binned\_rates\_unweighted\_vbg.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{p\_co2\_rate\_unw\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{plot\_co2\_bin\_rate\_panel}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  co2\_rate\_unw\_abg,}
  \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Observed outcome rates by ABG CO2 bin (unweighted)"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{x\_label =} \StringTok{"ABG CO2 (mmHg)"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{vline\_at =} \DecValTok{45}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{p\_co2\_rate\_unw\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{plot\_co2\_bin\_rate\_panel}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  co2\_rate\_unw\_vbg,}
  \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Observed outcome rates by VBG CO2 bin (unweighted)"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{x\_label =} \StringTok{"VBG CO2 (mmHg)"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{vline\_at =} \DecValTok{50}
\NormalTok{)}

\FunctionTok{print\_plot\_once}\NormalTok{(p\_co2\_rate\_unw\_abg, }\StringTok{"co2{-}binned{-}rates{-}unweighted{-}abg"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{width =} \FloatTok{8.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \FloatTok{6.0}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{print\_plot\_once}\NormalTok{(p\_co2\_rate\_unw\_vbg, }\StringTok{"co2{-}binned{-}rates{-}unweighted{-}vbg"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{width =} \FloatTok{8.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \FloatTok{6.0}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Restricted cubic spline regressions
(unweighted)}\label{restricted-cubic-spline-regressions-unweighted}

Spline curves are shown as odds ratios relative to CO2\_ref (midpoint of
the normal range), holding covariates at the reference profile.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# ABG spline dataset}
\NormalTok{subset\_data\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(has\_abg }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(paco2)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(paco2, imv\_proc, niv\_proc, death\_60d, hypercap\_resp\_failure, }\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(adj\_core)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{complete.cases}\NormalTok{(.))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsubsection{Unweighted, Restricted Cubic Spline Regression - ABG by
PaCO2}\label{unweighted-restricted-cubic-spline-regression---abg-by-paco2}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: rcs abg unweighted models.}
\NormalTok{make\_spline\_fml }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(outcome, co2\_var, adj\_vars) \{}
\NormalTok{  spline\_term }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (SPLINE\_BASIS }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"rcs"}\NormalTok{) \{}
    \FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"rms::rcs(\%s, \%d)"}\NormalTok{, co2\_var, SPLINE\_DF)}
\NormalTok{  \} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
    \FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"splines::ns(\%s, \%d)"}\NormalTok{, co2\_var, SPLINE\_DF)}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{as.formula}\NormalTok{(}
    \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(outcome, }\StringTok{" \textasciitilde{} "}\NormalTok{, spline\_term,}
           \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(adj\_vars)) }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{" + "}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(adj\_vars, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{" + "}\NormalTok{)) }\ControlFlowTok{else} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\#| code{-}block{-}title: "Unweighted ABG spline models (adjusted)"}
\NormalTok{abg\_spline\_forms }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"ABG spline (adjusted): IMV \textasciitilde{} CO2 spline + X"}      \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core),}
  \StringTok{"ABG spline (adjusted): NIV \textasciitilde{} CO2 spline + X"}      \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core),}
  \StringTok{"ABG spline (adjusted): Death60d \textasciitilde{} CO2 spline + X"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core),}
  \StringTok{"ABG spline (adjusted): HCRF \textasciitilde{} CO2 spline + X"}     \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core)}
\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{register\_model\_diagrams}\NormalTok{(abg\_spline\_forms)}

\NormalTok{co2\_seq\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{quantile}\NormalTok{(subset\_data\_abg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{paco2, }\AttributeTok{probs =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.98}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{grid\_abg\_info\_unw }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{make\_co2\_grid\_ref}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{,}
  \FunctionTok{seq}\NormalTok{(co2\_seq\_abg[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{], co2\_seq\_abg[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{], }\AttributeTok{length.out =}\NormalTok{ SPLINE\_GRID\_N),}
\NormalTok{  x\_ref\_abg,}
\NormalTok{  ABG\_CO2\_REF}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{grid\_abg\_unw }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ grid\_abg\_info\_unw}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{grid}
\NormalTok{ref\_idx\_abg\_unw }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ grid\_abg\_info\_unw}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ref\_idx}
\NormalTok{co2\_ref\_abg\_unw }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ grid\_abg\_info\_unw}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{co2\_ref}

\CommentTok{\# helper: fit one adjusted spline logistic model for the complete{-}case}
\CommentTok{\# unweighted analyses and record standardized diagnostics.}
\NormalTok{fit\_spline\_glm }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(outcome, co2\_var, data, group\_label,}
                           \AttributeTok{adj\_vars =}\NormalTok{ adj\_core,}
                           \AttributeTok{analysis\_variant =} \StringTok{"unweighted"}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  fit\_res }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_with\_diagnostics}\NormalTok{(}
    \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{() }\FunctionTok{glm}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(outcome, co2\_var, adj\_vars),}
                   \AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ data, }\AttributeTok{family =}\NormalTok{ binomial,}
                   \AttributeTok{control =} \FunctionTok{glm.control}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{maxit =} \DecValTok{50}\NormalTok{)),}
    \AttributeTok{context =} \FunctionTok{make\_context}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{stage =} \StringTok{"outcome"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{component =} \StringTok{"spline"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{analysis\_variant =}\NormalTok{ analysis\_variant,}
      \AttributeTok{model\_type =} \StringTok{"spline"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{group =}\NormalTok{ group\_label,}
      \AttributeTok{outcome =}\NormalTok{ outcome,}
      \AttributeTok{imputation =} \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{batch =} \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{append\_outcome\_diag}\NormalTok{(fit\_res}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{diag)}
\NormalTok{  fit\_res}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{fit}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{fit\_imv }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_spline\_glm}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, subset\_data\_abg, }\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{adj\_vars =}\NormalTok{ adj\_core)}
\NormalTok{fit\_niv }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_spline\_glm}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, subset\_data\_abg, }\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{adj\_vars =}\NormalTok{ adj\_core)}
\NormalTok{fit\_death }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_spline\_glm}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, subset\_data\_abg, }\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{adj\_vars =}\NormalTok{ adj\_core)}
\NormalTok{fit\_hcrf }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_spline\_glm}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, subset\_data\_abg, }\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{adj\_vars =}\NormalTok{ adj\_core)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(fit\_imv, fit\_niv, fit\_death, fit\_hcrf), is.null, }\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)))) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Unweighted ABG spline fits failed; see model\_fit\_diagnostics.csv."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{pred\_imv }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{predict\_or\_curve\_from\_fit}\NormalTok{(fit\_imv, grid\_abg\_unw, ref\_idx\_abg\_unw, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{pred\_niv }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{predict\_or\_curve\_from\_fit}\NormalTok{(fit\_niv, grid\_abg\_unw, ref\_idx\_abg\_unw, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{pred\_death }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{predict\_or\_curve\_from\_fit}\NormalTok{(fit\_death, grid\_abg\_unw, ref\_idx\_abg\_unw, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{pred\_hcrf }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{predict\_or\_curve\_from\_fit}\NormalTok{(fit\_hcrf, grid\_abg\_unw, ref\_idx\_abg\_unw, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{)}
\DocumentationTok{\#\# Plotting deferred until VBG curves are computed so axes can be shared.}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}
