\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: rcs vbg unweighted models.}
\NormalTok{vbg\_spline\_forms }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"VBG spline (adjusted): IMV \textasciitilde{} CO2 spline + X"}      \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core),}

\NormalTok{)}

  \StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{,}
  \FunctionTok{seq}\NormalTok{(co2\_seq\_vbg[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{], co2\_seq\_vbg[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{], }\AttributeTok{length.out =}\NormalTok{ SPLINE\_GRID\_N),}
\NormalTok{  x\_ref\_vbg,}

\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{grid\_vbg\_unw }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ grid\_vbg\_info\_unw}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{grid}
\NormalTok{ref\_idx\_vbg\_unw }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ grid\_vbg\_info\_unw}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ref\_idx}
\NormalTok{co2\_ref\_vbg\_unw }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ grid\_vbg\_info\_unw}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{co2\_ref}

\NormalTok{fit\_imv\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_spline\_glm}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, subset\_data\_vbg, }\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{adj\_vars =}\NormalTok{ adj\_core)}
\NormalTok{fit\_niv\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_spline\_glm}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, subset\_data\_vbg, }\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{adj\_vars =}\NormalTok{ adj\_core)}
\NormalTok{fit\_death\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_spline\_glm}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, subset\_data\_vbg, }\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{adj\_vars =}\NormalTok{ adj\_core)}
\NormalTok{fit\_hcrf\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_spline\_glm}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, subset\_data\_vbg, }\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{adj\_vars =}\NormalTok{ adj\_core)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(fit\_imv\_vbg, fit\_niv\_vbg, fit\_death\_vbg, fit\_hcrf\_vbg), is.null, }\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)))) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Unweighted VBG spline fits failed; see model\_fit\_diagnostics.csv."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{pred\_niv\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{predict\_or\_curve\_from\_fit}\NormalTok{(fit\_niv\_vbg, grid\_vbg\_unw, ref\_idx\_vbg\_unw, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{pred\_death\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{predict\_or\_curve\_from\_fit}\NormalTok{(fit\_death\_vbg, grid\_vbg\_unw, ref\_idx\_vbg\_unw, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{)}

\par

\noindent

\section{Inverse Propensity Weighting
(GBM)}\label{inverse-propensity-weighting-gbm}

IPW done using Gradient Boosting Methods (GBM) - a type of decision-tree
based machine learning. ``\textbf{\emph{Random forests and GBM are
designed to automatically include relevant interactions for variables
included in the model.}} As such, using a GBM to estimate the PS model,
can reduce model misspecification, since \textbf{\emph{the analyst is
not required to identify relevant interactions or nonlinearities.''}}
from this citation: PMID:
\href{https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/39947224/}{39947224}. PMCID:
\href{https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC11825193/}{PMC11825193}.

Current propensity score uses \texttt{covars\_gbm} (demographics,
comorbidities, encounter type, vitals, labs) as defined above; in this
block only \texttt{encounter\_type} is explicitly factored before
weighting.

Note: for all these, I suggested new GBM adjustments that accomplish the
following:

\begin{enumerate}
\def\labelenumi{\arabic{enumi}.}
\item
  Smaller GBM \& balance‑based stopping (stop.method = ``smd.max'') →
  faster fit, avoids over‑fitting, lighter tails (which lead to extreme
  weights that are problematic).
\item
  Target balance compares weighted treated cohort to the full sample;
  aim for \textbar SMD\textbar{} \textless{} 0.1.
\item
  Weight stabilization (divide by mean) mitigates a few huge weights. We
  use one‑sided truncation at very small propensities (caps large
  weights only).
\item
  Uses robust variance estimation (e.g.~allows the variances to change
  by PaCO2) for IP‑weighted GLM; works with splines via rcs(). This is a
  bit nuanced but I think good to change even though it adds complexity
\item
  Deterministic seed ensures result replication.
\end{enumerate}

\subsubsection{ABG IPW weighting and
diagnostics}\label{abg-ipw-weighting-and-diagnostics}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Already normalized globally; just drop unused levels}
\NormalTok{subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{encounter\_type }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{droplevels}\NormalTok{(subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{encounter\_type)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

GBM tuning is shared across ABG and VBG via \texttt{gbm\_params} to keep
symmetry; update there if needed.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# ── 1. fit GBM propensity model, ABG ───────────────────────────────────────────────}
\CommentTok{\# Build a minimal modeling frame (treatment + covariates only).}
\CommentTok{\# Including has\_vbg preserves shared normalization checks used elsewhere.}
\FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{42}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{gbm\_df\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data[, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, covars\_gbm), drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}

\CommentTok{\# Normalize data types before fitting GBM so predictors are consistent.}
\NormalTok{gbm\_df\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{normalize\_types}\NormalTok{(gbm\_df\_abg, levels\_ref)}
\NormalTok{gbm\_df\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{droplevels\_all}\NormalTok{(gbm\_df\_abg)}

\CommentTok{\# Log potential design{-}size problems and memory usage around model fit.}
\FunctionTok{gbm\_preflight}\NormalTok{(gbm\_df\_abg, covars\_gbm, }\StringTok{"unimp\_abg"}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{append\_mem\_snapshot}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"gbm\_unimp"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"unimp\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"pre"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{weight\_model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{do.call}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  weightit,}
  \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      formula\_abg,}
      \AttributeTok{data        =}\NormalTok{ gbm\_df\_abg,}
      \AttributeTok{method      =} \StringTok{"gbm"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{estimand    =} \StringTok{"ATE"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{missing    =} \StringTok{"ind"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{include.obj =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{    ),}
\NormalTok{    gbm\_params}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{append\_mem\_snapshot}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"gbm\_unimp"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"unimp\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"post"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# ── 2. One‑sided IPSW (ABG observed only) + truncation of small propensities ──}
\CommentTok{\# \textasciigrave{}compute\_ipow\_weights()\textasciigrave{} applies the project\textquotesingle{}s one{-}sided weighting rule:}
\CommentTok{\# treated rows receive inverse propensity weights, non{-}treated rows are anchors.}
\NormalTok{ipow\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{compute\_ipow\_weights}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  weight\_model,}
  \AttributeTok{treat =}\NormalTok{ gbm\_df\_abg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_abg,}
  \AttributeTok{ps\_floor\_quantile =}\NormalTok{ ps\_trunc\_quantile,}
  \AttributeTok{stabilize =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{w\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ipow\_abg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{weights}
\NormalTok{ps\_floor\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ipow\_abg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ps\_floor}
\NormalTok{subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{trunc\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ipow\_abg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{truncated}
\NormalTok{subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ps\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ipow\_abg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ps}
\NormalTok{subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{w\_abg  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ w\_abg}

\CommentTok{\# Sanity{-}check: treated weights must be finite before outcome modeling.}
\FunctionTok{assert\_finite\_weights}\NormalTok{(w\_abg[subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_abg }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{], }\StringTok{"w\_abg"}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{rm}\NormalTok{(weight\_model, gbm\_df\_abg)}
\FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{gc}\NormalTok{())}

\CommentTok{\# Balance diagnostics and treated{-}only outcome models are handled later.}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\textbf{Inverse Propensity-Weighted Logistic Regressions with CO2
predictor represented as a restricted cubic spline.}

These are covariate-adjusted outcome models (outcome \textasciitilde{}
spline(CO2) + X), fit separately for ABG and VBG cohorts using
survey::svyglm with robust (design-based) SEs. Spline curves are shown
as odds ratios relative to CO2\_ref (midpoint of the normal range).

\subsubsection{ABG IPW spline models}\label{abg-ipw-spline-models}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# set.seed(42)  \# reproducible GBM fit}
\CommentTok{\# }
\CommentTok{\# \# ── 1. inverse‑probability weights for receiving an ABG ───────────────────────}
\CommentTok{\# }
\CommentTok{\# \# done in the last block, so not needed}
\CommentTok{\# }

\CommentTok{\# Model diagrams: IPW ABG spline models}
\NormalTok{ipw\_abg\_rcs\_forms }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"ABG IPW spline (adjusted): IMV \textasciitilde{} CO2 spline + X"}      \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core),}
  \StringTok{"ABG IPW spline (adjusted): NIV \textasciitilde{} CO2 spline + X"}      \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core),}
  \StringTok{"ABG IPW spline (adjusted): Death60d \textasciitilde{} CO2 spline + X"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core),}
  \StringTok{"ABG IPW spline (adjusted): HCRF \textasciitilde{} CO2 spline + X"}     \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core)}
\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{register\_model\_diagrams}\NormalTok{(ipw\_abg\_rcs\_forms)}

\CommentTok{\# ── 2. analysis sample: rows with a measured PaCO2 ────────────────────────────}
\NormalTok{subset\_data\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(paco2)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}                    \CommentTok{\# implies has\_abg == 1}
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(paco2, imv\_proc, niv\_proc, death\_60d,}
\NormalTok{         hypercap\_resp\_failure, w\_abg, }\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(adj\_core)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{complete.cases}\NormalTok{(.))}


\CommentTok{\# ── 3. weighted logistic spline models with robust SEs ───────────────────────}
\CommentTok{\# helper: fit one ABG IPW spline model with robust survey variance and attach}
\CommentTok{\# standardized diagnostics.}
\NormalTok{fitfun }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(formula, outcome) \{}
\NormalTok{  fit\_res }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_with\_diagnostics}\NormalTok{(}
    \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{() }\FunctionTok{svyglm}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      formula,}
      \AttributeTok{design =} \FunctionTok{svydesign}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{ids =} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{weights =} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{w\_abg, }\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ subset\_data\_abg),}
      \AttributeTok{family =} \FunctionTok{quasibinomial}\NormalTok{(),}
      \AttributeTok{control =} \FunctionTok{glm.control}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{maxit =} \DecValTok{50}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{context =} \FunctionTok{make\_context}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{stage =} \StringTok{"outcome"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{component =} \StringTok{"spline"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{analysis\_variant =} \StringTok{"ipw"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{model\_type =} \StringTok{"spline"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{group =} \StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{outcome =}\NormalTok{ outcome,}
      \AttributeTok{imputation =} \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{batch =} \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{append\_outcome\_diag}\NormalTok{(fit\_res}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{diag)}
\NormalTok{  fit\_res}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{fit}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{fit\_imv\_abg   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fitfun}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{fit\_niv\_abg   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fitfun}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{fit\_death\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fitfun}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{fit\_hcrf\_abg  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fitfun}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core),}
                        \StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(fit\_imv\_abg, fit\_niv\_abg, fit\_death\_abg, fit\_hcrf\_abg), is.null, }\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)))) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"IPW ABG spline fits failed; see model\_fit\_diagnostics.csv."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# ── 4. prediction helper ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────}
\CommentTok{\# helper: generate one ABG IPW spline odds{-}ratio curve over the observed CO2}
\CommentTok{\# range while holding the reference profile fixed.}
\NormalTok{mkpred }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(fit, data\_ref, co2\_var, ref\_df, co2\_ref) \{}
\NormalTok{  co2\_seq }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{quantile}\NormalTok{(data\_ref[[co2\_var]], }\AttributeTok{probs =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.98}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  grid\_info }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{make\_co2\_grid\_ref}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    co2\_var,}
    \FunctionTok{seq}\NormalTok{(co2\_seq[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{], co2\_seq[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{], }\AttributeTok{length.out =}\NormalTok{ SPLINE\_GRID\_N),}
\NormalTok{    ref\_df,}
\NormalTok{    co2\_ref}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{predict\_or\_curve\_from\_fit}\NormalTok{(fit, grid\_info}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{grid, grid\_info}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ref\_idx, co2\_var)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{pred\_imv\_abg   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mkpred}\NormalTok{(fit\_imv\_abg,   subset\_data\_abg, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, x\_ref\_abg, ABG\_CO2\_REF)}
\NormalTok{pred\_niv\_abg   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mkpred}\NormalTok{(fit\_niv\_abg,   subset\_data\_abg, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, x\_ref\_abg, ABG\_CO2\_REF)}
\NormalTok{pred\_death\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mkpred}\NormalTok{(fit\_death\_abg, subset\_data\_abg, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, x\_ref\_abg, ABG\_CO2\_REF)}
\NormalTok{pred\_hcrf\_abg  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mkpred}\NormalTok{(fit\_hcrf\_abg,  subset\_data\_abg, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, x\_ref\_abg, ABG\_CO2\_REF)}
\NormalTok{axis\_abg\_ipw\_trim }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{compute\_or\_axis\_spec}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(pred\_imv\_abg, pred\_niv\_abg, pred\_death\_abg, pred\_hcrf\_abg),}
  \AttributeTok{lo\_col =} \StringTok{"LCL"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hi\_col =} \StringTok{"UCL"}
\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\# ── 5. plotting ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────}
\CommentTok{\# Plotting deferred until VBG curves are computed so axes can be shared.}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Restricting plots bewtween 0.02 and 0.98

\subsubsection{ABG IPW spline models (2--98th
percentile)}\label{abg-ipw-spline-models-298th-percentile}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: ipw abg rcs trimmed.}
\NormalTok{subset\_data\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(paco2)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}                    \CommentTok{\# implies has\_abg == 1}
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(paco2, imv\_proc, niv\_proc, death\_60d,}
\NormalTok{         hypercap\_resp\_failure, w\_abg, }\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(adj\_core)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{complete.cases}\NormalTok{(.))}

\CommentTok{\# helper: refit the ABG IPW spline models on the trimmed 2nd{-}98th percentile}
\CommentTok{\# plotting range used for the manuscript{-}friendly panels.}
\NormalTok{fitfun }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(formula, outcome) \{}
\NormalTok{  fit\_res }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_with\_diagnostics}\NormalTok{(}
    \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{() }\FunctionTok{svyglm}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      formula,}
      \AttributeTok{design =} \FunctionTok{svydesign}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{ids =} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{weights =} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{w\_abg, }\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ subset\_data\_abg),}
      \AttributeTok{family =} \FunctionTok{quasibinomial}\NormalTok{(),}
      \AttributeTok{control =} \FunctionTok{glm.control}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{maxit =} \DecValTok{50}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{context =} \FunctionTok{make\_context}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{stage =} \StringTok{"outcome"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{component =} \StringTok{"spline"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{analysis\_variant =} \StringTok{"ipw"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{model\_type =} \StringTok{"spline"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{group =} \StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{outcome =}\NormalTok{ outcome,}
      \AttributeTok{imputation =} \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{batch =} \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{append\_outcome\_diag}\NormalTok{(fit\_res}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{diag)}
\NormalTok{  fit\_res}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{fit}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{fit\_imv\_abg   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fitfun}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{fit\_niv\_abg   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fitfun}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{fit\_death\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fitfun}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{fit\_hcrf\_abg  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fitfun}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core),}
                        \StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(fit\_imv\_abg, fit\_niv\_abg, fit\_death\_abg, fit\_hcrf\_abg), is.null, }\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)))) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"IPW ABG spline fits (trimmed) failed; see model\_fit\_diagnostics.csv."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# ── 4. prediction helper ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────}
\CommentTok{\# helper: generate one trimmed{-}range ABG IPW spline odds{-}ratio curve from a}
\CommentTok{\# fitted survey{-}weighted model.}
\NormalTok{mkpred }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(fit, data\_ref, co2\_var, ref\_df, co2\_ref) \{}
\NormalTok{  q }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{quantile}\NormalTok{(data\_ref[[co2\_var]], }\AttributeTok{probs =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.98}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  grid\_info }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{make\_co2\_grid\_ref}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    co2\_var,}
    \FunctionTok{seq}\NormalTok{(q[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{], q[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{], }\AttributeTok{length.out =}\NormalTok{ SPLINE\_GRID\_N),}
\NormalTok{    ref\_df,}
\NormalTok{    co2\_ref}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{predict\_or\_curve\_from\_fit}\NormalTok{(fit, grid\_info}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{grid, grid\_info}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ref\_idx, co2\_var)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{pred\_imv\_abg   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mkpred}\NormalTok{(fit\_imv\_abg,   subset\_data\_abg, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, x\_ref\_abg, ABG\_CO2\_REF)}
\NormalTok{pred\_niv\_abg   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mkpred}\NormalTok{(fit\_niv\_abg,   subset\_data\_abg, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, x\_ref\_abg, ABG\_CO2\_REF)}
\NormalTok{pred\_death\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mkpred}\NormalTok{(fit\_death\_abg, subset\_data\_abg, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, x\_ref\_abg, ABG\_CO2\_REF)}
\NormalTok{pred\_hcrf\_abg  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mkpred}\NormalTok{(fit\_hcrf\_abg,  subset\_data\_abg, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, x\_ref\_abg, ABG\_CO2\_REF)}

\CommentTok{\# ── 5. plotting ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────}
\NormalTok{xlab }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{expression}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ABG CO"}\NormalTok{[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{], }\StringTok{" (mmHg)"}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# helper: draw one trimmed{-}range ABG IPW odds{-}ratio panel.}
\CommentTok{\# helper: draw one VBG IPW odds{-}ratio panel using the ABG/VBG{-}shared axis.}
\NormalTok{plt }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(dat, title)}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(dat, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(paco2, OR)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_ribbon}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{ymin =}\NormalTok{ LCL, }\AttributeTok{ymax =}\NormalTok{ UCL), }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_hline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{yintercept =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"grey40"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{or\_axis\_scale}\NormalTok{(axis\_abg\_ipw\_trim) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =}\NormalTok{ title, }\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ xlab,}
         \AttributeTok{y =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Odds ratio (ref = "}\NormalTok{, ABG\_CO2\_REF, }\StringTok{"; log scale)"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{theme\_pub}\NormalTok{()}

\NormalTok{ipw\_abg\_panel }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ (patchwork}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{wrap\_plots}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{plt}\NormalTok{(pred\_imv\_abg,   }\StringTok{"IMV"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{plt}\NormalTok{(pred\_niv\_abg,   }\StringTok{"NIV"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{plt}\NormalTok{(pred\_death\_abg, }\StringTok{"Death"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{plt}\NormalTok{(pred\_hcrf\_abg,  }\StringTok{"Hypercapnic RF"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{ncol =} \DecValTok{2}
\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{plot\_annotation}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"GBM{-}IPSW{-}adjusted odds ratios by ABG CO2 (ref = "}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{                   ABG\_CO2\_REF, }\StringTok{"; conditional on X; 2–98\% range)"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{caption =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Reference PaCO2 = "}\NormalTok{, ABG\_CO2\_REF, }\StringTok{" mmHg"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}

\FunctionTok{print\_plot\_once}\NormalTok{(ipw\_abg\_panel, }\StringTok{"spline{-}ipw{-}abg{-}trimmed"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{width =} \FloatTok{8.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{axis\_abg\_ipw\_trim\_prob }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{compute\_prob\_axis\_spec}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(pred\_imv\_abg, pred\_niv\_abg, pred\_death\_abg, pred\_hcrf\_abg),}
  \AttributeTok{lo\_col =} \StringTok{"p\_LCL"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hi\_col =} \StringTok{"p\_UCL"}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# helper: draw one trimmed{-}range ABG IPW predicted{-}probability panel.}
\NormalTok{plt\_prob }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(dat, title)}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(dat, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(paco2, p)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"\#1f77b4"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_ribbon}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{ymin =}\NormalTok{ p\_LCL, }\AttributeTok{ymax =}\NormalTok{ p\_UCL), }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.2}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{fill =} \StringTok{"\#1f77b4"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{prob\_axis\_scale}\NormalTok{(axis\_abg\_ipw\_trim\_prob) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{title =}\NormalTok{ title,}
      \AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ xlab,}
      \AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Predicted probability"}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{theme\_pub}\NormalTok{()}

\NormalTok{ipw\_abg\_prob\_panel }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ (patchwork}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{wrap\_plots}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{plt\_prob}\NormalTok{(pred\_imv\_abg,   }\StringTok{"IMV"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{plt\_prob}\NormalTok{(pred\_niv\_abg,   }\StringTok{"NIV"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{plt\_prob}\NormalTok{(pred\_death\_abg, }\StringTok{"Death"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{plt\_prob}\NormalTok{(pred\_hcrf\_abg,  }\StringTok{"Hypercapnic RF"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{ncol =} \DecValTok{2}
\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{plot\_annotation}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"GBM{-}IPSW{-}adjusted predicted probabilities by ABG CO2 (ref = "}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{                   ABG\_CO2\_REF, }\StringTok{"; conditional on X; 2–98\% range)"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{caption =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Probabilities are conditional on X\_ref; reference PaCO2 = "}\NormalTok{, ABG\_CO2\_REF, }\StringTok{" mmHg"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}

\FunctionTok{print\_plot\_once}\NormalTok{(ipw\_abg\_prob\_panel, }\StringTok{"spline{-}ipw{-}abg{-}trimmed{-}prob"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{width =} \FloatTok{8.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

VBG uses the same GBM tuning as ABG (shared \texttt{gbm\_params}).

\subsubsection{VBG IPW weighting and spline
models}\label{vbg-ipw-weighting-and-spline-models}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\#  Inverse{-}propensity weighting \& outcome modelling for **VBG** cohort}
\CommentTok{\#    – mirrored 1{-}to{-}1 to the validated ABG workflow}

\FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{42}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# 1. IPW for VBG {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{42}\NormalTok{)}
\CommentTok{\# Mirror ABG logic: create a minimal design frame and normalize types first.}
\NormalTok{gbm\_df\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data[, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, covars\_gbm), drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{gbm\_df\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{normalize\_types}\NormalTok{(gbm\_df\_vbg, levels\_ref)}
\NormalTok{gbm\_df\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{droplevels\_all}\NormalTok{(gbm\_df\_vbg)}

\CommentTok{\# Capture model{-}size and memory telemetry before/after fit.}
\FunctionTok{gbm\_preflight}\NormalTok{(gbm\_df\_vbg, covars\_gbm, }\StringTok{"unimp\_vbg"}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{append\_mem\_snapshot}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"gbm\_unimp"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"unimp\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"pre"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{w\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{do.call}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  weightit,}
  \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      formula\_vbg,}
      \AttributeTok{data        =}\NormalTok{ gbm\_df\_vbg,}
      \AttributeTok{method      =} \StringTok{"gbm"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{estimand    =} \StringTok{"ATE"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{missing     =} \StringTok{"ind"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{include.obj =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{    ),}
\NormalTok{    gbm\_params}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{append\_mem\_snapshot}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"gbm\_unimp"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"unimp\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"post"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# One‑sided IPSW (VBG observed only) + truncation of small propensities}
\CommentTok{\# Same weighting convention as ABG, but for VBG testing indicator.}
\NormalTok{ipow\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{compute\_ipow\_weights}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  w\_vbg,}
  \AttributeTok{treat =}\NormalTok{ gbm\_df\_vbg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_vbg,}
  \AttributeTok{ps\_floor\_quantile =}\NormalTok{ ps\_trunc\_quantile,}
  \AttributeTok{stabilize =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{w\_vbg\_ipow }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ipow\_vbg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{weights}
\NormalTok{ps\_floor\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ipow\_vbg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ps\_floor}
\NormalTok{subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{trunc\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ipow\_vbg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{truncated}
\NormalTok{subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ps\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ipow\_vbg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ps}
\NormalTok{subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{w\_vbg  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ w\_vbg\_ipow}

\CommentTok{\# Guard against non{-}finite treated weights before survey models.}
\FunctionTok{assert\_finite\_weights}\NormalTok{(w\_vbg\_ipow[subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_vbg }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{], }\StringTok{"w\_vbg"}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{rm}\NormalTok{(w\_vbg, gbm\_df\_vbg)}
\FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{gc}\NormalTok{())}

\CommentTok{\# Balance diagnostics are handled later.}

\CommentTok{\# 2. Analysis set (VBG only) {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\NormalTok{subset\_data\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(vbg\_co2)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(vbg\_co2, imv\_proc, niv\_proc, death\_60d, }
\NormalTok{         hypercap\_resp\_failure, w\_vbg, }\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(adj\_core)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{complete.cases}\NormalTok{(.))}

\CommentTok{\# helper: fit one VBG IPW spline model with robust survey variance and attach}
\CommentTok{\# standardized diagnostics.}
\NormalTok{fitfun }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(formula, outcome) \{}
\NormalTok{  fit\_res }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_with\_diagnostics}\NormalTok{(}
    \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{() }\FunctionTok{svyglm}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      formula,}
      \AttributeTok{design =} \FunctionTok{svydesign}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{ids =} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{weights =} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{w\_vbg, }\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ subset\_data\_vbg),}
      \AttributeTok{family =} \FunctionTok{quasibinomial}\NormalTok{(),}
      \AttributeTok{control =} \FunctionTok{glm.control}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{maxit =} \DecValTok{50}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{context =} \FunctionTok{make\_context}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{stage =} \StringTok{"outcome"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{component =} \StringTok{"spline"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{analysis\_variant =} \StringTok{"ipw"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{model\_type =} \StringTok{"spline"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{group =} \StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{outcome =}\NormalTok{ outcome,}
      \AttributeTok{imputation =} \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{batch =} \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{append\_outcome\_diag}\NormalTok{(fit\_res}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{diag)}
\NormalTok{  fit\_res}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{fit}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# Model diagrams: IPW VBG spline models}
\NormalTok{ipw\_vbg\_rcs\_forms }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"VBG IPW spline (adjusted): IMV \textasciitilde{} CO2 spline + X"}      \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core),}
  \StringTok{"VBG IPW spline (adjusted): NIV \textasciitilde{} CO2 spline + X"}      \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core),}
  \StringTok{"VBG IPW spline (adjusted): Death60d \textasciitilde{} CO2 spline + X"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core),}
  \StringTok{"VBG IPW spline (adjusted): HCRF \textasciitilde{} CO2 spline + X"}     \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core)}
\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{register\_model\_diagrams}\NormalTok{(ipw\_vbg\_rcs\_forms)}

\NormalTok{fit\_imv\_vbg   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fitfun}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{fit\_niv\_vbg   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fitfun}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{fit\_death\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fitfun}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{fit\_hcrf\_vbg  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fitfun}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{make\_spline\_fml}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core),}
                        \StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(fit\_imv\_vbg, fit\_niv\_vbg, fit\_death\_vbg, fit\_hcrf\_vbg), is.null, }\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)))) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"IPW VBG spline fits failed; see model\_fit\_diagnostics.csv."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# 4. Prediction helper {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\CommentTok{\# helper: generate one VBG IPW spline odds{-}ratio curve over the observed CO2}
\CommentTok{\# range while holding the reference profile fixed.}
\NormalTok{mkpred }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(fit, data\_ref, co2\_var, ref\_df, co2\_ref) \{}
\NormalTok{  co2\_seq }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{quantile}\NormalTok{(data\_ref[[co2\_var]], }\AttributeTok{probs =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.98}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  grid\_info }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{make\_co2\_grid\_ref}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    co2\_var,}
    \FunctionTok{seq}\NormalTok{(co2\_seq[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{], co2\_seq[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{], }\AttributeTok{length.out =}\NormalTok{ SPLINE\_GRID\_N),}
\NormalTok{    ref\_df,}
\NormalTok{    co2\_ref}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{predict\_or\_curve\_from\_fit}\NormalTok{(fit, grid\_info}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{grid, grid\_info}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ref\_idx, co2\_var)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{pred\_imv\_vbg   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mkpred}\NormalTok{(fit\_imv\_vbg,   subset\_data\_vbg, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, x\_ref\_vbg, VBG\_CO2\_REF)}
\NormalTok{pred\_niv\_vbg   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mkpred}\NormalTok{(fit\_niv\_vbg,   subset\_data\_vbg, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, x\_ref\_vbg, VBG\_CO2\_REF)}
\NormalTok{pred\_death\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mkpred}\NormalTok{(fit\_death\_vbg, subset\_data\_vbg, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, x\_ref\_vbg, VBG\_CO2\_REF)}
\NormalTok{pred\_hcrf\_vbg  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mkpred}\NormalTok{(fit\_hcrf\_vbg,  subset\_data\_vbg, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, x\_ref\_vbg, VBG\_CO2\_REF)}
\NormalTok{axis\_ipw\_common }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{compute\_or\_axis\_spec}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(pred\_imv\_abg, pred\_niv\_abg, pred\_death\_abg, pred\_hcrf\_abg,}
\NormalTok{       pred\_imv\_vbg, pred\_niv\_vbg, pred\_death\_vbg, pred\_hcrf\_vbg),}
  \AttributeTok{lo\_col =} \StringTok{"LCL"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hi\_col =} \StringTok{"UCL"}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{axis\_ipw\_common\_prob }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{compute\_prob\_axis\_spec}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(pred\_imv\_abg, pred\_niv\_abg, pred\_death\_abg, pred\_hcrf\_abg,}
\NormalTok{       pred\_imv\_vbg, pred\_niv\_vbg, pred\_death\_vbg, pred\_hcrf\_vbg),}
  \AttributeTok{lo\_col =} \StringTok{"p\_LCL"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hi\_col =} \StringTok{"p\_UCL"}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# 5. Plotting (gray scheme) {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\NormalTok{xlab }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{expression}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"VBG CO"}\NormalTok{[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{], }\StringTok{" (mmHg)"}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# helper: render one VBG spline panel with a consistent odds{-}ratio axis and}
\CommentTok{\# publication theme so the four outcomes can be compared side by side.}
\NormalTok{plt }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(dat, title)}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(dat, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(vbg\_co2, OR)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_ribbon}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{ymin =}\NormalTok{ LCL, }\AttributeTok{ymax =}\NormalTok{ UCL), }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_hline}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{yintercept =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{linetype =} \StringTok{"dashed"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"grey40"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{or\_axis\_scale}\NormalTok{(axis\_ipw\_common) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =}\NormalTok{ title, }\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ xlab,}
         \AttributeTok{y =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Odds ratio (ref = "}\NormalTok{, VBG\_CO2\_REF, }\StringTok{"; log scale)"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{theme\_pub}\NormalTok{()}

\NormalTok{ipw\_vbg\_panel }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ (patchwork}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{wrap\_plots}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{plt}\NormalTok{(pred\_imv\_vbg,   }\StringTok{"IMV"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{plt}\NormalTok{(pred\_niv\_vbg,   }\StringTok{"NIV"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{plt}\NormalTok{(pred\_death\_vbg, }\StringTok{"Death"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{plt}\NormalTok{(pred\_hcrf\_vbg,  }\StringTok{"Hypercapnic RF"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{ncol =} \DecValTok{2}
\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{plot\_annotation}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"GBM{-}IPSW{-}adjusted odds ratios by VBG CO2 (ref = "}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{                   VBG\_CO2\_REF, }\StringTok{"; conditional on X)"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{caption =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Reference VBG CO2 = "}\NormalTok{, VBG\_CO2\_REF, }\StringTok{" mmHg"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}

\FunctionTok{print\_plot\_once}\NormalTok{(ipw\_vbg\_panel, }\StringTok{"spline{-}ipw{-}vbg"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{width =} \FloatTok{8.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# helper: draw one VBG IPW predicted{-}probability panel using the ABG/VBG{-}shared}
\CommentTok{\# probability axis.}
\NormalTok{plt\_prob\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(dat, title)}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(dat, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(vbg\_co2, p)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"\#d95f02"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_ribbon}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{ymin =}\NormalTok{ p\_LCL, }\AttributeTok{ymax =}\NormalTok{ p\_UCL), }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.2}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{fill =} \StringTok{"\#d95f02"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}

    \FunctionTok{theme\_pub}\NormalTok{()}

  \FunctionTok{plt\_prob\_vbg}\NormalTok{(pred\_imv\_vbg,   }\StringTok{"IMV"}\NormalTok{),}

\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{plot\_annotation}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"GBM{-}IPSW{-}adjusted predicted probabilities by VBG CO2 (ref = "}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{                   VBG\_CO2\_REF, }\StringTok{"; conditional on X)"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{caption =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Probabilities are conditional on X\_ref; reference VBG CO2 = "}\NormalTok{, VBG\_CO2\_REF, }\StringTok{" mmHg"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}

\FunctionTok{print\_plot\_once}\NormalTok{(ipw\_vbg\_prob\_panel, }\StringTok{"spline{-}ipw{-}vbg{-}prob"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{width =} \FloatTok{8.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# ABG plots with the same axis (shared with VBG)}
\NormalTok{xlab\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{expression}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ABG CO"}\NormalTok{[}\DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{], }\StringTok{" (mmHg)"}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# helper: redraw the ABG IPW odds{-}ratio panels on the same axis used for VBG so}

\NormalTok{plt\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(dat, title)}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(dat, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(paco2, OR)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_ribbon}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{ymin =}\NormalTok{ LCL, }\AttributeTok{ymax =}\NormalTok{ UCL), }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}

    \FunctionTok{or\_axis\_scale}\NormalTok{(axis\_ipw\_common) }\SpecialCharTok{+}

         \AttributeTok{y =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Odds ratio (ref = "}\NormalTok{, ABG\_CO2\_REF, }\StringTok{"; log scale)"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{theme\_pub}\NormalTok{()}

\NormalTok{ipw\_abg\_shared\_panel }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ (patchwork}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{wrap\_plots}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{plt\_abg}\NormalTok{(pred\_imv\_abg,   }\StringTok{"IMV"}\NormalTok{),}

\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{plot\_annotation}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"GBM{-}IPSW{-}adjusted odds ratios by ABG CO2 (ref = "}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{                   ABG\_CO2\_REF, }\StringTok{"; conditional on X)"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{caption =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Reference PaCO2 = "}\NormalTok{, ABG\_CO2\_REF, }\StringTok{" mmHg"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}

\FunctionTok{print\_plot\_once}\NormalTok{(ipw\_abg\_shared\_panel, }\StringTok{"spline{-}ipw{-}abg{-}shared"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{width =} \FloatTok{8.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# helper: redraw the ABG IPW predicted{-}probability panels on the same axis used}
\CommentTok{\# for VBG so the overlaid comparison figures remain visually comparable.}
\NormalTok{plt\_prob\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(dat, title)}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(dat, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(paco2, p)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_line}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"\#1f77b4"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_ribbon}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{ymin =}\NormalTok{ p\_LCL, }\AttributeTok{ymax =}\NormalTok{ p\_UCL), }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.2}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{fill =} \StringTok{"\#1f77b4"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{prob\_axis\_scale}\NormalTok{(axis\_ipw\_common\_prob) }\SpecialCharTok{+}

\subsubsection{Three-level PCO2 categories (weighted; ABG,
VBG)}\label{three-level-pco2-categories-weighted-abg-vbg}

Three groups with weights and covariate adjustment

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: ipw three level pco2 all.}

\CommentTok{\# ── 1. Ensure PCO2 categories are present ────────────────────────────────────}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_vbg"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(subset\_data)))}

\CommentTok{\# ── 2. Function: weighted logistic regression \& OR extraction ───────────────}
\CommentTok{\# helper: thin wrapper retained for the legacy GBM{-}weighted categorical OR}
\CommentTok{\# figures while reusing the shared weighted categorical fitting helper.}
\NormalTok{run\_weighted\_or }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(data, outcome, cat\_var, weight\_var, group\_name,}
\NormalTok{                            treat\_var, adj\_vars) \{}
\NormalTok{  fit\_obj }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_cat3\_model}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ data,}
    \AttributeTok{outcome =}\NormalTok{ outcome,}
    \AttributeTok{cat\_var =}\NormalTok{ cat\_var,}
    \AttributeTok{group\_name =}\NormalTok{ group\_name,}
    \AttributeTok{adj\_vars =}\NormalTok{ adj\_vars,}
    \AttributeTok{analysis\_variant =} \StringTok{"ipw"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{weight\_var =}\NormalTok{ weight\_var,}
    \AttributeTok{treat\_var =}\NormalTok{ treat\_var}
\NormalTok{  )}

  \FunctionTok{extract\_cat3\_or\_terms}\NormalTok{(fit\_obj, outcome, cat\_var, group\_name, }\StringTok{"GBM{-}weighted"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# ── 3. Run across outcomes \& cohorts ────────────────────────────────────────}
\NormalTok{outcomes\_ipw }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{ipw\_three\_level\_forms }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"ABG IPW 3{-}level: IMV \textasciitilde{} CO2 category + X"}      \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{reformulate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_abg"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\AttributeTok{response =} \StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"ABG IPW 3{-}level: NIV \textasciitilde{} CO2 category + X"}      \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{reformulate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_abg"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\AttributeTok{response =} \StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"ABG IPW 3{-}level: Death60d \textasciitilde{} CO2 category + X"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{reformulate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_abg"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\AttributeTok{response =} \StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"ABG IPW 3{-}level: HCRF \textasciitilde{} CO2 category + X"}     \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{reformulate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_abg"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\AttributeTok{response =} \StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"VBG IPW 3{-}level: IMV \textasciitilde{} CO2 category + X"}      \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{reformulate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\AttributeTok{response =} \StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"VBG IPW 3{-}level: NIV \textasciitilde{} CO2 category + X"}      \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{reformulate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\AttributeTok{response =} \StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"VBG IPW 3{-}level: Death60d \textasciitilde{} CO2 category + X"} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{reformulate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\AttributeTok{response =} \StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"VBG IPW 3{-}level: HCRF \textasciitilde{} CO2 category + X"}     \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{reformulate}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, adj\_core), }\AttributeTok{response =} \StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{register\_model\_diagrams}\NormalTok{(ipw\_three\_level\_forms)}

\NormalTok{gbm\_cat3\_fits\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setNames}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  outcomes\_ipw,}
  \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(outcome) }\FunctionTok{fit\_cat3\_model}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    subset\_data,}
\NormalTok{    outcome,}

\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{), outcomes\_ipw)}
\NormalTok{gbm\_cat3\_fits\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setNames}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  outcomes\_ipw,}

\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{), outcomes\_ipw)}

  \FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(outcomes\_ipw, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(outcome)}

\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{ipw\_plot\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{build\_or\_plot\_df}\NormalTok{(ipw\_combined\_or\_df, }\StringTok{"or{-}plot{-}three{-}level{-}weighted"}\NormalTok{,}
                            \AttributeTok{expected\_exposure\_levels =}\NormalTok{ CO2\_CAT\_CONTRAST\_LEVELS)}
\NormalTok{ipw\_axis\_spec }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{compute\_or\_axis\_spec}\NormalTok{(ipw\_plot\_df, }\AttributeTok{lo\_col =} \StringTok{"conf.low"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hi\_col =} \StringTok{"conf.high"}\NormalTok{,}
                                      \AttributeTok{default\_limits =}\NormalTok{ OR\_XLIM)}
\NormalTok{ipw\_p\_or }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{plot\_or\_safe}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  ipw\_plot\_df,}
  \AttributeTok{plot\_name =} \StringTok{"or{-}plot{-}three{-}level{-}weighted"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{axis\_spec =}\NormalTok{ ipw\_axis\_spec,}
  \AttributeTok{title  =} \StringTok{"GBM{-}IPSW{-}adjusted weighted odds ratios by PCO2 category (ABG, VBG)"}
\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{print\_plot\_once}\NormalTok{(ipw\_p\_or, }\StringTok{"or{-}plot{-}three{-}level{-}weighted"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{width =} \FloatTok{7.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \FloatTok{4.8}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}

  \AttributeTok{co2\_var =} \StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{,}

  \AttributeTok{weight\_var =} \StringTok{"w\_vbg"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{q =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\FloatTok{0.02}\NormalTok{, }\FloatTok{0.98}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{bin\_width =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{cohort\_label =} \StringTok{"VBG"}
\NormalTok{)}

\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(co2\_rate\_ipw\_abg, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"co2\_binned\_rates\_ipw\_abg.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(co2\_rate\_ipw\_vbg, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"co2\_binned\_rates\_ipw\_vbg.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}

\subsection{Propensity score
diagnostics}\label{propensity-score-diagnostics}

Plotting propensity scores

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# {-}{-}{-} Propensity score histograms (ABG / VBG) {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\CommentTok{\# ABG = arterial blood gas; VBG = venous blood gas}


\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"has\_abg"} \SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(subset\_data))}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"has\_vbg"} \SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(subset\_data))}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ps\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ps\_vbg"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(subset\_data)))}

\CommentTok{\# Build list of per{-}cohort PS data frames conditionally (so missing cohorts don\textquotesingle{}t error)}
\NormalTok{ps\_dfs\_cond }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{ABG =} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{ps        =}\NormalTok{ subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ps\_abg,}
    \AttributeTok{treat     =}\NormalTok{ subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_abg,}
    \AttributeTok{ScoreType =} \StringTok{"ABG"}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{VBG =} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{ps        =}\NormalTok{ subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ps\_vbg,}
    \AttributeTok{treat     =}\NormalTok{ subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_vbg,}
    \AttributeTok{ScoreType =} \StringTok{"VBG"}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Bind, clean, and factorize for plotting}
\NormalTok{df\_ps\_cond }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(ps\_dfs\_cond) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(ps), }\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(treat)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{treat     =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(treat, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Untested"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Tested"}\NormalTok{)),}
    \AttributeTok{ScoreType =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(ScoreType, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  )}

\CommentTok{\# Plot}
\NormalTok{p\_ps\_cond }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(df\_ps\_cond, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ ps, }\AttributeTok{fill =}\NormalTok{ treat)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_histogram}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y =} \FunctionTok{after\_stat}\NormalTok{(density)), }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{,}
                 \AttributeTok{position =} \StringTok{"identity"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{bins =} \DecValTok{30}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_fill\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Untested"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"steelblue"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Tested"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"tomato"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{facet\_wrap}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ScoreType, }\AttributeTok{scales =} \StringTok{"free\_y"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{coord\_cartesian}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{xlim =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Propensity{-}score overlap for gradient{-}boosted ABG and VBG test{-}ordering models"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{x     =} \StringTok{"Propensity score"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{y     =} \StringTok{"Density"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{fill  =} \StringTok{"Group"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_pub}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{base\_size =} \DecValTok{12}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{print\_plot\_once}\NormalTok{(p\_ps\_cond, }\StringTok{"propensity{-}histograms{-}conditional"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{width =} \FloatTok{8.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: propensity histograms all.}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ps\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ps\_vbg"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(subset\_data)))}

\NormalTok{ps\_dfs\_all }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{ABG =} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{ps        =}\NormalTok{ subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ps\_abg,}
    \AttributeTok{treat     =}\NormalTok{ subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_abg,}
    \AttributeTok{ScoreType =} \StringTok{"ABG"}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{VBG =} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{ps        =}\NormalTok{ subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ps\_vbg,}
    \AttributeTok{treat     =}\NormalTok{ subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_vbg,}
    \AttributeTok{ScoreType =} \StringTok{"VBG"}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{df\_ps\_all }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(ps\_dfs\_all) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{treat     =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(treat, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"No Test"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Test"}\NormalTok{)),}
    \AttributeTok{ScoreType =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(ScoreType, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  )}

\FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(df\_ps\_all, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ ps, }\AttributeTok{fill =}\NormalTok{ treat)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_histogram}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y =} \FunctionTok{after\_stat}\NormalTok{(density)), }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{,}
                 \AttributeTok{position =} \StringTok{"identity"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{bins =} \DecValTok{30}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_fill\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"No Test"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"steelblue"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Test"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"tomato"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{facet\_wrap}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ScoreType, }\AttributeTok{scales =} \StringTok{"free\_y"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Propensity Score Distributions"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Propensity Score"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Density"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{fill =} \StringTok{"Group"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_pub}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{base\_size =} \DecValTok{12}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\pandocbounded{\includegraphics[keepaspectratio]{Results/figs/propensity-histograms-all-1.png}}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: shap top10 ipw gbm.}
\CommentTok{\# This chunk fits lightweight explainability GBM models for ABG/VBG}
\CommentTok{\# and reports top predictors by mean absolute SHAP value.}
\NormalTok{nonmi\_shap\_abg\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"shap\_top10\_ipw\_gbm\_abg.csv"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{nonmi\_shap\_vbg\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"shap\_top10\_ipw\_gbm\_vbg.csv"}\NormalTok{)}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (RUN\_SHAP }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&}\NormalTok{ HAS\_FASTSHAP) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# Build ABG/VBG design frames using the same covariates as propensity models.}
\NormalTok{  gbm\_shap\_df\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data[, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, covars\_gbm), drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{  gbm\_shap\_df\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{normalize\_types}\NormalTok{(gbm\_shap\_df\_abg, levels\_ref)}
\NormalTok{  gbm\_shap\_df\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{droplevels\_all}\NormalTok{(gbm\_shap\_df\_abg)}

\NormalTok{  gbm\_shap\_df\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data[, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, covars\_gbm), drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{  gbm\_shap\_df\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{normalize\_types}\NormalTok{(gbm\_shap\_df\_vbg, levels\_ref)}
\NormalTok{  gbm\_shap\_df\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{droplevels\_all}\NormalTok{(gbm\_shap\_df\_vbg)}

  \CommentTok{\# Fit separate GBM explainers for ABG and VBG testing models.}
  \FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{20251206}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  shap\_fit\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_weightit\_gbm\_for\_shap}\NormalTok{(formula\_abg, gbm\_shap\_df\_abg)}
  \FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{30251206}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  shap\_fit\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_weightit\_gbm\_for\_shap}\NormalTok{(formula\_vbg, gbm\_shap\_df\_vbg)}

  \CommentTok{\# Compute and rank mean |SHAP| values (top N per cohort).}
\NormalTok{  shap\_top\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{extract\_nonmi\_gbm\_shap\_top}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    shap\_fit\_abg, gbm\_shap\_df\_abg, covars\_gbm, }\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{nsim =}\NormalTok{ SHAP\_NSIM, }\AttributeTok{top\_n =}\NormalTok{ SHAP\_TOP\_N}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{  shap\_top\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{extract\_nonmi\_gbm\_shap\_top}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    shap\_fit\_vbg, gbm\_shap\_df\_vbg, covars\_gbm, }\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{nsim =}\NormalTok{ SHAP\_NSIM, }\AttributeTok{top\_n =}\NormalTok{ SHAP\_TOP\_N}
\NormalTok{  )}

  \FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(shap\_top\_abg, nonmi\_shap\_abg\_file, }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(shap\_top\_vbg, nonmi\_shap\_vbg\_file, }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}

  \CommentTok{\# Draw publication figure: ABG panel on left, VBG panel on right.}
\NormalTok{  shap\_top\_nonmi }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(shap\_top\_abg, shap\_top\_vbg)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(shap\_top\_nonmi) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{    p\_shap\_nonmi }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{plot\_shap\_top10\_two\_panel}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      shap\_top\_nonmi,}
      \StringTok{"SHAP{-}style contribution summaries for gradient{-}boosted ABG and VBG test{-}ordering models"}\NormalTok{,}
      \StringTok{"Mean |SHAP value|"}
\NormalTok{    )}
    \CommentTok{\# Save + register; display occurs after love plot for narrative flow.}
\NormalTok{    shap\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"figs"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"shap{-}top10{-}ipw{-}gbm{-}abg{-}vbg.png"}\NormalTok{)}
    \FunctionTok{save\_diag\_plot}\NormalTok{(p\_shap\_nonmi, shap\_file, }\AttributeTok{width =} \DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{dpi =} \DecValTok{300}\NormalTok{)}
    \FunctionTok{register\_plot\_file}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"shap{-}top10{-}ipw{-}gbm{-}abg{-}vbg"}\NormalTok{, shap\_file)}
\NormalTok{  \}}

  \FunctionTok{rm}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    gbm\_shap\_df\_abg, gbm\_shap\_df\_vbg, shap\_fit\_abg, shap\_fit\_vbg,}
\NormalTok{    shap\_top\_abg, shap\_top\_vbg, shap\_top\_nonmi}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{gc}\NormalTok{())}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
  \CommentTok{\# Keep output schema stable even when SHAP is disabled/unavailable.}
  \FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(), nonmi\_shap\_abg\_file, }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(), nonmi\_shap\_vbg\_file, }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: manuscript Figure S6 love plot for GBM weighting.}
\CommentTok{\# Produce a standard love{-}plot style balance display:}
\CommentTok{\# raw |SMD| vs weighted |SMD| for ABG and VBG cohorts.}
\NormalTok{covars\_balance }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(covars\_ps, }\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(subset\_data))}
\CommentTok{\# helper: convert one cobalt balance table into the long format used by the}
\CommentTok{\# manuscript love plot.}
\NormalTok{love\_data\_from\_bal }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(data, treat\_var, weights\_vec, covars, group\_label) \{}
\NormalTok{  id\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(data))}
\NormalTok{  bal\_cols }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(id\_vars, treat\_var, covars))}
\NormalTok{  bal\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ data[, bal\_cols, drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{  weights\_vec }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(weights\_vec) }\SpecialCharTok{\&} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(weights\_vec), weights\_vec, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(bal\_df) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L) \{}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{group =} \FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{(), }\AttributeTok{term =} \FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{(),}
                      \AttributeTok{abs\_smd\_raw =} \FunctionTok{numeric}\NormalTok{(), }\AttributeTok{abs\_smd\_ipw =} \FunctionTok{numeric}\NormalTok{(),}
                      \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  treat\_vals }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{na.omit}\NormalTok{(bal\_df[[treat\_var]]))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(treat\_vals) }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L) \{}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{group =} \FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{(), }\AttributeTok{term =} \FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{(),}
                      \AttributeTok{abs\_smd\_raw =} \FunctionTok{numeric}\NormalTok{(), }\AttributeTok{abs\_smd\_ipw =} \FunctionTok{numeric}\NormalTok{(),}
                      \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  bal\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{normalize\_types}\NormalTok{(bal\_df, levels\_ref)}
\NormalTok{  bal\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{droplevels\_all}\NormalTok{(bal\_df)}
\NormalTok{  bal\_formula }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{as.formula}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(treat\_var, }\StringTok{"\textasciitilde{}"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(covars, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{" + "}\NormalTok{)))}
\NormalTok{  bal\_obj }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ cobalt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bal.tab}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    bal\_formula,}
    \AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ bal\_df,}
    \AttributeTok{weights =}\NormalTok{ weights\_vec,}
    \AttributeTok{un =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{method =} \StringTok{"weighting"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{estimand =} \StringTok{"ATE"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{quick =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{  bal\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.data.frame}\NormalTok{(bal\_obj}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Balance, }\AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  bal\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{term }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rownames}\NormalTok{(bal\_tbl)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Diff.Un"} \SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(bal\_tbl))) bal\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Diff.Un }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Diff.Adj"} \SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(bal\_tbl))) bal\_tbl}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Diff.Adj }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}
\NormalTok{  bal\_tbl }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{transmute}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{group =}\NormalTok{ group\_label,}
      \AttributeTok{term =}\NormalTok{ term,}
      \AttributeTok{abs\_smd\_raw =} \FunctionTok{abs}\NormalTok{(.data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Diff.Un),}
      \AttributeTok{abs\_smd\_ipw =} \FunctionTok{abs}\NormalTok{(.data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Diff.Adj)}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{lov\_nonmi }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{love\_data\_from\_bal}\NormalTok{(subset\_data, }\StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{, subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{w\_abg, covars\_balance, }\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{love\_data\_from\_bal}\NormalTok{(subset\_data, }\StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{w\_vbg, covars\_balance, }\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  lov\_nonmi }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}

\NormalTok{  lov\_nonmi }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}

\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  lov\_nonmi\_long,}
  \StringTok{"Covariate balance after gradient{-}boosted propensity weighting for ABG and VBG test{-}ordering models"}
\NormalTok{)}

\end{Highlighting}

\NormalTok{shap\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ utils}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{read.csv}\NormalTok{(shap\_vbg\_file, }\AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
