\section{Multiple Imputation (and logistic
IPSW)}\label{multiple-imputation-and-logistic-ipsw}

added 12/6/2025

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Packages are centrally loaded in setup{-}packages.}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ensure\_packages\_loaded"}\NormalTok{))}
\FunctionTok{ensure\_packages\_loaded}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"mice"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"miceadds"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"naniar"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"visdat"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"skimr"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"WeightIt"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"gbm"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"survey"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"cobalt"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"broom"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"dplyr"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"ggplot2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"mitools"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"parallel"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"future"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"future.apply"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"progressr"}
\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{mi\_mids\_file    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mi\_abg\_vbg\_mids.rds"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{mi\_logistic\_ps\_abg\_file   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mi\_logistic\_ps\_abg\_list.rds"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{mi\_logistic\_ps\_vbg\_file   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mi\_logistic\_ps\_vbg\_list.rds"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{mi\_pooled\_file  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mi\_pooled\_results.rds"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Use sequential futures to avoid PSOCK cluster startup failures during render}
\NormalTok{future}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{plan}\NormalTok{(sequential)}

\CommentTok{\# choose a handler, but DO NOT make it global inside a knitted document}
\NormalTok{progressr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{handlers}\NormalTok{(progressr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\NormalTok{handler\_rstudio)   }\CommentTok{\# or handler\_txtprogressbar}
\FunctionTok{options}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{future.rng.onMisuse =} \StringTok{"error"}\NormalTok{)            }\CommentTok{\# safer RNG with futures}

\FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{20251206}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# ensure a writable figure dir + stable device on macOS}
\NormalTok{fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{dir\_create}\NormalTok{(fig\_dir, }\AttributeTok{recurse =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{knitr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\NormalTok{opts\_chunk}\SpecialCharTok{$}\FunctionTok{set}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{fig.path =}\NormalTok{ fig\_path, }\AttributeTok{dev =} \StringTok{"png"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{dpi =} \DecValTok{300}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{options}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{bitmapType =} \StringTok{"cairo"}\NormalTok{)  }\CommentTok{\# prevents device issues on macOS}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: mi settings.}
\NormalTok{M\_IMP    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (IS\_PILOT) }\DecValTok{20}\NormalTok{L }\ControlFlowTok{else} \DecValTok{80}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{MAXIT\_MI }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (IS\_PILOT) }\DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{L }\ControlFlowTok{else} \DecValTok{20}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{MI\_SEED  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{20251206}
\NormalTok{DEBUG\_SPLINE }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{M\_IMP\_TARGET }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (IS\_PILOT) }\DecValTok{20}\NormalTok{L }\ControlFlowTok{else} \DecValTok{80}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{M\_IMP\_MIN }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (IS\_PILOT) }\DecValTok{20}\NormalTok{L }\ControlFlowTok{else} \DecValTok{50}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{M\_IMP\_STEP }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{10}
\NormalTok{MCERR\_RATIO\_TARGET }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{0.10}
\NormalTok{ALLOW\_M\_IMP\_EARLY\_STOP }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{FALSE}

\CommentTok{\# MI propensity model (MI{-}only)}
\NormalTok{MI\_PS\_METHOD    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"glm\_rcs4"}
\NormalTok{MI\_PS\_SPLINE\_K  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{MI\_GLM\_MAXIT    }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{25}\NormalTok{L}

\NormalTok{MINCOR\_QUICKPRED }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{0.05}
\NormalTok{MINPUC\_QUICKPRED }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{0.25}
\NormalTok{MAX\_PRED\_PER\_VAR }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{40}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{MAX\_MM\_COLS }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{300}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{MAX\_LEVELS\_PRED }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{COR\_SAMPLE\_N }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{50000}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{MI\_MAX\_BYTES }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{8e9}

\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"MI\_RAM\_GB"}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"MI\_BATCH\_START"}\NormalTok{))}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(MI\_RAM\_GB), MI\_RAM\_GB }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, MI\_BATCH\_START }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L)}
\NormalTok{MI\_BATCH\_MIN }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{MI\_BATCH\_SEED\_STRIDE }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{100000}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{MI\_GC\_EVERY\_BATCH }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{MI\_PREEMPTIVE\_BATCH\_REDUCE }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{MI\_VCELLS\_FRAC\_THRESHOLD }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FloatTok{0.80}
\NormalTok{MI\_SMOKE\_TEST }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{MI\_DEBUG\_PRINTFLAG }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{MI\_MEMORY\_HYGIENE }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{FORCE\_MI\_BATCHED }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{FALSE}

\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"RUN\_MODE"}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"FULL\_RUN"}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{M\_IMP }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ M\_IMP\_TARGET}
\NormalTok{M\_IMP\_MIN }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(M\_IMP\_MIN, }\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (IS\_PILOT) }\DecValTok{20}\NormalTok{L }\ControlFlowTok{else} \DecValTok{50}\NormalTok{L)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{isTRUE}\NormalTok{(DEBUG\_SPLINE)) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"DEBUG\_SPLINE must be FALSE; pilot and full runs must use the same model workflow."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(M\_IMP }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=}\NormalTok{ M\_IMP\_MIN, M\_IMP }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}=} \DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(MI\_PS\_METHOD }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"glm\_rcs4"}\NormalTok{))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Key covariates + outcomes used in MI (plus report{-}only BNP/Spo2)}
\NormalTok{extra\_miss\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"bnp"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"spo2"}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(subset\_data\_raw))}
\NormalTok{miss\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  covars\_ps,}
\NormalTok{  extra\_miss\_vars,}
  \StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_o2sat"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}
\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{miss\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(miss\_vars, }\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(subset\_data\_raw))}

\NormalTok{miss\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data\_raw }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(miss\_vars)) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{summarise}\NormalTok{(dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{across}\NormalTok{(dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{everything}\NormalTok{(), }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(.)))) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  tidyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{pivot\_longer}\NormalTok{(dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{everything}\NormalTok{(), }\AttributeTok{names\_to =} \StringTok{"variable"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{values\_to =} \StringTok{"n\_missing"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{total\_n     =} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(subset\_data\_raw),}
    \AttributeTok{pct\_missing =} \DecValTok{100} \SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ n\_missing }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ total\_n}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{desc}\NormalTok{(pct\_missing))}

\NormalTok{miss\_tbl\_disp }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ miss\_tbl }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{n\_missing   =}\NormalTok{ scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{comma}\NormalTok{(n\_missing),}
    \AttributeTok{pct\_missing =} \FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\%.1f\%\%"}\NormalTok{, pct\_missing)}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(variable, n\_missing, pct\_missing)}

\CommentTok{\# Keep the full table in artifacts; suppress this low{-}value, very long display in PDF.}
\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(miss\_tbl, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"missingness\_preimputation\_full.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# MI propensity model helpers (glm with RCS on continuous covariates)}
\NormalTok{ps\_is\_continuous }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(v, df) \{}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ df[[v]]}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.numeric}\NormalTok{(x)) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ x[}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(x)]}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(x) }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(x)) }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
  \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: build the MI logistic propensity{-}score formula with spline terms for}
\CommentTok{\# continuous predictors and plain terms for categorical predictors.}
\NormalTok{build\_mi\_ps\_formula }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(treat, covars, df, }\AttributeTok{k =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{L, }\AttributeTok{basis =} \StringTok{"rcs"}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  cont }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ covars[}\FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(covars, ps\_is\_continuous, }\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{df =}\NormalTok{ df)]}
\NormalTok{  catv }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(covars, cont)}
\NormalTok{  term\_cont }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{()}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(cont)) \{}
\NormalTok{    term\_cont }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (basis }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"rcs"}\NormalTok{) \{}
      \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"rms::rcs(\textasciigrave{}"}\NormalTok{, cont, }\StringTok{"\textasciigrave{}, "}\NormalTok{, k, }\StringTok{")"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    \} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
      \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"splines::ns(\textasciigrave{}"}\NormalTok{, cont, }\StringTok{"\textasciigrave{}, "}\NormalTok{, k, }\StringTok{")"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  term\_cat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(catv)) }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textasciigrave{}"}\NormalTok{, catv, }\StringTok{"\textasciigrave{}"}\NormalTok{) }\ControlFlowTok{else} \FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{  rhs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(term\_cont, term\_cat)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(rhs)) }\FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"No covariates available for MI PS model."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{as.formula}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textasciigrave{}"}\NormalTok{, treat, }\StringTok{"\textasciigrave{} \textasciitilde{} "}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(rhs, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{" + "}\NormalTok{)))}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: fit one MI logistic propensity model and return both propensities and}
\CommentTok{\# enough metadata to audit convergence and pooling inputs.}
\NormalTok{fit\_mi\_ps\_glm }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(df, treat, covars, }\AttributeTok{k =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{L, }\AttributeTok{maxit =} \DecValTok{25}\NormalTok{L, }\AttributeTok{context =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# Primary MI weighting uses logistic propensity models with flexible spline}
  \CommentTok{\# terms for continuous predictors. This keeps the PS model transparent and}
  \CommentTok{\# straightforward to pool across imputations.}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(treat, covars) }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(df)))}
\NormalTok{  df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{droplevels\_all}\NormalTok{(df)}
\NormalTok{  basis }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{requireNamespace}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"rms"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{quietly =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)) }\StringTok{"rcs"} \ControlFlowTok{else} \StringTok{"ns"}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(context)) \{}
\NormalTok{    context }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{make\_context}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{stage =} \StringTok{"MI"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{component =} \StringTok{"mi\_ps\_glm"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{analysis\_variant =} \StringTok{"weighted\_imputed"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{model\_type =} \StringTok{"ps"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{group =} \ConstantTok{NA\_character\_}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{outcome =} \ConstantTok{NA\_character\_}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{imputation =} \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{batch =} \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  fit\_once }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(basis\_type) \{}
    \CommentTok{\# Prefer rms::rcs() when available for continuity with prior analyses, but}
    \CommentTok{\# fall back to natural splines if the rcs path is unavailable or unstable.}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (basis\_type }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"rcs"}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{      dd }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ rms}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{datadist}\NormalTok{(df)}
\NormalTok{      old\_opt }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{options}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{datadist =} \StringTok{".\_\_dd\_ps\_\_"}\NormalTok{)}
      \FunctionTok{assign}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{".\_\_dd\_ps\_\_"}\NormalTok{, dd, }\AttributeTok{envir =}\NormalTok{ .GlobalEnv)}
      \FunctionTok{on.exit}\NormalTok{(\{}
        \FunctionTok{options}\NormalTok{(old\_opt)}
        \FunctionTok{rm}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{list =} \StringTok{".\_\_dd\_ps\_\_"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{envir =}\NormalTok{ .GlobalEnv)}
\NormalTok{      \}, }\AttributeTok{add =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{    form }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{build\_mi\_ps\_formula}\NormalTok{(treat, covars, df, }\AttributeTok{k =}\NormalTok{ k, }\AttributeTok{basis =}\NormalTok{ basis\_type)}
\NormalTok{    cap }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{capture\_warnings}\NormalTok{(}
      \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{        stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{glm}\NormalTok{(form, }\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ df, }\AttributeTok{family =}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{binomial}\NormalTok{(),}
                   \AttributeTok{control =}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{glm.control}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{maxit =}\NormalTok{ maxit),}
                   \AttributeTok{model =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{x =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{),}
        \AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) e}
\NormalTok{      ),}
      \AttributeTok{context =}\NormalTok{ context}
\NormalTok{    )}
    \FunctionTok{append\_warnings}\NormalTok{(cap}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{warnings)}
    \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{fit =}\NormalTok{ cap}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{value, }\AttributeTok{formula =}\NormalTok{ form, }\AttributeTok{basis =}\NormalTok{ basis\_type)}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  res }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_once}\NormalTok{(basis)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{inherits}\NormalTok{(res}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{fit, }\StringTok{"error"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&}\NormalTok{ basis }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"rcs"}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{    res }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_once}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ns"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{inherits}\NormalTok{(res}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{fit, }\StringTok{"error"}\NormalTok{)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{error =} \FunctionTok{conditionMessage}\NormalTok{(res}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{fit), }\AttributeTok{method =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"glm\_"}\NormalTok{, res}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{basis)))}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  ps }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(res}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{fitted.values)}

\subsubsection{Missingness structure and
drivers}\label{missingness-structure-and-drivers}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: mi missing structure.}

\CommentTok{\# Use raw data for missingness rates; normalized data for model{-}based drivers}
\NormalTok{miss\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data\_raw}
\NormalTok{model\_data }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data}

\CommentTok{\# Focus on key variables (same as MI set) for consistency}
\NormalTok{extra\_miss\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"bnp"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"spo2"}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(miss\_data))}
\NormalTok{miss\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  covars\_ps,}
\NormalTok{  extra\_miss\_vars,}
  \StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_o2sat"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}
\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{miss\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(miss\_vars, }\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(miss\_data))}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(miss\_vars) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Strata to compare missingness across}
\NormalTok{strata\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{,}
                 \StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"encounter\_type"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"location"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{strata\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(strata\_vars, }\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(miss\_data))}

\CommentTok{\# Overall missingness \%}
\NormalTok{miss\_overall }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ miss\_data }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{summarise}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{across}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(miss\_vars), }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(.)) }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{pivot\_longer}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{everything}\NormalTok{(), }\AttributeTok{names\_to =} \StringTok{"variable"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{values\_to =} \StringTok{"pct\_missing\_overall"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Missingness \% on model\_data (used for driver models)}
\NormalTok{miss\_overall\_model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ model\_data }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{summarise}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{across}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(miss\_vars, }\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(model\_data))), }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(.)) }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{pivot\_longer}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{everything}\NormalTok{(), }\AttributeTok{names\_to =} \StringTok{"variable"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{values\_to =} \StringTok{"pct\_missing\_overall\_model"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Missingness by strata (percent within each level)}
\NormalTok{miss\_by\_strata }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ purrr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{map\_dfr}\NormalTok{(strata\_vars, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(sv) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# drop the current grouping variable from targets}
\NormalTok{  vars\_here }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(miss\_vars, }\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(miss\_data)), sv)}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(vars\_here) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L)}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(sv }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(miss\_data))}

\NormalTok{  miss\_data }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(.data[[sv]]) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{summarise}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{across}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(vars\_here), }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(.)) }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{100}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{.groups =} \StringTok{"drop"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{pivot\_longer}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(sv), }\AttributeTok{names\_to =} \StringTok{"variable"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{values\_to =} \StringTok{"pct\_missing"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{rename}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{level =} \SpecialCharTok{!!}\FunctionTok{sym}\NormalTok{(sv)) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{stratum =}\NormalTok{ sv,}
      \AttributeTok{level   =} \FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(level)}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{\})}

\CommentTok{\# Combine overall + strata (save full table; display full table in PDF)}
\NormalTok{miss\_panel\_full }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ miss\_by\_strata }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{left\_join}\NormalTok{(miss\_overall, }\AttributeTok{by =} \StringTok{"variable"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{desc}\NormalTok{(pct\_missing\_overall), stratum, level)}

\NormalTok{miss\_panel\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"missingness{-}by{-}strata.csv"}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(miss\_panel\_full, miss\_panel\_file, }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}

\FunctionTok{render\_table\_pdf\_maybe}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  miss\_panel\_full,}
  \AttributeTok{caption =} \StringTok{"Missingness by key strata (pre{-}imputation)."}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{file\_stub =} \StringTok{"missingness\_by\_strata"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{digits =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{show =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Highlighting}[]

\noindent

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# {-}{-}{-} Drivers of missingness (logit I(NA) on observed covariates) {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\CommentTok{\# Candidate predictors (observed covariates only)}
\NormalTok{driver\_covars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"age\_at\_encounter"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"sex"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"encounter\_type"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"location"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"curr\_bmi"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(model\_data)}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Fit models for variables with any missingness}
\NormalTok{vars\_to\_model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ miss\_overall\_model }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(pct\_missing\_overall\_model }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{pull}\NormalTok{(variable)}
\NormalTok{vars\_to\_model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(vars\_to\_model, }\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(model\_data))}

\NormalTok{skip\_log }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{()}

\NormalTok{model\_results }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ purrr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{map\_dfr}\NormalTok{(vars\_to\_model, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(v) \{}
\NormalTok{  df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ model\_data }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all\_of}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(v, driver\_covars))) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{miss =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(.data[[v]])))}

  \CommentTok{\# use only rows with observed predictors and varying miss indicator}
\NormalTok{  df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ df[stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{complete.cases}\NormalTok{(df[driver\_covars]), , drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(df) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L) \{}
\NormalTok{    skip\_log[[}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(skip\_log) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L]] }\OtherTok{\textless{}\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{variable =}\NormalTok{ v,}
      \AttributeTok{reason =} \StringTok{"no\_complete\_cases"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{    )}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{())}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{n\_distinct}\NormalTok{(df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{miss) }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L) \{}
\NormalTok{    skip\_log[[}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(skip\_log) }\SpecialCharTok{+} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L]] }\OtherTok{\textless{}\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{variable =}\NormalTok{ v,}
      \AttributeTok{reason =} \StringTok{"miss\_indicator\_constant"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{    )}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{())}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  fml }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.formula}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"miss \textasciitilde{} "}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(driver\_covars, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{" + "}\NormalTok{)))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(driver\_covars) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L) \{}
\NormalTok{    diag\_outcome }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"missing\_"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{make.names}\NormalTok{(v))}
\NormalTok{    diag\_terms }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\textasciigrave{}"}\NormalTok{, driver\_covars, }\StringTok{"\textasciigrave{}"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{" + "}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    diag\_fml }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{as.formula}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(diag\_outcome, }\StringTok{" \textasciitilde{} "}\NormalTok{, diag\_terms))}
    \FunctionTok{register\_model\_diagram}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Missingness model:"}\NormalTok{, v), diag\_fml, }\AttributeTok{width =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}
    \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{glm}\NormalTok{(fml, }\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ df, }\AttributeTok{family =} \FunctionTok{binomial}\NormalTok{())),}

\NormalTok{  )}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{inherits}\NormalTok{(fit, }\StringTok{"error"}\NormalTok{)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Missingness driver: glm failed for variable "}\NormalTok{, v)}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  broom}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tidy}\NormalTok{(fit, }\AttributeTok{conf.int =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{exponentiate =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}

\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{transmute}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{variable =}\NormalTok{ v,}
\NormalTok{      term,}
\NormalTok{      OR,}
\NormalTok{      LCL,}
\NormalTok{      UCL,}
\NormalTok{      p.value}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{\})}

\NormalTok{skip\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(skip\_log)}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(model\_results) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  model\_results\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"missingness{-}drivers.csv"}\NormalTok{)}

  \FunctionTok{render\_table\_pdf\_maybe}\NormalTok{(}

    \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(model\_results\_stub, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"missingness{-}drivers.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"No modelable missingness signals (all complete or no variation)."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsubsection{Monte Carlo error check after
MI}\label{monte-carlo-error-check-after-mi}

\subsection{Pre‑imputation data prep (consistent types \&
predictors)}\label{preimputation-data-prep-consistent-types-predictors}

\textbf{Why}: MI models need coherent types; using exactly the same
covariates as the propensity score models avoids model drift.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Types are normalized in the schema{-}normalize block.}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Quick invariant checks after type normalization (fail fast before MI/weighting)}
\NormalTok{req\_outcomes }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{missing\_out  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(req\_outcomes, }\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(subset\_data))}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(missing\_out)) }\FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Missing outcome columns: "}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(missing\_out, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{))}

\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{is.factor}\NormalTok{(subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sex),}
  \FunctionTok{nlevels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{droplevels}\NormalTok{(subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sex)) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
  \FunctionTok{is.factor}\NormalTok{(subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{race\_ethnicity),}
  \FunctionTok{nlevels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{droplevels}\NormalTok{(subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{race\_ethnicity)) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
  \FunctionTok{is.factor}\NormalTok{(subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{encounter\_type),}
  \FunctionTok{nlevels}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{droplevels}\NormalTok{(subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{encounter\_type)) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
  \FunctionTok{is.numeric}\NormalTok{(subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_abg),}
  \FunctionTok{is.numeric}\NormalTok{(subset\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_vbg)}
\NormalTok{)}

\ControlFlowTok{for}\NormalTok{ (col }\ControlFlowTok{in}\NormalTok{ req\_outcomes) \{}
\NormalTok{  vals }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data[[col]]}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.numeric}\NormalTok{(vals)) }\FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(col, }\StringTok{" is not numeric"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  bad }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(vals) }\SpecialCharTok{\&} \SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{vals }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(bad)) }\FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(col, }\StringTok{" has non{-}binary values"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Imputation model specification
(MICE)}\label{imputation-model-specification-mice}

\subsubsection{Predictor matrix \& methods. Run MICE (moderate settings
for
scale)}\label{predictor-matrix-methods.-run-mice-moderate-settings-for-scale}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# {-}{-}{-} variables for propensity score model (kept identical to main analysis) {-}{-}{-}}
\CommentTok{\# {-}{-}{-}{-} MICE setup: include PaCO2/VBG CO2 as predictors but do not impute {-}{-}{-}{-}}

\CommentTok{\# {-}{-}{-} add analysis targets and CO2 measures explicitly {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\NormalTok{mi\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  covars\_ps,}
  \StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{,                                  }\CommentTok{\# treatments (NOT imputed)}
  \StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{,  }\CommentTok{\# outcomes (NOT imputed)}
\NormalTok{  co2\_vars}
\NormalTok{)), drop\_vars\_ultra\_missing)}

\NormalTok{mi\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ subset\_data[, mi\_vars, drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{mi\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{normalize\_types}\NormalTok{(mi\_df, levels\_ref)}

\NormalTok{mi\_df\_size }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ utils}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{object.size}\NormalTok{(mi\_df)}
\FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"MI data size (bytes): "}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{format}\NormalTok{(mi\_df\_size, }\AttributeTok{units =} \StringTok{"auto"}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# Rough memory preflight based on total missing cells (imputed values only).}
\NormalTok{miss\_counts }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(mi\_df, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) }\FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(x)), }\FunctionTok{numeric}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{miss\_total }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(miss\_counts)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(miss\_total) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&}\NormalTok{ miss\_total }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  est\_bytes }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ miss\_total }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ M\_IMP }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{8}
  \FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"MI imputation storage estimate: "}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{format}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{structure}\NormalTok{(est\_bytes, }\AttributeTok{class =} \StringTok{"object\_size"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{units =} \StringTok{"auto"}\NormalTok{))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (est\_bytes }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ MI\_MAX\_BYTES) \{}
\NormalTok{    m\_max }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{floor}\NormalTok{(MI\_MAX\_BYTES }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (miss\_total }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{8}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{    m\_target }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{50}\NormalTok{L, m\_max)}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (m\_target }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \DecValTok{50}\NormalTok{L) \{}
      \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Estimated MI storage exceeds memory (m="}\NormalTok{, M\_IMP,}
           \StringTok{", estimated="}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{format}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{structure}\NormalTok{(est\_bytes, }\AttributeTok{class =} \StringTok{"object\_size"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{units =} \StringTok{"auto"}\NormalTok{),}
           \StringTok{"). Reduce missingness or MI scope, or increase available memory."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    \}}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (m\_target }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\NormalTok{ M\_IMP) \{}
      \FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Reducing M\_IMP from "}\NormalTok{, M\_IMP, }\StringTok{" to "}\NormalTok{, m\_target,}
              \StringTok{" to stay within MI\_MAX\_BYTES."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      M\_IMP }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ m\_target}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# Make binary comorbids factors so "logreg" is used (and stays binary)}
\NormalTok{bin\_covars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"copd"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"asthma"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"osa"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"chf"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"acute\_nmd"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"phtn"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"ckd"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"dm"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{missing\_bin }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(bin\_covars, }\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(mi\_df))}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(missing\_bin) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{mi\_df[bin\_covars] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(mi\_df[bin\_covars], }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(z) \{}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.factor}\NormalTok{(z)) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{droplevels}\NormalTok{(z))}
\NormalTok{  zz }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(z))}
  \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(zz, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L,}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L), }\AttributeTok{labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"0"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"1"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{\})}

\CommentTok{\# For MICE: convert any remaining characters → factors}
\NormalTok{mi\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(mi\_df, }\FunctionTok{across}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{where}\NormalTok{(is.character), }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(.x)))}

\CommentTok{\# Guardrail: high{-}cardinality factors can blow up MICE model matrices.}
\CommentTok{\# Exclude them from predictorMatrix and (if missing) make "Missing" explicit.}
\NormalTok{high\_card }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{which}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(mi\_df, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) }\FunctionTok{is.factor}\NormalTok{(x) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \FunctionTok{nlevels}\NormalTok{(x) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ MAX\_LEVELS\_PRED, }\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))))}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(high\_card)) \{}
  \FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"MICE: high{-}cardinality factors detected (nlevels \textgreater{} "}\NormalTok{, MAX\_LEVELS\_PRED, }\StringTok{"): "}\NormalTok{,}
          \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(high\_card, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{))}
  \ControlFlowTok{for}\NormalTok{ (v }\ControlFlowTok{in}\NormalTok{ high\_card) \{}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(mi\_df[[v]]))) \{}
\NormalTok{      lv }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{levels}\NormalTok{(mi\_df[[v]])}
\NormalTok{      tmp }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(mi\_df[[v]])}
\NormalTok{      tmp[}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(tmp)] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"Missing"}
\NormalTok{      mi\_df[[v]] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(tmp, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(lv, }\StringTok{"Missing"}\NormalTok{)))}
      \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(levels\_ref) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(levels\_ref[[v]]) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&}
          \SpecialCharTok{!}\StringTok{"Missing"} \SpecialCharTok{\%in\%}\NormalTok{ levels\_ref[[v]]) \{}
\NormalTok{        levels\_ref[[v]] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(levels\_ref[[v]], }\StringTok{"Missing"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      \}}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# {-}{-}{-} methods \& predictor matrix aligned to *mi\_df* {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\NormalTok{meth }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ mice}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{make.method}\NormalTok{(mi\_df)}

\NormalTok{is\_fac      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(mi\_df, is.factor,  }\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{is\_num      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(mi\_df, is.numeric, }\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{is\_bin\_fac  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(mi\_df, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) }\FunctionTok{is.factor}\NormalTok{(x)  }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \FunctionTok{nlevels}\NormalTok{(x) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{is\_multicat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(mi\_df, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) }\FunctionTok{is.factor}\NormalTok{(x)  }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \FunctionTok{nlevels}\NormalTok{(x) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}}  \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}

\CommentTok{\# robust defaults}
\NormalTok{meth[is\_num]      }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"pmm"}      \CommentTok{\# numerics: predictive mean matching}
\NormalTok{meth[is\_multicat] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"polyreg"}  \CommentTok{\# unordered multicategory}
\NormalTok{meth[is\_bin\_fac]  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"logreg"}   \CommentTok{\# binary factors: logistic regression}

\CommentTok{\# never impute treatments, outcomes, or CO2 exposures}
\NormalTok{no\_imp }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{,}
            \StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(high\_card)) no\_imp }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(no\_imp, high\_card))}
\NormalTok{meth[}\FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(meth), no\_imp)] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{""}

\CommentTok{\# predictor matrix; force has\_abg/has\_vbg as predictors, but do not impute no\_imp}
\NormalTok{pred }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ mice}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{quickpred}\NormalTok{(mi\_df, }\AttributeTok{mincor =}\NormalTok{ MINCOR\_QUICKPRED, }\AttributeTok{minpuc =}\NormalTok{ MINPUC\_QUICKPRED)}
\ControlFlowTok{for}\NormalTok{ (nm }\ControlFlowTok{in} \FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(pred))) \{}
\NormalTok{  pred[, nm] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1}
\NormalTok{\}}
\NormalTok{pred[}\FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{rownames}\NormalTok{(pred), no\_imp), ] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{0}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(high\_card)) \{}
\NormalTok{  pred[, }\FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(high\_card, }\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(pred))] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{0}
\NormalTok{  pred[}\FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(high\_card, }\FunctionTok{rownames}\NormalTok{(pred)), ] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{0}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# Ensure dropped covariates do not appear as predictors}
\NormalTok{drop\_covars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(drop\_vars\_ultra\_missing, }\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(pred))}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(drop\_covars)) \{}
\NormalTok{  pred[, drop\_covars] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{0}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# Non{-}imputed variables with missingness should NOT be predictors}
\NormalTok{no\_imp\_with\_missing }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(no\_imp, }\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(mi\_df))}
\NormalTok{no\_imp\_with\_missing }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ no\_imp\_with\_missing[}
  \FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(mi\_df[no\_imp\_with\_missing], }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) }\FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(x)), }\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{no\_imp\_with\_missing }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(no\_imp\_with\_missing, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{pred\_cols\_check }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(pred))}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(pred\_cols\_check)) \{}
  \FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"MICE: predictor column sums (pre{-}exclude) for "}\NormalTok{,}
    \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(pred\_cols\_check, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{),}
    \StringTok{": "}\NormalTok{,}
    \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{colSums}\NormalTok{(pred[, pred\_cols\_check, }\AttributeTok{drop =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]), }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(no\_imp\_with\_missing)) \{}
\NormalTok{  pred[, }\FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(no\_imp\_with\_missing, }\FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(pred))] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{0}
  \FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"MICE: excluded non{-}imputed missing predictors: "}\NormalTok{,}
          \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(no\_imp\_with\_missing, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{\}}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(pred\_cols\_check)) \{}
  \FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"MICE: predictor column sums (post{-}exclude) for "}\NormalTok{,}
    \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(pred\_cols\_check, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{),}
    \StringTok{": "}\NormalTok{,}
    \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{colSums}\NormalTok{(pred[, pred\_cols\_check, }\AttributeTok{drop =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]), }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# Ensure key covariates with missingness have predictors (avoid zero{-}row pred)}
\NormalTok{core\_preds }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"age\_at\_encounter"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"sex"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"race\_ethnicity"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"location"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"encounter\_type"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{colnames}\NormalTok{(pred)}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{core\_preds }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(core\_preds, no\_imp\_with\_missing)}
\NormalTok{vars\_need\_pred }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(covars\_ps, }\FunctionTok{rownames}\NormalTok{(pred))}
\NormalTok{vars\_need\_pred }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(vars\_need\_pred, no\_imp)}
\NormalTok{vars\_need\_pred }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ vars\_need\_pred[}\FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(mi\_df[vars\_need\_pred], }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) }\FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(x)), }\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))]}
\NormalTok{zero\_pred }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ vars\_need\_pred[}\FunctionTok{rowSums}\NormalTok{(pred[vars\_need\_pred, , }\AttributeTok{drop =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{] }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{]}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(zero\_pred)) \{}
  \FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"MICE predictor rows empty for: "}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(zero\_pred, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{),}
          \StringTok{". Adding core predictors."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  pred[zero\_pred, core\_preds] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1}
\NormalTok{\}}
\NormalTok{pred[}\FunctionTok{intersect}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{rownames}\NormalTok{(pred), no\_imp), ] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{0}
\NormalTok{pred[}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(zero\_pred), }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(zero\_pred)] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{0}

\CommentTok{\# {-}{-}{-} Preflight and cap predictor rows to avoid huge model matrices {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}

\NormalTok{n\_mm\_cols }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(pred\_row, df) \{}
\NormalTok{  preds }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{which}\NormalTok{(pred\_row }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  cols }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L}
  \ControlFlowTok{for}\NormalTok{ (p }\ControlFlowTok{in}\NormalTok{ preds) \{}
\NormalTok{    x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ df[[p]]}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.factor}\NormalTok{(x)) \{}
\NormalTok{      lv }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{nlevels}\NormalTok{(x)}
\NormalTok{      cols }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ cols }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L, lv }\SpecialCharTok{{-}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L)}
\NormalTok{    \} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{      cols }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ cols }\SpecialCharTok{+} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  cols}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: summarize the effective width of each MICE predictor row before and}
\CommentTok{\# after capping so memory pressure is visible in exported diagnostics.}
\NormalTok{pred\_width\_preflight }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(pred, df, meth) \{}
\NormalTok{  vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(meth)[meth }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{  vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ vars[}\FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(df[vars], }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) }\FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(x)), }\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))]}
\NormalTok{  rows }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(vars, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(v) \{}
\NormalTok{    pred\_row }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ pred[v, ]}
\NormalTok{    n\_pred }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(pred\_row }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    mm\_cols }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{n\_mm\_cols}\NormalTok{(pred\_row, df)}
\NormalTok{    x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ df[[v]]}
\NormalTok{    nlevels\_v }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.factor}\NormalTok{(x)) }\FunctionTok{nlevels}\NormalTok{(x) }\ControlFlowTok{else} \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}

    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.numeric}\NormalTok{(dat\_long[[v]])) \{}

        \FunctionTok{theme\_pub}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{    \} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{      df\_plot }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dat\_long }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{        dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(.data[[v]]))}
\NormalTok{      p }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(df\_plot, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ .data[[v]], }\AttributeTok{fill =}\NormalTok{ .imp\_label)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}

\NormalTok{        \}}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# {-}{-}{-} Lean missingness audit (memory{-}safe) {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# 3) Small heatmap on imputed data (rows/cols sampled)}

\NormalTok{R }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1500}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(dat\_imp))}
