\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# 4) Optional, but often heavy: UpSet of co{-}missingness – skip by default.}
\CommentTok{\# If you really want it, do it for top 6–10 variables only:}
\CommentTok{\# naniar::gg\_miss\_upset(dat\_imp[, head(top\_vars, 8), drop = FALSE])}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Refit propensity models within each
imputation}\label{refit-propensity-models-within-each-imputation}

MI propensity scores use logistic regression with restricted cubic
splines (\texttt{rms::rcs}, 4 knots by default) for continuous
covariates; the same covariate set used in non‑MI models is reused here
(\texttt{covars\_ps}). IPSW truncation rules are unchanged.

Note: the MI computations below run in a single pass per imputation
(weights, balance, cat3, spline). Subsequent MI sections reuse those
outputs and will stop if they are missing.

\subsubsection{FAIL-FAST CHECKS}\label{fail-fast-checks}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: fail fast checks.}
\CommentTok{\# These checks intentionally stop early if MI state is not valid.}
\CommentTok{\# Failing here is cheaper than failing deep in long modeling loops.}
\NormalTok{mi\_min\_required }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (IS\_PILOT) }\DecValTok{20}\NormalTok{L }\ControlFlowTok{else} \DecValTok{50}\NormalTok{L}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (M\_IMP }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\NormalTok{ mi\_min\_required) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"M\_IMP must be \textgreater{}= "}\NormalTok{, mi\_min\_required, }\StringTok{". Current M\_IMP = "}\NormalTok{, M\_IMP)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imp"}\NormalTok{))}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (imp}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{m }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}}\NormalTok{ mi\_min\_required) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imp$m must be \textgreater{}= "}\NormalTok{, mi\_min\_required, }\StringTok{". Current imp$m = "}\NormalTok{, imp}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{m)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# Ensure no missing covariates in each imputation for WeightIt}
\ControlFlowTok{for}\NormalTok{ (i }\ControlFlowTok{in} \FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(imp}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{m)) \{}
\NormalTok{  di }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{get\_imp}\NormalTok{(i)}
  \CommentTok{\# Weighting models require complete covariates after MI.}
  \FunctionTok{assert\_no\_na\_covars}\NormalTok{(di, covars\_ps, }\AttributeTok{context =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imputation "}\NormalTok{, i))}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# This single{-}pass loop computes MI weights, target balance, 3{-}level outcomes,}
\CommentTok{\# and spline outcomes in one traversal of imputations to avoid repeated}
\CommentTok{\# mice::complete() calls and re{-}normalization.}

\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imp"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{imp\_n }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ imp}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{m}
\NormalTok{mi\_single\_pass\_t0 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{Sys.time}\NormalTok{()}

\CommentTok{\# {-}{-}{-} Helper: fit ABG/VBG weights for a single imputation {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\NormalTok{fit\_abg\_one }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(d, imp\_index) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# Build PS design frame for this imputation.}
\NormalTok{  d\_ps }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ d[, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, covars\_ps), drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{  d\_ps }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{normalize\_types}\NormalTok{(d\_ps, levels\_ref)}
\NormalTok{  d\_ps }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{droplevels\_all}\NormalTok{(d\_ps)}

  \CommentTok{\# Write one factor{-}level diagnostic file (first imputation only).}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (imp\_index }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L) \{}
    \FunctionTok{write\_factor\_levels\_diag}\NormalTok{(d\_ps, covars\_ps, }\StringTok{"abg"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{file\_prefix =} \StringTok{"mi\_logistic\_ps\_factor\_levels"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  \}}

  \CommentTok{\# Guardrail: covariates must be complete before fitting propensity model.}
  \FunctionTok{assert\_no\_na\_covars}\NormalTok{(d\_ps, covars\_ps, }\AttributeTok{context =} \StringTok{"ABG MI PS (glm)"}\NormalTok{)}

  \CommentTok{\# Fit MI logistic propensity model with spline terms for continuous predictors.}
\NormalTok{  ps\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_mi\_ps\_glm}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    d\_ps, }\StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{, covars\_ps,}
    \AttributeTok{k =}\NormalTok{ MI\_PS\_SPLINE\_K, }\AttributeTok{maxit =}\NormalTok{ MI\_GLM\_MAXIT,}
    \AttributeTok{context =} \FunctionTok{make\_context}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{stage =} \StringTok{"MI"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{component =} \StringTok{"mi\_ps\_glm"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{analysis\_variant =} \StringTok{"weighted\_imputed"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{model\_type =} \StringTok{"ps"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{group =} \StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{outcome =} \ConstantTok{NA\_character\_}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{imputation =}\NormalTok{ imp\_index,}
      \AttributeTok{batch =} \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{error)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"MI PS model failed (ABG, imp "}\NormalTok{, imp\_index, }\StringTok{"): "}\NormalTok{, ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{error)}
\NormalTok{  \}}

  \CommentTok{\# Convert propensity scores to one{-}sided IPSW according to project rules.}
\NormalTok{  ipow }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{compute\_ipow\_weights}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    ps\_fit,}
    \AttributeTok{treat =} \FunctionTok{to01}\NormalTok{(d\_ps}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_abg),}
    \AttributeTok{ps\_floor\_quantile =}\NormalTok{ ps\_trunc\_quantile,}
    \AttributeTok{stabilize =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{assert\_finite\_weights}\NormalTok{(ipow}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{weights[d\_ps}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_abg }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{], }\StringTok{"w\_abg"}\NormalTok{)}

  \CommentTok{\# Return compact metadata only (no large model object retained).}
  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{weights =}\NormalTok{ ipow}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{weights,}
    \AttributeTok{ps =}\NormalTok{ ipow}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ps,}
    \AttributeTok{ipow\_info =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{ps\_floor =}\NormalTok{ ipow}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ps\_floor,}
      \AttributeTok{cap      =}\NormalTok{ ipow}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{cap,}
      \AttributeTok{trunc\_rate =} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(ipow}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{truncated, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{method =}\NormalTok{ ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{method,}
    \AttributeTok{fit\_ok =} \FunctionTok{isTRUE}\NormalTok{(ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{fit\_ok),}
    \AttributeTok{converged =} \FunctionTok{isTRUE}\NormalTok{(ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{converged),}
    \AttributeTok{n =}\NormalTok{ ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{n,}
    \AttributeTok{p =}\NormalTok{ ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{p,}
    \AttributeTok{formula =}\NormalTok{ ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{formula,}
    \AttributeTok{basis =}\NormalTok{ ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{basis,}
    \AttributeTok{coef =}\NormalTok{ ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{coef,}
    \AttributeTok{vcov\_diag =}\NormalTok{ ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{vcov\_diag}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: fit the VBG logistic propensity model and convert it to one{-}sided}
\CommentTok{\# IPSW weights for a single imputation.}
\NormalTok{fit\_vbg\_one }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(d, imp\_index) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# Same logic as ABG helper, using has\_vbg as treatment indicator.}
\NormalTok{  d\_ps }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ d[, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, covars\_ps), drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{  d\_ps }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{normalize\_types}\NormalTok{(d\_ps, levels\_ref)}
\NormalTok{  d\_ps }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{droplevels\_all}\NormalTok{(d\_ps)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (imp\_index }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L) \{}
    \FunctionTok{write\_factor\_levels\_diag}\NormalTok{(d\_ps, covars\_ps, }\StringTok{"vbg"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{file\_prefix =} \StringTok{"mi\_logistic\_ps\_factor\_levels"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  \FunctionTok{assert\_no\_na\_covars}\NormalTok{(d\_ps, covars\_ps, }\AttributeTok{context =} \StringTok{"VBG MI PS (glm)"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  ps\_fit }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_mi\_ps\_glm}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    d\_ps, }\StringTok{"has\_vbg"}\NormalTok{, covars\_ps,}
    \AttributeTok{k =}\NormalTok{ MI\_PS\_SPLINE\_K, }\AttributeTok{maxit =}\NormalTok{ MI\_GLM\_MAXIT,}
    \AttributeTok{context =} \FunctionTok{make\_context}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{stage =} \StringTok{"MI"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{component =} \StringTok{"mi\_ps\_glm"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{analysis\_variant =} \StringTok{"weighted\_imputed"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{model\_type =} \StringTok{"ps"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{group =} \StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{outcome =} \ConstantTok{NA\_character\_}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{imputation =}\NormalTok{ imp\_index,}
      \AttributeTok{batch =} \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{error)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"MI PS model failed (VBG, imp "}\NormalTok{, imp\_index, }\StringTok{"): "}\NormalTok{, ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{error)}
\NormalTok{  \}}

  \CommentTok{\# Apply one{-}sided IPSW transformation to VBG propensity scores.}
\NormalTok{  ipow }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{compute\_ipow\_weights}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    ps\_fit,}
    \AttributeTok{treat =} \FunctionTok{to01}\NormalTok{(d\_ps}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_vbg),}
    \AttributeTok{ps\_floor\_quantile =}\NormalTok{ ps\_trunc\_quantile,}
    \AttributeTok{stabilize =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{assert\_finite\_weights}\NormalTok{(ipow}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{weights[d\_ps}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_vbg }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{], }\StringTok{"w\_vbg"}\NormalTok{)}

  \CommentTok{\# Keep only lightweight fields needed downstream.}
  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{weights =}\NormalTok{ ipow}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{weights,}
    \AttributeTok{ps =}\NormalTok{ ipow}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ps,}
    \AttributeTok{ipow\_info =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{ps\_floor =}\NormalTok{ ipow}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ps\_floor,}
      \AttributeTok{cap      =}\NormalTok{ ipow}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{cap,}
      \AttributeTok{trunc\_rate =} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(ipow}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{truncated, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{method =}\NormalTok{ ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{method,}
    \AttributeTok{fit\_ok =} \FunctionTok{isTRUE}\NormalTok{(ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{fit\_ok),}
    \AttributeTok{converged =} \FunctionTok{isTRUE}\NormalTok{(ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{converged),}
    \AttributeTok{n =}\NormalTok{ ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{n,}
    \AttributeTok{p =}\NormalTok{ ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{p,}
    \AttributeTok{formula =}\NormalTok{ ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{formula,}
    \AttributeTok{basis =}\NormalTok{ ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{basis,}
    \AttributeTok{coef =}\NormalTok{ ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{coef,}
    \AttributeTok{vcov\_diag =}\NormalTok{ ps\_fit}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{vcov\_diag}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# {-}{-}{-} Helper: target balance (treated vs target) {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\NormalTok{target\_balance\_table }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(data, treat\_var, weights, covars, }\AttributeTok{levels\_ref =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# These SMDs compare the tested cohort to the target analytic cohort, not to}
  \CommentTok{\# the untested cohort. That is the balance target implied by this one{-}sided}
  \CommentTok{\# weighting design, because we want tested encounters to resemble the full}
  \CommentTok{\# analytic population after weighting.}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(weights) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(data))}
\NormalTok{  treat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{to01}\NormalTok{(data[[treat\_var]]) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{  treat[}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(treat)] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  w }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(weights)}

\NormalTok{  w\_mean }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x, wts) \{}
    \CommentTok{\# Small weighted{-}mean helper that tolerates missing/non{-}finite values.}
\NormalTok{    ok }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(x) }\SpecialCharTok{\&} \FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(wts)}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(ok)) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}\NormalTok{)}
    \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(wts[ok] }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ x[ok]) }\SpecialCharTok{/} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(wts[ok])}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  out }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(covars, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(v) \{}
\NormalTok{    x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ data[[v]]}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.character}\NormalTok{(x)) \{}
      \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(levels\_ref) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(levels\_ref[[v]])) \{}
\NormalTok{        x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(x, }\AttributeTok{levels =}\NormalTok{ levels\_ref[[v]])}
\NormalTok{      \} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{        x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(x)}
\NormalTok{      \}}
\NormalTok{    \}}

    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.factor}\NormalTok{(x)) \{}
      \CommentTok{\# Factor covariates: evaluate SMD at each level indicator.}
\NormalTok{      levs }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{levels}\NormalTok{(x)}
      \FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(levs, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(lv) \{}
\NormalTok{        ind }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(x }\SpecialCharTok{==}\NormalTok{ lv)}
\NormalTok{        p\_target }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(ind, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{        sd\_target }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sqrt}\NormalTok{(p\_target }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ (}\DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ p\_target))}
\NormalTok{        ind\_treat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ind[treat]}
\NormalTok{        w\_treat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ w[treat]}
\NormalTok{        pre }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(ind\_treat, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{        post }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{w\_mean}\NormalTok{(ind\_treat, w\_treat)}
\NormalTok{        smd\_pre }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(sd\_target) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&}\NormalTok{ sd\_target }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) (pre }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ p\_target) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ sd\_target }\ControlFlowTok{else} \ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}
\NormalTok{        smd\_post }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(sd\_target) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&}\NormalTok{ sd\_target }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) (post }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ p\_target) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ sd\_target }\ControlFlowTok{else} \ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}
        \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
          \AttributeTok{variable =}\NormalTok{ v,}
          \AttributeTok{level =}\NormalTok{ lv,}
          \AttributeTok{type =} \StringTok{"factor"}\NormalTok{,}
          \AttributeTok{smd\_pre =}\NormalTok{ smd\_pre,}
          \AttributeTok{smd\_post =}\NormalTok{ smd\_post,}
          \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{        )}
\NormalTok{      \}) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{    \} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
      \CommentTok{\# Numeric covariates: compare means scaled by target SD.}
\NormalTok{      x\_num }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(x))}
\NormalTok{      mean\_target }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(x\_num, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      sd\_target }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{sd}\NormalTok{(x\_num, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      x\_treat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ x\_num[treat]}
\NormalTok{      w\_treat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ w[treat]}
\NormalTok{      mean\_pre }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(x\_treat, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      mean\_post }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{w\_mean}\NormalTok{(x\_treat, w\_treat)}
\NormalTok{      smd\_pre }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(sd\_target) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&}\NormalTok{ sd\_target }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) (mean\_pre }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ mean\_target) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ sd\_target }\ControlFlowTok{else} \ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}
\NormalTok{      smd\_post }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(sd\_target) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&}\NormalTok{ sd\_target }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) (mean\_post }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ mean\_target) }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ sd\_target }\ControlFlowTok{else} \ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}
      \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{variable =}\NormalTok{ v,}
        \AttributeTok{level =} \ConstantTok{NA\_character\_}\NormalTok{,}
        \AttributeTok{type =} \StringTok{"numeric"}\NormalTok{,}
        \AttributeTok{smd\_pre =}\NormalTok{ smd\_pre,}
        \AttributeTok{smd\_post =}\NormalTok{ smd\_post,}
        \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{      )}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  \})}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(out)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: keep only model metadata needed for prediction without retaining the}
\CommentTok{\# fitting function frame through terms/formula environments.}
\NormalTok{strip\_terms\_environment }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(tt) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{inherits}\NormalTok{(tt, }\StringTok{"terms"}\NormalTok{))}
  \FunctionTok{attr}\NormalTok{(tt, }\StringTok{".Environment"}\NormalTok{) }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{baseenv}\NormalTok{()}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{identical}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{attr}\NormalTok{(tt, }\StringTok{".Environment"}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{baseenv}\NormalTok{()))}
\NormalTok{  tt}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{compact\_model\_metadata }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(fit) \{}
\NormalTok{  fit\_terms }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{strip\_terms\_environment}\NormalTok{(stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{delete.response}\NormalTok{(stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{terms}\NormalTok{(fit)))}
\NormalTok{  fit\_frame }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{model.frame}\NormalTok{(fit)}
  \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{terms =}\NormalTok{ fit\_terms,}
    \AttributeTok{xlevels =}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{.getXlevels}\NormalTok{(fit\_terms, fit\_frame),}
    \AttributeTok{contrasts =} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}
      \FunctionTok{attr}\NormalTok{(stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{model.matrix}\NormalTok{(fit), }\StringTok{"contrasts"}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) }\ConstantTok{NULL}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# {-}{-}{-} Helper: fit 3{-}level outcome per imputation {-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}{-}}
\NormalTok{fit\_cat3\_imp }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(d, weights, outcome\_var, co2\_var, treat\_var,}
\NormalTok{                         low\_cut, high\_cut, group\_label, imp\_index,}
                         \AttributeTok{adj\_vars =}\NormalTok{ adj\_core,}
                         \AttributeTok{analysis\_variant =} \StringTok{"mi\_ipw"}\NormalTok{) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# Fit one categorical outcome model for one imputation within the tested}
  \CommentTok{\# cohort only. This restriction is intentional because measured CO2 is only}
  \CommentTok{\# defined for encounters that actually had the corresponding blood gas.}
  \CommentTok{\# The Normal CO2 category is the reference for Low/High contrasts.}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(co2\_var }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(d))}
\NormalTok{  d[[co2\_var]] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{coerce\_num}\NormalTok{(d[[co2\_var]])}

  \CommentTok{\# Restrict to treated cohort with observed CO2.}
\NormalTok{  g }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ d[[treat\_var]] }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{\&} \FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(d[[co2\_var]])}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(g)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{error =} \StringTok{"No treated rows with finite CO2"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  d2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ d[g, , drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{  w }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ weights[g]}
\NormalTok{  w[}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(w)] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}
\NormalTok{  ok }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(w)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(ok)) \{}

\NormalTok{  \}, }\FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  m\_tot }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(ok)}
\NormalTok{  m\_ok  }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(ok)}

\FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"MI single{-}pass: running "}\NormalTok{, imp\_n, }\StringTok{" imputations sequentially."}\NormalTok{)}
\ControlFlowTok{for}\NormalTok{ (i }\ControlFlowTok{in} \FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(imp\_n)) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# MI single{-}pass workflow:}
  \CommentTok{\# 1) complete one imputed dataset,}
  \CommentTok{\# 2) fit ABG and VBG propensity models,}
  \CommentTok{\# 3) derive one{-}sided IPSW weights and target{-}balance summaries,}
  \CommentTok{\# 4) fit categorical and spline outcome models, and}
  \CommentTok{\# 5) save only compact outputs needed for later pooling and reporting.}
  \CommentTok{\# Per{-}imputation telemetry (time + memory) supports full{-}run troubleshooting.}
\NormalTok{  imp\_label }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imp\_\%03d"}\NormalTok{, i)}
  \FunctionTok{append\_mem\_snapshot}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mi\_single\_pass"}\NormalTok{, imp\_label, }\StringTok{"pre"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  mem\_pre }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{get\_vcells\_stats}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{  imp\_t0 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{Sys.time}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{  d }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{get\_imp}\NormalTok{(i)}

  \CommentTok{\# Fit ABG and VBG propensity models for this imputation.}
  \FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{20251206} \SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ i)}
\NormalTok{  fit\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_abg\_one}\NormalTok{(d, i)}
  \FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{30251206} \SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ i)}
\NormalTok{  fit\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{fit\_vbg\_one}\NormalTok{(d, i)}

\NormalTok{  w\_abg\_i }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fit\_abg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{weights}
\NormalTok{  w\_vbg\_i }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fit\_vbg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{weights}

\NormalTok{  ps\_vbg\_i }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ fit\_vbg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{ps}
\NormalTok{  w\_path\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{file.path}\NormalTok{(mi\_weight\_dir, }\FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"w\_abg\_imp\_\%03d.rds"}\NormalTok{, i))}
\NormalTok{  w\_path\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{file.path}\NormalTok{(mi\_weight\_dir, }\FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"w\_vbg\_imp\_\%03d.rds"}\NormalTok{, i))}
\NormalTok{  ps\_path\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{file.path}\NormalTok{(mi\_weight\_dir, }\FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ps\_abg\_imp\_\%03d.rds"}\NormalTok{, i))}
\NormalTok{  ps\_path\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{file.path}\NormalTok{(mi\_weight\_dir, }\FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ps\_vbg\_imp\_\%03d.rds"}\NormalTok{, i))}
  \CommentTok{\# Reassert the scratch directory at write time because this chunk is long}
  \CommentTok{\# and we want an informative failure if the cache path disappears mid{-}render.}
\NormalTok{  fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{dir\_create}\NormalTok{(mi\_weight\_dir, }\AttributeTok{recurse =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{dir.exists}\NormalTok{(mi\_weight\_dir)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"MI weight cache directory is unavailable during imputation "}\NormalTok{, i, }\StringTok{": "}\NormalTok{, mi\_weight\_dir)}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  \FunctionTok{saveRDS}\NormalTok{(w\_abg\_i, w\_path\_abg)}
  \FunctionTok{saveRDS}\NormalTok{(w\_vbg\_i, w\_path\_vbg)}
  \FunctionTok{saveRDS}\NormalTok{(ps\_abg\_i, ps\_path\_abg)}
  \FunctionTok{saveRDS}\NormalTok{(ps\_vbg\_i, ps\_path\_vbg)}
  \CommentTok{\# Unit weights intentionally reuse the same modeling code path for the}
  \CommentTok{\# imputed{-}but{-}unweighted analyses, making weighted vs unweighted contrasts}
  \CommentTok{\# differ only in the supplied weights rather than in helper logic.}
\NormalTok{  w\_unweighted\_i }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{rep}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(d))}

  \CommentTok{\# Persist compact PS metadata so downstream chunks can reload on demand.}
  \CommentTok{\# Keep an in{-}memory cache as well so late chunks do not depend on scratch}

  \CommentTok{\# they are useful for diagnostics and post{-}hoc inspection outside the live}
  \CommentTok{\# notebook session.}

  \CommentTok{\# Target{-}balance summaries for this imputation and group.}

\NormalTok{    d, }\StringTok{"has\_abg"}\NormalTok{, w\_abg\_i, covars\_use\_abg, levels\_ref}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}

\subsection{Weighted outcome models within each imputation +
pooling}\label{weighted-outcome-models-within-each-imputation-pooling}

Within each imputation, fit covariate‑adjusted CO2 spline outcome models
\textbf{only in the measured cohort} (has\_abg==1 for PaCO2; has\_vbg==1
for VBG CO2), using IPSW weights to address nonrandom testing. Curves
are pooled pointwise across imputations (Rubin's rules on the log‑OR
scale) and displayed as odds ratios relative to CO2\_ref at a reference
covariate profile.

\subsubsection{Helper: fit + extract log‑OR and SE from
svyglm}\label{helper-fit-extract-logor-and-se-from-svyglm}

          \FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pool\_spline\_prob\_curve"}\NormalTok{),}
          \FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pool\_spline\_coefs"}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"pool\_terms"}\NormalTok{))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Highlighting}[]

\subsection{Explainability}\label{explainability}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: shap top10 mi logistic.}
\CommentTok{\# MI logistic models are linear on the log{-}odds scale, so we compute}
\CommentTok{\# contribution magnitudes from centered design{-}matrix terms and aggregate}
\CommentTok{\# to parent features.}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mi\_logistic\_ps\_abg\_list"}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mi\_logistic\_ps\_vbg\_list"}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{mi\_shap\_abg\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"shap\_top10\_mi\_logistic\_abg.csv"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{mi\_shap\_vbg\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"shap\_top10\_mi\_logistic\_vbg.csv"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{mi\_shap\_stability\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"diag{-}ps{-}shap{-}stability.csv"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{mi\_shap\_error\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"diag\_mi\_shap\_errors.csv"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{mi\_shap\_method\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"diag\_mi\_shap\_method\_used.csv"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{mi\_shap\_diag\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mi\_shap\_imp\_diagnostics.csv"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# helper: return an empty MI SHAP summary with the same schema as the populated}
\CommentTok{\# outputs so downstream code can stay simple.}
\NormalTok{make\_empty\_mi\_shap }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{() \{}
  \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{feature =} \FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{(), }\AttributeTok{mean\_abs\_shap =} \FunctionTok{numeric}\NormalTok{(), }\AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: approximate per{-}feature contribution magnitudes for one MI logistic}
\CommentTok{\# propensity model using a sampled model matrix on the link scale.}
\NormalTok{calc\_mi\_glm\_contrib }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(meta, d\_ps, feature\_names, imp\_index, group\_label,}
                                \AttributeTok{sample\_n =}\NormalTok{ MI\_SHAP\_SAMPLE\_N,}
                                \AttributeTok{max\_terms =}\NormalTok{ MI\_SHAP\_MAX\_TERMS) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# Memory{-}safe contribution approximation for GLM PS:}
  \CommentTok{\# sample rows first, build sparse model matrix, then aggregate |contribution|}
  \CommentTok{\# by feature without constructing a full{-}N dense matrix.}
\NormalTok{  diag\_row }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{imp =}\NormalTok{ imp\_index,}
    \AttributeTok{group =}\NormalTok{ group\_label,}
    \AttributeTok{sample\_n =} \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{n\_terms\_used =} \ConstantTok{NA\_integer\_}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{seconds =} \ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{vcells\_pre\_mb =} \ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{vcells\_post\_mb =} \ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{method\_used =} \StringTok{"sparse\_sampled\_glm\_link"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{ok =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{error\_msg =} \ConstantTok{NA\_character\_}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{  t0 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{Sys.time}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{  mem\_pre }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{get\_vcells\_stats}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{  diag\_row}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{vcells\_pre\_mb }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ mem\_pre}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{gc\_vcells\_used\_mb}

\NormalTok{  err\_msg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{NA\_character\_}
\NormalTok{  out }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(\{}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(meta}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{formula) }\SpecialCharTok{||} \FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(meta}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{coef) }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(meta}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{coef)) \{}
      \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Missing formula/coefficients in MI PS metadata."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    \}}

\NormalTok{    n\_all }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(d\_ps)}
\NormalTok{    n\_use }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(sample\_n), n\_all)}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(n\_use) }\SpecialCharTok{||}\NormalTok{ n\_use }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L) \{}
      \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Insufficient rows available for MI SHAP sample."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{    seed\_offset }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{toupper}\NormalTok{(group\_label) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{) }\DecValTok{10000}\NormalTok{L }\ControlFlowTok{else} \DecValTok{20000}\NormalTok{L}
    \FunctionTok{set.seed}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{20251206}\NormalTok{L }\SpecialCharTok{+} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(imp\_index) }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ seed\_offset)}
\NormalTok{    idx }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (n\_all }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}}\NormalTok{ n\_use) }\FunctionTok{sample.int}\NormalTok{(n\_all, }\AttributeTok{size =}\NormalTok{ n\_use, }\AttributeTok{replace =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{) }\ControlFlowTok{else} \FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(n\_all)}
\NormalTok{    d\_sample }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ d\_ps[idx, , drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{    diag\_row}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{sample\_n }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ n\_use}

\NormalTok{    form }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{as.formula}\NormalTok{(meta}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{formula)}
\NormalTok{    mm\_model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ConstantTok{NULL}
\NormalTok{    mm\_mode }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"dense\_model\_matrix"}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{requireNamespace}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Matrix"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{quietly =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)) \{}
\NormalTok{      mm\_sparse\_try }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{        Matrix}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{sparse.model.matrix}\NormalTok{(form, }\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ d\_sample),}
        \AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) }\ConstantTok{NULL}
\NormalTok{      )}
      \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(mm\_sparse\_try)) \{}
\NormalTok{        mm\_model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ mm\_sparse\_try}
\NormalTok{        mm\_mode }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"sparse\_sampled\_glm\_link"}
\NormalTok{      \}}
\NormalTok{    \}}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(mm\_model)) \{}
\NormalTok{      mm\_model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{model.matrix}\NormalTok{(form, }\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ d\_sample)}
\NormalTok{      mm\_mode }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"dense\_sampled\_glm\_link"}
\NormalTok{    \}}

  \FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(mi\_shap\_top\_abg, mi\_shap\_abg\_file, }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(mi\_shap\_top\_vbg, mi\_shap\_vbg\_file, }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  mi\_shap\_stability }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(mi\_shap\_top\_abg, mi\_shap\_top\_vbg) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{transmute}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{cohort =}\NormalTok{ group,}
      \AttributeTok{feature =}\NormalTok{ feature,}
      \AttributeTok{mean\_abs\_seed1 =}\NormalTok{ mean\_abs\_shap,}
      \AttributeTok{mean\_abs\_seed2 =}\NormalTok{ mean\_abs\_shap,}
      \AttributeTok{run\_id =}\NormalTok{ diag\_run\_id}
\NormalTok{    )}
  \FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(mi\_shap\_stability, mi\_shap\_stability\_file, }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  mi\_shap\_plot\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(mi\_shap\_top\_abg, mi\_shap\_top\_vbg)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(mi\_shap\_plot\_df) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{    p\_shap\_mi }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{plot\_shap\_top10\_two\_panel}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      mi\_shap\_plot\_df,}
      \StringTok{"MI logistic IPSW: top 10 features by mean absolute contribution"}\NormalTok{,}
      \StringTok{"Mean absolute contribution on link scale"}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{    shap\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"figs"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"shap{-}top10{-}mi{-}logistic{-}abg{-}vbg.png"}\NormalTok{)}
    \FunctionTok{save\_diag\_plot}\NormalTok{(p\_shap\_mi, shap\_file, }\AttributeTok{width =} \DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{dpi =} \DecValTok{300}\NormalTok{)}
    \FunctionTok{register\_plot\_file}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"shap{-}top10{-}mi{-}logistic{-}abg{-}vbg"}\NormalTok{, shap\_file)}
\NormalTok{  \}}

  \FunctionTok{rm}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    accum\_abg, accum\_vbg, mi\_shap\_diag\_rows, mi\_shap\_error\_rows,}
\NormalTok{    mi\_shap\_diag\_df, mi\_shap\_error\_df, mi\_shap\_method\_df,}
\NormalTok{    mi\_shap\_plot\_df, mi\_shap\_stability, mi\_shap\_top\_abg, mi\_shap\_top\_vbg}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{gc}\NormalTok{())}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
  \FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(), mi\_shap\_diag\_file, }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(), mi\_shap\_error\_file, }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(), mi\_shap\_method\_file, }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(), mi\_shap\_abg\_file, }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(), mi\_shap\_vbg\_file, }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(), mi\_shap\_stability\_file, }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}

\FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"MI 3{-}level helpers defined in the single{-}pass MI section."}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Three{-}level CO2 category sanity: per{-}imputation overlap for ABG/VBG}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imp"}\NormalTok{))}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mi\_logistic\_ps\_abg\_list"}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mi\_logistic\_ps\_vbg\_list"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{imp\_n }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ imp}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{m}

\CommentTok{\# helper: verify that each imputation still has at least two observed CO2}
\CommentTok{\# categories within the tested cohort before categorical modeling proceeds.}
\NormalTok{check\_cat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(d, co2, grp, low\_cut, high\_cut) \{}
\NormalTok{  x   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(d[[co2]]))}
\NormalTok{  fac }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{make\_co2\_cat3}\NormalTok{(x, low\_cut, high\_cut)}
\NormalTok{  tab }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{table}\NormalTok{(fac, }\AttributeTok{useNA =} \StringTok{"ifany"}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(grp, }\StringTok{": "}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(tab), tab, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{" | "}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  obs\_levels }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(tab)[}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(tab))]}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(tab[obs\_levels] }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(imp\_n), }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(i) \{}
\NormalTok{  di }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{get\_imp}\NormalTok{(i)}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"paco2"} \SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(di))}
  \FunctionTok{check\_cat}\NormalTok{(di[di}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_abg }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, , }\AttributeTok{drop =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{], }\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{,}
            \FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ABG imp \%d"}\NormalTok{, i), }\AttributeTok{low\_cut =}\NormalTok{ ABG\_CO2\_LOW, }\AttributeTok{high\_cut =}\NormalTok{ ABG\_CO2\_HIGH)}
\NormalTok{\}))}

\FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(imp\_n), }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(i) \{}
\NormalTok{  di }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{get\_imp}\NormalTok{(i)}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"} \SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(di))}
  \FunctionTok{check\_cat}\NormalTok{(di[di}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_vbg }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, , }\AttributeTok{drop =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{], }\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{,}
            \FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"VBG imp \%d"}\NormalTok{, i), }\AttributeTok{low\_cut =}\NormalTok{ VBG\_CO2\_LOW, }\AttributeTok{high\_cut =}\NormalTok{ VBG\_CO2\_HIGH)}
\NormalTok{\}))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}

\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(mi\_threelevel\_results, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mi\_threelevel\_results.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{table3\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(abg\_cat\_results, }\AttributeTok{group =} \StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{),}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(vbg\_cat\_results, }\AttributeTok{group =} \StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{exposure =} \FunctionTok{gsub}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\^{}co2\_cat"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{""}\NormalTok{, term),}
    \AttributeTok{contrast =}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{recode}\NormalTok{(exposure,}
                             \AttributeTok{Low  =} \StringTok{"Low vs normal"}\NormalTok{,}
                             \AttributeTok{High =} \StringTok{"High vs normal"}\NormalTok{,}
                             \AttributeTok{.default    =}\NormalTok{ exposure),}

\NormalTok{      outcome,}
      \AttributeTok{IMV      =} \StringTok{"IMV"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{NIV      =} \StringTok{"NIV"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{Death60d =} \StringTok{"Death (60d)"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{HCRF     =} \StringTok{"Hypercapnic RF"}
\NormalTok{    ),}

\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(group, outcome\_label, contrast, or\_ci)}

\NormalTok{table3\_wide }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ table3\_df }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  tidyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{pivot\_wider}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{names\_from =}\NormalTok{ contrast, }\AttributeTok{values\_from =}\NormalTok{ or\_ci) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(}
    \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(group, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{)),}
    \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(outcome\_label, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"IMV"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"NIV"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Death (60d)"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Hypercapnic RF"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{gt}\NormalTok{(table3\_wide) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tab\_header}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"MI{-}pooled MI{-}logistic IPSW associations between CO2 category and outcomes (adjusted)"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{cols\_label}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{group           =} \StringTok{"Cohort"}\NormalTok{,}

    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{High vs normal}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"High vs normal OR (95\% CI)"}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{fmt\_missing}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{columns =}\NormalTok{ gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{everything}\NormalTok{(), }\AttributeTok{missing\_text =} \StringTok{"—"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  gt}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tab\_source\_note}\NormalTok{(}
    \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}
      \StringTok{"Weighted survey GLMs adjusted for baseline covariates; weights = MI{-}specific GLM (RCS) IPW; m = "}\NormalTok{, M\_IMP,}
      \StringTok{" imputations (seed "}\NormalTok{, MI\_SEED, }\StringTok{"); reference = Normal."}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  )}
\end{Highlighting}

\subsubsection{Summary: adjusted CO2-category associations across
analysis
tracks}\label{summary-adjusted-co2-category-associations-across-analysis-tracks}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: table summary adjusted threelevel.}
\CommentTok{\# Build the canonical categorical key{-}results table across all requested tracks,}
\CommentTok{\# while retaining the narrower adjusted{-}only legacy summary outputs.}
\NormalTok{label\_outcome }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) \{}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{recode}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    x,}
    \AttributeTok{imv\_proc =} \StringTok{"IMV"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{niv\_proc =} \StringTok{"NIV"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{death\_60d =} \StringTok{"Death (60d)"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{hypercap\_resp\_failure =} \StringTok{"Hypercapnic RF"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{IMV =} \StringTok{"IMV"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{NIV =} \StringTok{"NIV"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{Death60d =} \StringTok{"Death (60d)"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{HCRF =} \StringTok{"Hypercapnic RF"}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: format one categorical OR and confidence interval for compact table}
\CommentTok{\# display.}
\NormalTok{format\_cat3\_ci }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(estimate, lcl, ucl) \{}
  \FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\%.2f (\%.2f, \%.2f)"}\NormalTok{, estimate, lcl, ucl)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: count the effective modeled sample and number of events for one}
\CommentTok{\# complete{-}case categorical model specification.}
\NormalTok{count\_model }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(data, outcome, exposure, }\AttributeTok{adj\_vars =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{,}
                        \AttributeTok{treat\_var =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{weight\_var =} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{  d }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ data}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(treat\_var)) d }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ d[d[[treat\_var]] }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, , drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{  vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(outcome, exposure, adj\_vars, weight\_var))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(weight\_var)) vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(vars, weight\_var)}
\NormalTok{  d }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ d[, vars, drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{  d }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ d[}\FunctionTok{complete.cases}\NormalTok{(d), , drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(weight\_var)) \{}
\NormalTok{    w }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(d[[weight\_var]]))}
\NormalTok{    d }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ d[}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(w) }\SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ w }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, , drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(d) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L) \{}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{n\_model =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L, }\AttributeTok{events =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L))}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  d[[outcome]] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{to01}\NormalTok{(d[[outcome]])}
\NormalTok{  tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{n\_model =} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(d),}
    \AttributeTok{events =} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(d[[outcome]] }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: count complete{-}case modeled rows/events for the non{-}MI categorical}
\CommentTok{\# tracks so the summary table reports the right denominator for each cohort.}
\NormalTok{count\_group }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(group, method) \{}
\NormalTok{  exp\_var   }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (group }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{) }\StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_abg"} \ControlFlowTok{else} \StringTok{"pco2\_cat\_vbg"}
\NormalTok{  treat\_var }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (group }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{) }\StringTok{"has\_abg"} \ControlFlowTok{else} \StringTok{"has\_vbg"}
\NormalTok{  adj\_vars }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{switch}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    method,}
    \StringTok{"Crude"} \OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Adjusted"} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ adj\_core,}
    \StringTok{"GBM{-}weighted"} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ adj\_core,}
    \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Unsupported non{-}MI count method: "}\NormalTok{, method)}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{  weight\_var }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{switch}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    method,}
    \StringTok{"Crude"} \OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Adjusted"} \OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"GBM{-}weighted"} \OtherTok{=} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (group }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{) }\StringTok{"w\_abg"} \ControlFlowTok{else} \StringTok{"w\_vbg"}\NormalTok{,}
    \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Unsupported non{-}MI count method: "}\NormalTok{, method)}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{  outcomes }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  purrr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{map\_dfr}\NormalTok{(outcomes, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(outcome) \{}
\NormalTok{    cnt }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{count\_model}\NormalTok{(subset\_data, outcome, exp\_var, adj\_vars,}
                       \AttributeTok{treat\_var =}\NormalTok{ treat\_var, }\AttributeTok{weight\_var =}\NormalTok{ weight\_var)}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(cnt,}
                  \AttributeTok{method =}\NormalTok{ method,}
                  \AttributeTok{group =}\NormalTok{ group,}
                  \AttributeTok{outcome =} \FunctionTok{label\_outcome}\NormalTok{(outcome))}
\NormalTok{  \})}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: return zero{-}row MI count summaries for one cohort when an imputation}
\CommentTok{\# contributes no analyzable tested encounters after the required filtering.}
\NormalTok{empty\_mi\_count\_rows }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(group, outcomes) \{}
\NormalTok{  tidyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{expand\_grid}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{method =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Imputed"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Weighted and adjusted"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{outcome =} \FunctionTok{label\_outcome}\NormalTok{(outcomes)}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{group =}\NormalTok{ group,}

\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{relocate}\NormalTok{(method, group, outcome, n\_model, events)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: compute MI modeled counts for both the imputed{-}only and weighted MI}
\CommentTok{\# categorical tracks in one pass for one cohort within one imputed dataset.}
\CommentTok{\# This avoids reloading the same full imputation hundreds of times inside the}
\CommentTok{\# manuscript table summary chunk.}
\NormalTok{compute\_mi\_count\_group\_all\_methods }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(d, group, weights, outcomes) \{}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (group }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{    co2\_var }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"paco2"}
\NormalTok{    treat\_var }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"has\_abg"}
\NormalTok{    low\_cut }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ABG\_CO2\_LOW}
\NormalTok{    high\_cut }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ABG\_CO2\_HIGH}
\NormalTok{  \} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
\NormalTok{    co2\_var }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}
\NormalTok{    treat\_var }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"has\_vbg"}
\NormalTok{    low\_cut }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ VBG\_CO2\_LOW}
\NormalTok{    high\_cut }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ VBG\_CO2\_HIGH}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  d[[co2\_var]] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{suppressWarnings}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(d[[co2\_var]]))}
\NormalTok{  keep }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ d[[treat\_var]] }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{\&} \FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(d[[co2\_var]])}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(keep)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{empty\_mi\_count\_rows}\NormalTok{(group, outcomes))}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  d2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ d[keep, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(outcomes, adj\_core, co2\_var), drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{  w2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ weights[keep]}
\NormalTok{  d2}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{co2\_cat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{make\_co2\_cat3}\NormalTok{(d2[[co2\_var]], low\_cut, high\_cut)}

\NormalTok{  keep2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(d2}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{co2\_cat)}
\NormalTok{  d2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ d2[keep2, , drop }\OtherTok{=} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{  w2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ w2[keep2]}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(d2) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L) \{}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{empty\_mi\_count\_rows}\NormalTok{(group, outcomes))}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  purrr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{map\_dfr}\NormalTok{(outcomes, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(outcome) \{}
\NormalTok{    outcome\_complete }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{complete.cases}\NormalTok{(d2[, }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(outcome, adj\_core, }\StringTok{"co2\_cat"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{drop =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{])}
\NormalTok{    outcome\_vals }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{to01}\NormalTok{(d2[[outcome]])}
\NormalTok{    weighted\_keep }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ outcome\_complete }\SpecialCharTok{\&} \FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(w2) }\SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ w2 }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}

\NormalTok{    tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{method =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Imputed"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Weighted and adjusted"}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{group =}\NormalTok{ group,}
      \AttributeTok{outcome =} \FunctionTok{label\_outcome}\NormalTok{(outcome),}
      \AttributeTok{n\_model =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
        \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(outcome\_complete),}
        \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(weighted\_keep)}
\NormalTok{      ),}
      \AttributeTok{events =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
        \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(outcome\_vals[outcome\_complete] }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
        \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(outcome\_vals[weighted\_keep] }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      )}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  \})}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: summarize MI modeled sample size and events across imputations for all}
\CommentTok{\# categorical outcomes and both cohorts using a single pass over each imputed}
\CommentTok{\# dataset. This preserves the original median{-}across{-}imputations definition}
\CommentTok{\# while removing a major full{-}run bottleneck.}
\NormalTok{build\_mi\_counts\_cat3 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{() \{}
\NormalTok{  outcomes }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  per\_imp\_counts }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{vector}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"list"}\NormalTok{, imp}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{m)}

  \ControlFlowTok{for}\NormalTok{ (i }\ControlFlowTok{in} \FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(imp}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{m)) \{}
\NormalTok{    d }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{get\_imp}\NormalTok{(i)}
\NormalTok{    w\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{get\_mi\_weight}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{, i)}
\NormalTok{    w\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{get\_mi\_weight}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{, i)}

\NormalTok{    per\_imp\_counts[[i]] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(}
      \FunctionTok{compute\_mi\_count\_group\_all\_methods}\NormalTok{(d, }\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{, w\_abg, outcomes),}
      \FunctionTok{compute\_mi\_count\_group\_all\_methods}\NormalTok{(d, }\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{, w\_vbg, outcomes)}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{      dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{imp =}\NormalTok{ i)}

    \FunctionTok{rm}\NormalTok{(d, w\_abg, w\_vbg)}
    \FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{gc}\NormalTok{(}\ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{  \}}

\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(per\_imp\_counts) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(method, group, outcome) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{summarise}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{n\_model =} \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{median}\NormalTok{(n\_model, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)),}
      \AttributeTok{events =} \FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{median}\NormalTok{(events, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)),}
      \AttributeTok{.groups =} \StringTok{"drop"}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{  \}))}

  \FunctionTok{normalize\_cat3\_key\_results\_prob\_df}\NormalTok{(}

\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}

\subsection{Canonical Categorical Key-Results Figures Across Analysis
Tracks}\label{canonical-categorical-key-results-figures-across-analysis-tracks}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: prepare canonical categorical key{-}results figure objects across analysis tracks.}
\NormalTok{key\_results\_cat3\_caption\_crude }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"Crude, unadjusted categorical odds ratios use the normal CO2 category as the reference. "}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Predicted probabilities are crude model{-}implied category probabilities within the tested cohorts."}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{key\_results\_cat3\_caption\_adjusted }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"Odds ratios use the normal CO2 category as the reference. "}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Predicted probabilities are conditional on the reference covariate profile X\_ref within each test{-}specific cohort."}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{key\_results\_cat3\_caption\_imputed }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"MI{-}pooled categorical odds ratios use the normal CO2 category as the reference. "}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Predicted probabilities are pooled on the link scale and are conditional on X\_ref within each test{-}specific cohort."}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{key\_results\_cat3\_caption\_main }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"MI{-}pooled, MI{-}logistic IPSW{-}adjusted categorical odds ratios use the normal CO2 category as the reference. "}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Predicted probabilities are pooled on the link scale and are conditional on X\_ref within each test{-}specific cohort."}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{key\_results\_cat3\_caption\_gbm }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"GBM{-}IPSW{-}adjusted categorical odds ratios use the normal CO2 category as the reference. "}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Predicted probabilities are conditional on X\_ref within each test{-}specific cohort."}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{key\_results\_cat3\_crude\_plot }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{assemble\_cat3\_key\_results\_figure}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  crude\_cat3\_results,}
\NormalTok{  crude\_cat3\_probs,}
  \AttributeTok{figure\_title =} \StringTok{"Crude categorical associations: ABG vs VBG CO2 category"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{figure\_caption =}\NormalTok{ key\_results\_cat3\_caption\_crude}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{key\_results\_cat3\_adjusted\_plot }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{assemble\_cat3\_key\_results\_figure}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  adjusted\_cat3\_results,}
\NormalTok{  adjusted\_cat3\_probs,}
  \AttributeTok{figure\_title =} \StringTok{"Adjusted categorical associations: ABG vs VBG CO2 category"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{figure\_caption =}\NormalTok{ key\_results\_cat3\_caption\_adjusted}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{key\_results\_cat3\_imputed\_plot }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{assemble\_cat3\_key\_results\_figure}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  imputed\_cat3\_results,}
\NormalTok{  imputed\_cat3\_probs,}
  \AttributeTok{figure\_title =} \StringTok{"MI{-}pooled categorical associations (non{-}weighted): ABG vs VBG CO2 category"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{figure\_caption =}\NormalTok{ key\_results\_cat3\_caption\_imputed}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{key\_results\_cat3\_main\_plot }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{assemble\_cat3\_key\_results\_figure}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  main\_cat3\_results,}
\NormalTok{  main\_cat3\_probs,}
  \AttributeTok{figure\_title =} \StringTok{"MI{-}logistic IPSW{-}weighted categorical associations of pCO2 category with clinical outcomes by ABG and VBG"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{figure\_caption =} \ConstantTok{NULL}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{key\_results\_cat3\_gbm\_plot }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{assemble\_cat3\_key\_results\_figure}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  gbm\_cat3\_results,}
\NormalTok{  gbm\_cat3\_probs,}
  \AttributeTok{figure\_title =} \StringTok{"GBM{-}IPSW{-}adjusted categorical associations: ABG vs VBG CO2 category"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{figure\_caption =}\NormalTok{ key\_results\_cat3\_caption\_gbm}
\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: chunk.}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imp"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{imp\_n }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ imp}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{m}
\CommentTok{\# helper: pull one completed imputation back into the normalized type schema used}
\CommentTok{\# by downstream assertions so diagnostics are checking the same structure as the}
\CommentTok{\# analysis code.}
\NormalTok{get\_imp }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(i, }\AttributeTok{imp\_obj =}\NormalTok{ imp) \{ }\FunctionTok{normalize\_types}\NormalTok{(mice}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{complete}\NormalTok{(imp\_obj, }\AttributeTok{action =}\NormalTok{ i), levels\_ref) \}}

\CommentTok{\# 1) must exist and be numeric}
\NormalTok{d1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{get\_imp}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"paco2"}\NormalTok{,}\StringTok{"vbg\_co2"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(d1)))}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.numeric}\NormalTok{(d1}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{paco2), }\FunctionTok{is.numeric}\NormalTok{(d1}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{vbg\_co2))}

\CommentTok{\# 2) confirm at least two PaCO2 levels among those with ABG in each imputation}
\FunctionTok{table}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(imp\_n), }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(i) \{}
\NormalTok{  d }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{get\_imp}\NormalTok{(i)}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{n\_distinct}\NormalTok{(d}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{paco2[d}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_abg }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{1} \SpecialCharTok{\&} \FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(d}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{paco2)])}
\NormalTok{\}, }\FunctionTok{integer}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# 3) light sanity check: ensure pooled MI cat3 results exist}
