\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: manuscript Figure S2 propensity{-}score overlap under the MI logistic IPSW models.}
\CommentTok{\# Build an imputation{-}averaged propensity histogram for ABG and VBG.}
\CommentTok{\# This mirrors the non{-}MI propensity display while respecting MI variability.}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imp"}\NormalTok{))}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mi\_logistic\_ps\_abg\_list"}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"mi\_logistic\_ps\_vbg\_list"}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{bin\_edges }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{seq}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{length.out =} \DecValTok{31}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{bin\_width }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{diff}\NormalTok{(bin\_edges)[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]}
\NormalTok{bin\_centers }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{head}\NormalTok{(bin\_edges, }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}\NormalTok{ bin\_width }\SpecialCharTok{/} \DecValTok{2}
\NormalTok{treat\_abg\_all }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{to01}\NormalTok{(imp}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_abg)}
\NormalTok{treat\_vbg\_all }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{to01}\NormalTok{(imp}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{has\_vbg)}

\CommentTok{\# helper: collapse one imputation\textquotesingle{}s propensity scores into comparable histogram}
\CommentTok{\# bins so the manuscript figure can average densities across imputations without}
\CommentTok{\# overplotting dozens of raw curves.}
\NormalTok{mi\_ps\_hist\_one }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(ps\_vec, treat\_vec, score\_type, imp\_index) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# Use integer bin IDs to avoid floating{-}point matching issues during complete().}
\NormalTok{  df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{ps =} \FunctionTok{as.numeric}\NormalTok{(ps\_vec),}
    \AttributeTok{treat =} \FunctionTok{as.integer}\NormalTok{(treat\_vec),}
    \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(ps), }\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(treat), ps }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}=} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, ps }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}=} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{treat =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(treat, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L), }\AttributeTok{labels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"No Test"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Test"}\NormalTok{)),}
      \AttributeTok{bin\_id =} \FunctionTok{cut}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{        ps,}
        \AttributeTok{breaks =}\NormalTok{ bin\_edges,}
        \AttributeTok{include.lowest =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{,}
        \AttributeTok{right =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{,}
        \AttributeTok{labels =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{      )}
\NormalTok{    )}

  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(df) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0} \SpecialCharTok{||} \FunctionTok{all}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{bin\_id))) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{())}

\NormalTok{  df }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(bin\_id)) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{count}\NormalTok{(treat, bin\_id, }\AttributeTok{.drop =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{name =} \StringTok{"n"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    tidyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{complete}\NormalTok{(treat, }\AttributeTok{bin\_id =} \FunctionTok{seq\_along}\NormalTok{(bin\_centers), }\AttributeTok{fill =} \FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L)) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(treat) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{n\_total =} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(n, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{density =}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{if\_else}\NormalTok{(n\_total }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, n }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ (n\_total }\SpecialCharTok{*}\NormalTok{ bin\_width), }\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{ungroup}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{ScoreType =}\NormalTok{ score\_type,}
      \AttributeTok{imp =}\NormalTok{ imp\_index,}
      \AttributeTok{bin\_mid =}\NormalTok{ bin\_centers[bin\_id]}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(ScoreType, imp, treat, bin\_mid, density)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{mi\_ps\_hist\_rows }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{vector}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"list"}\NormalTok{, imp}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{m }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{L)}
\NormalTok{row\_idx }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L}
\ControlFlowTok{for}\NormalTok{ (i }\ControlFlowTok{in} \FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(imp}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{m)) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# Aggregate ABG and VBG bin{-}level densities for each imputation.}
\NormalTok{  row\_idx }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ row\_idx }\SpecialCharTok{+} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{  mi\_ps\_hist\_rows[[row\_idx]] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mi\_ps\_hist\_one}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{get\_mi\_ps}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{, i), treat\_abg\_all, }\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{, i)}
\NormalTok{  row\_idx }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ row\_idx }\SpecialCharTok{+} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{  mi\_ps\_hist\_rows[[row\_idx]] }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{mi\_ps\_hist\_one}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{get\_mi\_ps}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{, i), treat\_vbg\_all, }\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{, i)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# Average densities across imputations to avoid overplotting 80+ curves.}
\NormalTok{mi\_ps\_hist }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(mi\_ps\_hist\_rows) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(ScoreType, treat, bin\_mid) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{summarise}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{density =} \FunctionTok{mean}\NormalTok{(density, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{.groups =} \StringTok{"drop"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{ScoreType =} \FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(ScoreType, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{)))}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(mi\_ps\_hist) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0} \SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(mi\_ps\_hist}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{density) }\SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ mi\_ps\_hist}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{density }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# Render side{-}by{-}side ABG/VBG density histograms with shared x{-}range [0,1].}
\NormalTok{  mi\_ps\_hist\_plot }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(mi\_ps\_hist, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ bin\_mid, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ density, }\AttributeTok{fill =}\NormalTok{ treat)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_col}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{position =} \StringTok{"identity"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{width =}\NormalTok{ bin\_width }\SpecialCharTok{*} \FloatTok{0.95}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{facet\_wrap}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{ ScoreType, }\AttributeTok{scales =} \StringTok{"free\_y"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{coord\_cartesian}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{xlim =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{scale\_fill\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"No Test"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"steelblue"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Test"} \OtherTok{=} \StringTok{"tomato"}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{"Propensity{-}score overlap for MI logistic ABG and VBG test{-}ordering models"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{subtitle =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Averaged across "}\NormalTok{, imp}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{m, }\StringTok{" imputations"}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Propensity score"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Density"}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{fill =} \StringTok{"Group"}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{theme\_pub}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{base\_size =} \DecValTok{12}\NormalTok{)}

  \FunctionTok{print\_plot\_once}\NormalTok{(mi\_ps\_hist\_plot, }\StringTok{"propensity{-}histograms{-}mi{-}logistic"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{width =} \FloatTok{8.5}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
  \FunctionTok{warning}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"MI propensity histogram has no positive density values; inspect mi\_logistic\_ps\_* artifacts."}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{call. =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: manuscript Figure S1 covariate balance after the primary MI logistic IPSW analysis.}
\CommentTok{\# Build pooled (median across imputations) raw vs weighted |SMD|}
\CommentTok{\# so MI balance can be read with the same visual grammar as non{-}MI.}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"bal\_imp\_abg"}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"bal\_imp\_vbg"}\NormalTok{))}

\NormalTok{lov\_mi }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(bal\_imp\_abg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{bal\_long, bal\_imp\_vbg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{bal\_long) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{term =} \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(level), variable, }\FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(variable, }\StringTok{":"}\NormalTok{, level)),}
    \AttributeTok{abs\_smd\_raw =} \FunctionTok{abs}\NormalTok{(smd\_pre),}
    \AttributeTok{abs\_smd\_ipw =} \FunctionTok{abs}\NormalTok{(smd\_post)}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(group, term) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{summarise}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{abs\_smd\_raw =} \FunctionTok{median}\NormalTok{(abs\_smd\_raw, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{abs\_smd\_ipw =} \FunctionTok{median}\NormalTok{(abs\_smd\_ipw, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{.groups =} \StringTok{"drop"}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{lov\_mi\_long }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  lov\_mi }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{transmute}\NormalTok{(group, term, }\AttributeTok{sample =} \StringTok{"Raw"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{abs\_smd =}\NormalTok{ abs\_smd\_raw, abs\_smd\_raw),}
\NormalTok{  lov\_mi }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{transmute}\NormalTok{(group, term, }\AttributeTok{sample =} \StringTok{"IPW"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{abs\_smd =}\NormalTok{ abs\_smd\_ipw, abs\_smd\_raw)}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{lov\_mi\_long }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{add\_overall\_love\_rows}\NormalTok{(lov\_mi\_long)}

\CommentTok{\# Export plotting data and then draw the two{-}panel love plot.}
\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(lov\_mi\_long, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"loveplot\_mi\_logistic\_data.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{p\_lov\_mi }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{loveplot\_style}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  lov\_mi\_long,}
  \StringTok{"Covariate balance after MI logistic inverse{-}probability weighting for ABG and VBG test{-}ordering models"}
\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{print\_plot\_once}\NormalTok{(p\_lov\_mi, }\StringTok{"loveplot{-}mi{-}logistic{-}abg{-}vbg"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{width =} \DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{6}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: manuscript Figure S3 SHAP{-}style contribution summaries for the MI logistic IPSW models.}
\CommentTok{\# Read precomputed top{-}10 SHAP values and re{-}plot deterministically.}
\NormalTok{shap\_abg\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"shap\_top10\_mi\_logistic\_abg.csv"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{shap\_vbg\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"shap\_top10\_mi\_logistic\_vbg.csv"}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{shap\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ utils}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{read.csv}\NormalTok{(shap\_abg\_file, }\AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{shap\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ utils}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{read.csv}\NormalTok{(shap\_vbg\_file, }\AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{shap\_abg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{group }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"ABG"}
\NormalTok{shap\_vbg}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{group }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"VBG"}

\NormalTok{shap\_plot\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(shap\_abg, shap\_vbg) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(mean\_abs\_shap)) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(group) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{desc}\NormalTok{(mean\_abs\_shap), }\AttributeTok{.by\_group =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{slice\_head}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{L) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{ungroup}\NormalTok{()}

\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(shap\_plot\_df) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{p\_shap }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{plot\_shap\_top10\_two\_panel}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  shap\_plot\_df,}
  \StringTok{"SHAP{-}style contribution summaries for MI logistic ABG and VBG test{-}ordering models"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Mean |SHAP value|"}
\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{print\_plot\_force}\NormalTok{(p\_shap, }\StringTok{"shap{-}top10{-}mi{-}logistic{-}abg{-}vbg"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{width =} \DecValTok{9}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{)}

                          \AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"imv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"niv\_proc"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"death\_60d"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"hypercap\_resp\_failure"}\NormalTok{),}

\NormalTok{mi\_or\_overlay }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(curve\_all, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ co2, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ OR, }\AttributeTok{color =}\NormalTok{ group, }\AttributeTok{fill =}\NormalTok{ group)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}

  \FunctionTok{or\_axis\_scale}\NormalTok{(axis\_mi\_ipw) }\SpecialCharTok{+}

    \AttributeTok{title =} \FunctionTok{expression}\NormalTok{(}

\NormalTok{    ),}

\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{+}

\subsection{Canonical Key-Results Figures Across Analysis
Tracks}\label{canonical-key-results-figures-across-analysis-tracks}

The following 4×2 figures are the canonical manuscript-facing spline
displays across crude, adjusted, imputed, and weighted analyses.

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: prepare canonical key{-}results figure data across analysis tracks.}

\NormalTok{key\_results\_caption\_crude }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"Odds ratio curves are relative to the test{-}specific reference CO2 values (ABG "}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{  ABG\_CO2\_REF, }\StringTok{" mmHg; VBG "}\NormalTok{, VBG\_CO2\_REF,}
  \StringTok{" mmHg). Predicted probability curves are unadjusted model{-}based probabilities within the tested cohorts."}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{key\_results\_caption\_adjusted }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"Odds ratio curves are relative to the test{-}specific reference CO2 values (ABG "}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{  ABG\_CO2\_REF, }\StringTok{" mmHg; VBG "}\NormalTok{, VBG\_CO2\_REF,}
  \StringTok{" mmHg). Predicted probability curves are conditional on the reference covariate profile X\_ref within each test{-}specific cohort."}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{key\_results\_caption\_imputed }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"Odds ratio curves are relative to the test{-}specific reference CO2 values (ABG "}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{  ABG\_CO2\_REF, }\StringTok{" mmHg; VBG "}\NormalTok{, VBG\_CO2\_REF,}
  \StringTok{" mmHg). Predicted probability curves are conditional on the reference covariate profile X\_ref within each test{-}specific cohort."}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{key\_results\_caption\_main }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"These curves come from the primary MI{-}logistic IPSW analysis. "}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Odds ratio curves are relative to the test{-}specific reference CO2 values (ABG "}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{  ABG\_CO2\_REF, }\StringTok{" mmHg; VBG "}\NormalTok{, VBG\_CO2\_REF,}
  \StringTok{" mmHg). Predicted probability curves are conditional on the reference covariate profile X\_ref within each test{-}specific cohort."}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{key\_results\_caption\_gbm }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"These curves come from the non{-}MI GBM IPSW sensitivity analysis. "}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Odds ratio curves are relative to the test{-}specific reference CO2 values (ABG "}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{  ABG\_CO2\_REF, }\StringTok{" mmHg; VBG "}\NormalTok{, VBG\_CO2\_REF,}
  \StringTok{" mmHg). Predicted probability curves are conditional on the reference covariate profile X\_ref within each test{-}specific cohort."}
\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# helper: test whether one parity{-}audit artifact is present in the expected}
\CommentTok{\# figures or results directory.}
\NormalTok{artifact\_exists }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(name, type) \{}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(name) }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{nzchar}\NormalTok{(name)) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (type }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"figure"}\NormalTok{) \{}
\NormalTok{    fig\_path }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"figs"}\NormalTok{, name)}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"[*?}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{[]"}\NormalTok{, name)) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{Sys.glob}\NormalTok{(fig\_path)) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(fig\_path))}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  \FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(name))}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{parity\_tbl }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{full\_join}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{rename}\NormalTok{(non\_mi\_ipw\_outputs, }\AttributeTok{non\_mi\_artifact =}\NormalTok{ artifact\_name, }\AttributeTok{artifact\_type\_non\_mi =}\NormalTok{ artifact\_type),}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{rename}\NormalTok{(mi\_ipw\_outputs, }\AttributeTok{mi\_artifact =}\NormalTok{ artifact\_name, }\AttributeTok{artifact\_type\_mi =}\NormalTok{ artifact\_type),}
  \AttributeTok{by =} \StringTok{"parity\_key"}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{artifact\_type =}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{coalesce}\NormalTok{(artifact\_type\_non\_mi, artifact\_type\_mi),}
    \AttributeTok{present\_non\_mi =} \FunctionTok{mapply}\NormalTok{(artifact\_exists, non\_mi\_artifact, artifact\_type, }\AttributeTok{USE.NAMES =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{present\_mi =} \FunctionTok{mapply}\NormalTok{(artifact\_exists, mi\_artifact, artifact\_type, }\AttributeTok{USE.NAMES =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{parity\_status =}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{case\_when}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      present\_non\_mi }\SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ present\_mi }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"both"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      present\_non\_mi }\SpecialCharTok{\&} \SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{present\_mi }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"non\_mi\_only"}\NormalTok{,}
      \SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{present\_non\_mi }\SpecialCharTok{\&}\NormalTok{ present\_mi }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"mi\_only"}\NormalTok{,}
      \ConstantTok{TRUE} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"unknown"}
\NormalTok{    ),}
    \AttributeTok{recommended\_action =}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{case\_when}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      parity\_status }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"both"} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"none"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      parity\_status }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"non\_mi\_only"} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"add MI equivalent output"}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{      parity\_status }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"mi\_only"} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"add non{-}MI equivalent output"}\NormalTok{,}
      \ConstantTok{TRUE} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"review manually"}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(artifact\_type, parity\_key) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(parity\_key, artifact\_type, non\_mi\_artifact, mi\_artifact,}
\NormalTok{                present\_non\_mi, present\_mi, parity\_status, recommended\_action)}

\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(parity\_tbl, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ipw\_output\_parity.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{parity\_unknown }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ parity\_tbl }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(parity\_status }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"unknown"}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(parity\_unknown, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ipw\_output\_parity\_unknown.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (RUN\_MODE }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"full"} \SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(parity\_unknown) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Parity audit has unknown rows; see "}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ipw\_output\_parity\_unknown.csv"}\NormalTok{))}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{parity\_one\_sided }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ parity\_tbl }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(parity\_status }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \StringTok{"both"}\NormalTok{)}

\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(parity\_one\_sided, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"ipw\_output\_parity\_diffs.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  parity\_one\_sided,}

\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Purpose: generate Supplementary Tables S1, S4, and S5 from notebook state.}
\NormalTok{table\_s1\_inclusion\_criteria }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{step =} \FunctionTok{seq\_len}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{L),}
  \AttributeTok{criterion =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"Source extract"}\NormalTok{,}

    \StringTok{"Target population"}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Source field / rule}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"TriNetX{-}derived 2022 extract"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"encounter\_type != ambulatory"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"has\_abg == 1"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"has\_vbg == 1"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"ED/inpatient analytic cohort"}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Excluded, n}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{comma}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L,}
\NormalTok{    cohort\_flow\_counts}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{excluded\_ambulatory,}
\NormalTok{    cohort\_flow\_counts}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{analytic\_ed\_inpatient }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ cohort\_flow\_counts}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{abg\_tested,}
\NormalTok{    cohort\_flow\_counts}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{analytic\_ed\_inpatient }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\NormalTok{ cohort\_flow\_counts}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{vbg\_tested,}
    \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{L}
\NormalTok{  )),}
  \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Retained, n}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ scales}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{comma}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    cohort\_flow\_counts}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{total\_extracted,}
\NormalTok{    cohort\_flow\_counts}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{analytic\_ed\_inpatient,}
\NormalTok{    cohort\_flow\_counts}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{abg\_tested,}
\NormalTok{    cohort\_flow\_counts}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{vbg\_tested,}
\NormalTok{    cohort\_flow\_counts}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{analytic\_ed\_inpatient}
\NormalTok{  )),}
  \AttributeTok{notes =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"Initial local source cohort."}\NormalTok{,}

\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{variable =}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{recode}\NormalTok{(.data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{variable, }\SpecialCharTok{!!!}\NormalTok{baseline\_role\_labels, }\AttributeTok{.default =}\NormalTok{ .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{variable),}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Analysis role}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(baseline\_role\_vars, role\_for\_var, }\FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L)),}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{\% missing}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{sprintf}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\%.1f\%\%"}\NormalTok{, .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{pct\_missing),}
    \StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{Imputed in primary MI}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{if\_else}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{coalesce}\NormalTok{(meth[baseline\_role\_vars], }\StringTok{""}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{,}
      \StringTok{"Yes"}\NormalTok{,}

\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}

  \FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"separat"}\NormalTok{, diag\_df\_for\_s5}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{top\_warning, }\AttributeTok{ignore.case =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{table\_s5\_mi\_diagnostic\_summary }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{domain =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}

    \StringTok{"Outcome fit diagnostics"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Outcome fit diagnostics"}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{metric =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"Completed imputations"}\NormalTok{,}

    \StringTok{"Maximum MC error / SE in diagnostic model"}\NormalTok{,}

    \StringTok{"Variables flagged for drift"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Total logged events"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Captured warning rows"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"MI model fits audited"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Fits with nonconvergence flags"}\NormalTok{,}

\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{value =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(imp}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{m),}

    \FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(chain\_diag)),}

    \FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(log\_events\_summary}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{n, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)),}
    \FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(mi\_warn\_log)),}

\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{interpretation =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}

    \StringTok{"Configured MICE iteration count for this render."}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Variables with non{-}empty MICE imputation methods and observed missingness."}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Diagnostic model ratio; lower values indicate less simulation noise relative to model SE."}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Imputed variables with traceable chain{-}mean diagnostics."}\NormalTok{,}

\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{)}

\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: freeze manuscript{-}facing numbering, paths, aliases, and targeted duplicate cleanup.}
\CommentTok{\# helper: delete only the known duplicate spill files for mapped supplement}
\CommentTok{\# artifacts, leaving unrelated historical files untouched.}
\NormalTok{cleanup\_targeted\_supplement\_duplicates }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{() \{}
\NormalTok{  duplicate\_map }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tribble}\NormalTok{(}
    \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{canonical\_file, }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{duplicate\_file,}
    \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"figs"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"propensity{-}histograms{-}conditional.png"}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"figs"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"propensity{-}histograms{-}conditional{-}1.png"}\NormalTok{),}
    \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"figs"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"shap{-}top10{-}ipw{-}gbm{-}abg{-}vbg.png"}\NormalTok{), }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"figs"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"shap{-}top10{-}ipw{-}gbm{-}display{-}1.png"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}

\NormalTok{  duplicate\_map }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{rowwise}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{remove\_ok =} \FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(canonical\_file) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(duplicate\_file)}
\NormalTok{    ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{ungroup}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(remove\_ok) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{pull}\NormalTok{(duplicate\_file) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    (\textbackslash{}(paths) \{}
      \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(paths)) fs}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{file\_delete}\NormalTok{(paths)}
      \FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(paths)}
\NormalTok{    \})()}
\NormalTok{\}}

\FunctionTok{cleanup\_targeted\_supplement\_duplicates}\NormalTok{()}

\CommentTok{\# helper: convert an internal absolute artifact path into the shorter manifest}
\CommentTok{\# path used in CSV audits and drafting.}
\NormalTok{format\_manifest\_path }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(path) \{}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(path) }\SpecialCharTok{||} \FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(path) }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{nzchar}\NormalTok{(path)) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{""}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{pretty\_path}\NormalTok{(path)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: split comma{-}separated extension declarations into a stable vector.}
\NormalTok{split\_expected\_extensions }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) \{}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(x) }\SpecialCharTok{||} \FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(x) }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{nzchar}\NormalTok{(x)) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{))}
  \FunctionTok{trimws}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{strsplit}\NormalTok{(x, }\StringTok{","}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{fixed =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)[[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]]) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    (\textbackslash{}(vals) vals[}\FunctionTok{nzchar}\NormalTok{(vals)])()}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: write markdown reports without prepending the diagnostics log header.}
\NormalTok{write\_markdown\_report }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(lines, path) \{}
  \FunctionTok{writeLines}\NormalTok{(lines, }\AttributeTok{con =}\NormalTok{ path)}
  \FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# helper: collapse repeated strings for compact audit detail columns.}
\NormalTok{collapse\_unique\_text }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(x) \{}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(x))}
\NormalTok{  x }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ x[}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.na}\NormalTok{(x) }\SpecialCharTok{\&} \FunctionTok{nzchar}\NormalTok{(x)]}
  \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(x, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{"; "}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\CommentTok{\# Canonical artifact names stay analysis{-}oriented for code stability, while}
\CommentTok{\# alias artifact names are manuscript{-}facing and numbered/titled for drafting.}
\CommentTok{\# All provenance/check outputs are derived from this one registry so numbering,}
\CommentTok{\# paths, and validation display cannot silently drift apart.}

\CommentTok{\# helper: write the manuscript{-}facing alias file(s) for one registered asset.}
\NormalTok{materialize\_manuscript\_alias }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(kind, canonical\_stub, alias\_stub,}
\NormalTok{                                         canonical\_subdir, alias\_subdir) \{}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (kind }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"figure"}\NormalTok{) \{}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{write\_plot\_alias}\NormalTok{(canonical\_stub, alias\_stub, canonical\_subdir, alias\_subdir))}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (kind }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"table"}\NormalTok{) \{}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{write\_table\_alias}\NormalTok{(canonical\_stub, alias\_stub, canonical\_subdir, alias\_subdir))}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Unsupported artifact kind for manuscript alias: "}\NormalTok{, kind)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{      ) \{}

\NormalTok{      \} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
        \FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{      \}}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  ) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}

\NormalTok{  \}}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(path)) }\FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Missing display artifact for "}\NormalTok{, label, }\StringTok{": "}\NormalTok{, path)}
\NormalTok{  path}

\NormalTok{    ))}

\NormalTok{    )}

\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(wt\_sum, wt\_sum\_file, }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# helper: summarize propensity{-}score overlap numerically for one tested cohort.}
\NormalTok{ps\_stat }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(ps, group) \{}
\NormalTok{  ps\_ok }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ ps[}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(ps)]}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(ps\_ok)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{group =}\NormalTok{ group,}
      \AttributeTok{ps\_min =} \ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{ps\_p01 =} \ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{ps\_p50 =} \ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{ps\_p99 =} \ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{ps\_max =} \ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}\NormalTok{,}
      \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{    ))}
\NormalTok{  \}}
  \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{group =}\NormalTok{ group,}
    \AttributeTok{ps\_min =} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(ps\_ok, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{ps\_p01 =}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{quantile}\NormalTok{(ps\_ok, }\FloatTok{0.01}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{ps\_p50 =}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{median}\NormalTok{(ps\_ok, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{ps\_p99 =}\NormalTok{ stats}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{quantile}\NormalTok{(ps\_ok, }\FloatTok{0.99}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{ps\_max =} \FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(ps\_ok, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{ps\_summary }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{ps\_stat}\NormalTok{(ps\_abg, }\StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{),}
  \FunctionTok{ps\_stat}\NormalTok{(ps\_vbg, }\StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{  ps\_summary,}
  \AttributeTok{caption =} \StringTok{"GBM IPSW propensity{-}score overlap summary (tested cohort)"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{file\_stub =} \StringTok{"ps\_overlap\_summary"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{digits =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{show =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{wt\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{group =} \StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{ps =}\NormalTok{ ps\_abg, }\AttributeTok{weight =}\NormalTok{ wt\_abg),}
\NormalTok{  tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{group =} \StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{ps =}\NormalTok{ ps\_vbg, }\AttributeTok{weight =}\NormalTok{ wt\_vbg)}
\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(weight), }\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(ps))}

\CommentTok{\# helper: draw a simple histogram of stabilized weights for one cohort.}
\NormalTok{plot\_hist }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(df, title) \{}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(df, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ weight)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_histogram}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{bins =} \DecValTok{40}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{fill =} \StringTok{"grey70"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"white"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =}\NormalTok{ title, }\AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Weight"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Count"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{theme\_pub}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{base\_size =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{p\_hist\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{plot\_hist}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(wt\_df, group }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{"ABG weight distribution"}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# helper: visualize the relationship between propensities and resulting weights}
\CommentTok{\# while highlighting the most extreme weights.}
\NormalTok{plot\_scatter }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(df, title) \{}
\NormalTok{  top\_wt }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ df }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{slice\_max}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{order\_by =}\NormalTok{ weight, }\AttributeTok{n =} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{20}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(df)))}
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(df, }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x =}\NormalTok{ ps, }\AttributeTok{y =}\NormalTok{ weight)) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{alpha =} \FloatTok{0.3}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \FloatTok{0.7}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_point}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{data =}\NormalTok{ top\_wt, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"red"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{size =} \FloatTok{1.2}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{scale\_y\_log10}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =}\NormalTok{ title, }\AttributeTok{x =} \StringTok{"Propensity score"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{y =} \StringTok{"Weight (log10)"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{theme\_pub}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{base\_size =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{p\_scatter\_abg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{plot\_scatter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(wt\_df, group }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"ABG"}\NormalTok{),}
                              \StringTok{"ABG weights vs propensity (top 20 highlighted)"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{p\_scatter\_vbg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{plot\_scatter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(wt\_df, group }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"VBG"}\NormalTok{),}
                              \StringTok{"VBG weights vs propensity (top 20 highlighted)"}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{save\_diag\_plot}\NormalTok{(p\_scatter\_abg, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"figs"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"diag{-}wt{-}weights{-}vs{-}ps{-}abg.png"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{width =} \DecValTok{7}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{height =} \DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{)}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(diag\_abg) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(check\_abg)) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{isTRUE}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all.equal}\NormalTok{(check\_abg, diag\_abg, }\AttributeTok{tolerance =} \FloatTok{1e{-}8}\NormalTok{)))}
\NormalTok{\}}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(diag\_vbg) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(check\_vbg)) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{isTRUE}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{all.equal}\NormalTok{(check\_vbg, diag\_vbg, }\AttributeTok{tolerance =} \FloatTok{1e{-}8}\NormalTok{)))}
\NormalTok{\}}

\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{setequal}\NormalTok{(covars\_use\_abg, covars\_use\_vbg))}

\NormalTok{  )}

  \StringTok{"\# Diagnostics Audit"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"\#\# A1. MI workflow"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"{-} Impute {-}\textgreater{} single{-}pass per‑imputation loop (weights, target balance, 3‑level outcomes, spline outcomes) {-}\textgreater{} pool curves and coefficients with Rubin’s rules (chunk: \textasciigrave{}mi{-}single{-}pass\textasciigrave{}; downstream MI display chunks read those objects)."}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"\#\# A2. MI settings"}\NormalTok{,}
  \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"{-} m = "}\NormalTok{, M\_IMP, }\StringTok{", maxit = "}\NormalTok{, MAXIT\_MI, }\StringTok{", seed = "}\NormalTok{, MI\_SEED,}
         \StringTok{"; treatments/outcomes/PaCO2/VBG CO2 are not imputed but are predictors (\textasciigrave{}mi{-}exec\textasciigrave{})."}\NormalTok{),}
  \StringTok{"\#\# A3. Propensity weighting"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"{-} Unimputed weighting uses WeightIt with method = }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{gbm}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{ and balance{-}based stopping (stop.method = }\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{smd.max}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}"}\StringTok{); no AUC{-}based tuning (\textasciigrave{}propensity{-}config\textasciigrave{}, \textasciigrave{}ipw{-}abg{-}weighting\textasciigrave{}, \textasciigrave{}ipw{-}vbg{-}workflow\textasciigrave{})."}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"{-} MI weighting uses logistic PS with restricted cubic splines (glm + rcs); no SHAP is computed for MI."}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"\#\# A4. One{-}sided IPSW + truncation"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"{-} Weights are 1/ps for observed tests (ABG or VBG), truncated only for very small propensities (ps floor = 1st percentile), then stabilized by the mean; controls receive weight 1 for balance diagnostics only."}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"\#\# A5. Robust variance"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"{-} Outcome models are survey::svyglm with svydesign (robust SEs), using spline(CO2) + X adjustment; ABG and VBG are fit separately within the measured cohort."}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"\#\# A6. Pooling"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"{-} mitools::MIcombine pools coefficients and robust vcov from svyglm; spline curves are pooled pointwise on log{-}OR (relative to CO2\_ref) and on eta for predicted{-}probability curves (helpers defined in \textasciigrave{}mi{-}single{-}pass\textasciigrave{})."}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"\#\# Potential mismatches / risks"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"{-} Target balance diagnostics compare weighted treated cohort to the full analytic sample (no treated{-}vs{-}control balance)."}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"{-} MI stability across m uses subsets of the first m imputations from the main mids object (not full re{-}imputation at each m)."}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"{-} Unweighted analyses remain earlier in the notebook for context; primary inference is based on weighted spline models."}
\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{audit\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"diagnostics\_audit.md"}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{write\_diag\_lines}\NormalTok{(audit\_lines, audit\_file)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(PILOT\_FRAC) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&}\NormalTok{ PILOT\_FRAC }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0} \SpecialCharTok{\&\&}\NormalTok{ PILOT\_FRAC }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) \{}

    \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(step\_name }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%}\NormalTok{ scalable\_steps) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{projected\_seconds =}\NormalTok{ seconds }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ PILOT\_FRAC,}
           \AttributeTok{projected\_hours =}\NormalTok{ projected\_seconds }\SpecialCharTok{/} \DecValTok{3600}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  proj\_total }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(proj}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{projected\_hours, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
  \FunctionTok{render\_table\_pdf\_maybe}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    proj }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}} \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(step\_name, seconds, projected\_hours),}
    \AttributeTok{caption =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Runtime projection (scalable steps; pilot\_frac = "}\NormalTok{, PILOT\_FRAC, }\StringTok{")"}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{file\_stub =} \StringTok{"runtime\_projection"}\NormalTok{,}

  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(proj\_total) }\SpecialCharTok{\&\&}\NormalTok{ proj\_total }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{) \{}
    \FunctionTok{warning}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Projected full{-}run time exceeds 10 hours ("}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{round}\NormalTok{(proj\_total, }\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{"h)."}\NormalTok{,}
            \AttributeTok{call. =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{\} }\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{ \{}
  \FunctionTok{message}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Runtime projection skipped because PILOT\_FRAC == 1 (full run)."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

  \AttributeTok{count =}\NormalTok{ get\_imp\_stats}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{count,}
  \AttributeTok{seconds =}\NormalTok{ get\_imp\_stats}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{seconds,}
  \AttributeTok{seconds\_per\_call =} \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (get\_imp\_stats}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{count }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{) get\_imp\_stats}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{seconds }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ get\_imp\_stats}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{count }\ControlFlowTok{else} \ConstantTok{NA\_real\_}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{run\_id =}\NormalTok{ runtime\_run\_id,}

  \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(get\_imp\_df, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"get\_imp\_usage.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}

\end{Shaded}

\section{Analysis of the discordance between predicted probabilities and
OR for NIV and
IMV}\label{analysis-of-the-discordance-between-predicted-probabilities-and-or-for-niv-and-imv}

This section is diagnostic and additive. It does not change the primary
manuscript estimates; instead it reproduces the NIV/IMV probability-OR
discordance and checks whether it is explained by reference profiles,
probability scale, residual capture/missingness, support, setting,
subgroup, or timing structure.

\subsection{Pilot validation and
scope}\label{pilot-validation-and-scope}

\begin{Shaded}

        \StringTok{"Relative odds are closer than absolute risk differences."}\NormalTok{,}

\NormalTok{)}

\DocumentationTok{\#\# Summary of hypotheses and interpretation}
\NormalTok{standardization\_supported }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{is.finite}\NormalTok{(discordance\_standardization\_summary}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{gap\_current\_ref) }\SpecialCharTok{\&}
\NormalTok{    (}
      \FunctionTok{abs}\NormalTok{(discordance\_standardization\_summary}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{gap\_common\_ref) }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}=}
        \FloatTok{0.75} \SpecialCharTok{*} \FunctionTok{abs}\NormalTok{(discordance\_standardization\_summary}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{gap\_current\_ref) }\SpecialCharTok{|}
        \FunctionTok{abs}\NormalTok{(discordance\_standardization\_summary}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{gap\_marginal\_standardized) }\SpecialCharTok{\textless{}=}
          \FloatTok{0.75} \SpecialCharTok{*} \FunctionTok{abs}\NormalTok{(discordance\_standardization\_summary}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{gap\_current\_ref)}
\NormalTok{    ),}
  \AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{scale\_supported }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(}
  \FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"Relative odds are closer"}\NormalTok{, discordance\_scale\_summary}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{comment, }\AttributeTok{fixed =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{capture\_supported }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  missingness\_capture\_summary}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{max\_abs\_abg\_vbg\_difference }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \FloatTok{0.05}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{tail\_supported }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(discordance\_tail\_support\_summary}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{support\_flag }\SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{setting\_supported }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(discordance\_setting\_rate\_ranges}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{rate\_range }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \FloatTok{0.10}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{dual\_inconclusive }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(discordance\_status\_rows) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(.data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{component }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"dual\_tested\_sensitivity"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{pull}\NormalTok{(status) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"skipped"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{timing\_inconclusive }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{any}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(discordance\_status\_rows) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(.data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{component }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"timing\_sensitivity"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{pull}\NormalTok{(status) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"skipped"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{discordance\_interpretation\_summary }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{hypothesis =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"Reference{-}profile / standardization effect"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Scale / noncollapsibility effect"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Differential missingness or procedure capture"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Tail support / positivity"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Setting or workflow heterogeneity"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Dual{-}tested measurement structure"}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Same{-}encounter timing structure"}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{supported =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    standardization\_supported,}
\NormalTok{    scale\_supported,}
\NormalTok{    capture\_supported,}
\NormalTok{    tail\_supported,}
\NormalTok{    setting\_supported,}
    \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{,}
    \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{not\_supported =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{standardization\_supported,}
    \SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{scale\_supported,}
    \SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{capture\_supported,}
    \SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{tail\_supported,}
    \SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{setting\_supported,}
    \SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{dual\_inconclusive,}
    \SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{timing\_inconclusive}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{inconclusive =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{,}
    \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{,}
    \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{,}
    \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{,}
    \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{,}
\NormalTok{    dual\_inconclusive,}
\NormalTok{    timing\_inconclusive}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{key\_evidence =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(standardization\_supported, }\StringTok{"Common or marginal standardization shrank at least one current probability gap by \textgreater{}=25\%."}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Standardization did not shrink probability gaps by \textgreater{}=25\%."}\NormalTok{),}
    \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(scale\_supported, }\StringTok{"At least one contrast had closer ABG{-}VBG agreement on OR scale than risk{-}difference scale."}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"OR{-}scale agreement was not consistently closer than probability{-}scale agreement."}\NormalTok{),}
    \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(capture\_supported, }\StringTok{"Detected missingness/capture summaries show \textgreater{}5 percentage{-}point or SMD{-}scale differences."}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Detected missingness/capture summaries did not show \textgreater{}5{-}point differences."}\NormalTok{),}
    \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(tail\_supported, }\StringTok{"At least one clinical/quantile bin had ESS \textless{}100 or weighted events \textless{}10."}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Tail bins did not trigger the ESS/event{-}count support flag."}\NormalTok{),}
    \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(setting\_supported, }\StringTok{"Within{-}modality weighted event{-}rate range exceeded 10 percentage points for at least one setting variable."}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Within{-}modality setting{-}specific weighted event{-}rate ranges were \textless{}=10 percentage points."}\NormalTok{),}
    \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(dual\_inconclusive, }\StringTok{"Dual{-}tested subset was unavailable in this render subset."}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Dual{-}tested subset event rates were generated for direct review."}\NormalTok{),}
    \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(timing\_inconclusive, }\StringTok{"Timestamp fields were unavailable or ambiguous."}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"Timing fields were available for direct review."}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{recommended\_next\_step =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"If supported, consider whether manuscript probability curves should use common or marginal standardization in a future methodological ticket."}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Use risk differences/RRs beside ORs when communicating procedure outcomes."}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"If supported, audit NIV/IMV source{-}field construction and coding{-}density definitions before changing models."}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"If supported, avoid overinterpreting tail probability gaps and consider trimming/support annotations."}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"If supported, consider setting{-}stratified or setting{-}interaction sensitivity models."}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"Compare dual{-}tested event{-}rate patterns against primary ABG/VBG gaps before attributing discordance to modality."}\NormalTok{,}
    \StringTok{"If timestamps become available, restrict to blood gases clearly preceding NIV/IMV."}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  discordance\_interpretation\_summary,}
  \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"discordance\_interpretation\_summary.csv"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{)}

  \StringTok{"completed"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"Hypothesis{-}level interpretation summary was generated."}\NormalTok{,}

\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{discordance\_artifact\_manifest }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{artifact\_path =}\NormalTok{ discordance\_required\_artifacts,}
  \AttributeTok{required =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{kind =}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{case\_when}\NormalTok{(}
    \FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"\^{}figs/"}\NormalTok{, artifact\_path) }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"figure"}\NormalTok{,}
    \FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"manifest|status"}\NormalTok{, artifact\_path) }\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"validation"}\NormalTok{,}
    \ConstantTok{TRUE} \SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}} \StringTok{"csv"}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{exists =} \FunctionTok{vapply}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    artifact\_path,}
    \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(path) \{}
      \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{identical}\NormalTok{(path, }\StringTok{"discordance\_artifact\_manifest.csv"}\NormalTok{)) }\FunctionTok{return}\NormalTok{(}\ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
      \FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(path))}
\NormalTok{    \},}
    \FunctionTok{logical}\NormalTok{(}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{L)}
\NormalTok{  ),}
  \AttributeTok{purpose =} \StringTok{"NIV/IMV probability{-}OR discordance diagnostic artifact."}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{missing\_discordance\_artifacts }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ discordance\_artifact\_manifest }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(.data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{required, }\SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{.data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{exists) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{pull}\NormalTok{(artifact\_path)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(missing\_discordance\_artifacts)) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"Discordance artifact completeness check failed: "}\NormalTok{,}
    \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(missing\_discordance\_artifacts, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{required\_status\_failures }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ status\_df }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\NormalTok{.data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{optional, .data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{status }\SpecialCharTok{!=} \StringTok{"completed"}\NormalTok{)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(required\_status\_failures)) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"Required discordance component(s) did not complete: "}\NormalTok{,}
    \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(required\_status\_failures}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{component, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{\}}

\FunctionTok{render\_table\_pdf}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  discordance\_interpretation\_summary }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{    dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{supported =} \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(supported, }\StringTok{"yes"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"no"}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{not\_supported =} \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(not\_supported, }\StringTok{"yes"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"no"}\NormalTok{),}
      \AttributeTok{inconclusive =} \FunctionTok{ifelse}\NormalTok{(inconclusive, }\StringTok{"yes"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"no"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{    ),}
  \AttributeTok{caption =} \StringTok{"Summary of plausible explanations for NIV/IMV probability{-}OR discordance"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{file\_stub =} \StringTok{"discordance\_interpretation\_summary\_display"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{wide =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{digits =} \DecValTok{2}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{max\_cols =} \DecValTok{5}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{landscape =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{landscape}

\begin{center}\textbf{Summary of plausible explanations for NIV/IMV probability-OR discordance}\end{center}

\begin{table}[!h]
\centering\begingroup\fontsize{6}{8}\selectfont

\resizebox{\ifdim\width>\linewidth\linewidth\else\width\fi}{!}{
\begin{tabular}{lllll}
\toprule
hypothesis & supported & not\_supported & inconclusive & key\_evidence\\
\midrule
Reference-profile / standardization effect & yes & no & no & Common or marginal standardization shrank at least one current probability gap by >=25\%.\\
Scale / noncollapsibility effect & yes & no & no & At least one contrast had closer ABG-VBG agreement on OR scale than risk-difference scale.\\
Differential missingness or procedure capture & yes & no & no & Detected missingness/capture summaries show >5 percentage-point or SMD-scale differences.\\
Tail support / positivity & no & yes & no & Tail bins did not trigger the ESS/event-count support flag.\\
Setting or workflow heterogeneity & yes & no & no & Within-modality weighted event-rate range exceeded 10 percentage points for at least one setting variable.\\
\addlinespace
Dual-tested measurement structure & no & yes & no & Dual-tested subset event rates were generated for direct review.\\
Same-encounter timing structure & no & no & yes & Timestamp fields were unavailable or ambiguous.\\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}}
\endgroup{}
\end{table}

\begin{table}[!h]
\centering\begingroup\fontsize{6}{8}\selectfont

\resizebox{\ifdim\width>\linewidth\linewidth\else\width\fi}{!}{
\begin{tabular}{l}
\toprule
recommended\_next\_step\\
\midrule
If supported, consider whether manuscript probability curves should use common or marginal standardization in a future methodological ticket.\\
Use risk differences/RRs beside ORs when communicating procedure outcomes.\\
If supported, audit NIV/IMV source-field construction and coding-density definitions before changing models.\\
If supported, avoid overinterpreting tail probability gaps and consider trimming/support annotations.\\
If supported, consider setting-stratified or setting-interaction sensitivity models.\\
\addlinespace
Compare dual-tested event-rate patterns against primary ABG/VBG gaps before attributing discordance to modality.\\
If timestamps become available, restrict to blood gases clearly preceding NIV/IMV.\\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}}
\endgroup{}
\end{table}

\end{landscape}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\FunctionTok{cat}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"Summary of plausible explanations for NIV/IMV probability{-}OR discordance}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"{-} Required discordance diagnostics completed in run mode \textasciigrave{}"}\NormalTok{, RUN\_MODE, }\StringTok{"\textasciigrave{} with \textasciigrave{}pilot\_frac = "}\NormalTok{, PILOT\_FRAC, }\StringTok{"\textasciigrave{}.}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"{-} Optional timing, first{-}encounter, dual{-}tested, and site{-}specific diagnostics may be marked skipped when required fields or rows are unavailable.}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"{-} Detailed artifacts are written under \textasciigrave{}Results/discordance\_*\textasciigrave{} and \textasciigrave{}Results/figs/discordance\_*\textasciigrave{}.}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}n}\StringTok{"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{sep =} \StringTok{""}
\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

Summary of plausible explanations for NIV/IMV probability-OR discordance

\begin{itemize}
\tightlist
\item
  Required discordance diagnostics completed in run mode \texttt{pilot}
  with \texttt{pilot\_frac\ =\ 0.1}.
\item
  Optional timing, first-encounter, dual-tested, and site-specific
  diagnostics may be marked skipped when required fields or rows are
  unavailable.
\item
  Detailed artifacts are written under \texttt{Results/discordance\_*}
  and \texttt{Results/figs/discordance\_*}.
\end{itemize}
