\NormalTok{missing\_files }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ expected\_diag[}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(expected\_diag))]}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(missing\_files) }\SpecialCharTok{==} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{)}

\CommentTok{\# Only a subset of diagnostics tables are guaranteed to be rewritten with the}
\CommentTok{\# current run metadata on every render. Many analysis CSVs are checked here for}
\CommentTok{\# existence, but their contents may be intentionally preserved across reruns or}
\CommentTok{\# written by helpers that do not stamp the current run\_id into the first row.}
\CommentTok{\# Restrict freshness checks to the end{-}of{-}run diagnostics that are explicitly}
\CommentTok{\# regenerated in this session.}
\NormalTok{run\_id\_check\_files }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}
  \StringTok{"runtime\_log.csv"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"runtime\_summary.csv"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"runtime\_summary\_top15.csv"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"warnings\_log.csv"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"mi\_warnings\_log.csv"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"mi\_info\_log.csv"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"diagnostics\_summary.csv"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"diagnostics\_missingness.csv"}\NormalTok{,}
  \StringTok{"diagnostics\_missingness{-}by{-}strata.csv"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"plot\_drop\_log.csv"}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{run\_id\_mismatch }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{character}\NormalTok{()}
\ControlFlowTok{for}\NormalTok{ (f }\ControlFlowTok{in}\NormalTok{ run\_id\_check\_files) \{}
\NormalTok{  path }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(f)}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{.csv$"}\NormalTok{, f)) \{}
\NormalTok{    df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{read.csv}\NormalTok{(path, }\AttributeTok{nrows =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) }\ConstantTok{NULL}\NormalTok{)}
    \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{is.null}\NormalTok{(df))}
    \FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"run\_id"} \SpecialCharTok{\%in\%} \FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(df))}
    \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(df) }\SpecialCharTok{\textgreater{}} \DecValTok{0} \SpecialCharTok{\&\&} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{identical}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{as.character}\NormalTok{(df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{run\_id[}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{]), diag\_run\_id)) \{}
\NormalTok{      run\_id\_mismatch }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(run\_id\_mismatch, f)}
\NormalTok{    \}}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{\}}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(missing\_files) }\SpecialCharTok{||} \FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(run\_id\_mismatch)) \{}
\NormalTok{  msg }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}
    \StringTok{"Diagnostics completeness check failed: missing files ["}\NormalTok{,}
    \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(missing\_files, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{),}
    \StringTok{"]; run\_id mismatch ["}\NormalTok{,}
    \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(run\_id\_mismatch, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{),}
    \StringTok{"]."}
\NormalTok{  )}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(msg)}
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\subsection{Save, export, and session
info}\label{save-export-and-session-info}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: diagnostics audit run.}
\NormalTok{audit\_script }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ here}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{here}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"R"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"diagnostics\_audit.R"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{audit\_md }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"diagnostics\_audit.md"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{audit\_summary }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"diagnostics\_audit\_summary.csv"}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{audit\_issues }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"diagnostics\_audit\_issues.csv"}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{stopifnot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(audit\_script))}
\NormalTok{old\_diag\_results\_dir }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{Sys.getenv}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"DIAG\_RESULTS\_DIR"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{unset =} \StringTok{""}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{on.exit}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{Sys.setenv}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{DIAG\_RESULTS\_DIR =}\NormalTok{ old\_diag\_results\_dir), }\AttributeTok{add =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{Sys.setenv}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{DIAG\_RESULTS\_DIR =}\NormalTok{ results\_dir)}
\NormalTok{audit\_env }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{new.env}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{parent =} \FunctionTok{globalenv}\NormalTok{())}
\NormalTok{audit\_result }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  \{}
    \FunctionTok{sys.source}\NormalTok{(audit\_script, }\AttributeTok{envir =}\NormalTok{ audit\_env)}
    \ConstantTok{TRUE}
\NormalTok{  \},}
  \AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) e}
\NormalTok{)}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{inherits}\NormalTok{(audit\_result, }\StringTok{"error"}\NormalTok{)) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"diagnostics\_audit.R failed: "}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{conditionMessage}\NormalTok{(audit\_result), }\AttributeTok{call. =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{read\_required\_audit\_csv }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(path, required\_cols, label) \{}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(path)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(label, }\StringTok{" missing after diagnostics audit: "}\NormalTok{, path, }\AttributeTok{call. =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{    utils}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{read.csv}\NormalTok{(path, }\AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{),}
    \AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) }\FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(label, }\StringTok{" could not be read: "}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{conditionMessage}\NormalTok{(e), }\AttributeTok{call. =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{  missing\_cols }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{setdiff}\NormalTok{(required\_cols, }\FunctionTok{names}\NormalTok{(df))}
  \ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(missing\_cols)) \{}
    \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{      label, }\StringTok{" missing required columns ["}\NormalTok{,}
      \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(missing\_cols, }\AttributeTok{collapse =} \StringTok{", "}\NormalTok{),}
      \StringTok{"]: "}\NormalTok{, path,}
      \AttributeTok{call. =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  \}}
\NormalTok{  df}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{diagnostics\_audit\_summary\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read\_required\_audit\_csv}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  audit\_summary,}
  \AttributeTok{required\_cols =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"component"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"metric"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"value"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"status"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"severity"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"evidence\_file"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"note"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"run\_id"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"run\_ts"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{label =} \StringTok{"diagnostics\_audit\_summary.csv"}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{diagnostics\_audit\_issues\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read\_required\_audit\_csv}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  audit\_issues,}
  \AttributeTok{required\_cols =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"severity"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"component"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"evidence\_file"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"evidence\_snippet"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"why\_it\_matters"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"recommended\_fix"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"run\_id"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"run\_ts"}\NormalTok{),}
  \AttributeTok{label =} \StringTok{"diagnostics\_audit\_issues.csv"}
\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: stage diagnostics audit outputs for the final validation section.}
\NormalTok{diagnostics\_audit\_issues\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ diagnostics\_audit\_issues\_df }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(severity, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"high"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"medium"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"low"}\NormalTok{)))}

\NormalTok{diagnostics\_audit\_summary\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ diagnostics\_audit\_summary\_df }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(status, }\AttributeTok{levels =} \FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"fail"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"warn"}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{"pass"}\NormalTok{)))}

\FunctionTok{invisible}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{list}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{summary =}\NormalTok{ diagnostics\_audit\_summary\_df,}
  \AttributeTok{issues =}\NormalTok{ diagnostics\_audit\_issues\_df}
\NormalTok{))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: render one canonical validation{-}oriented PDF section: build status,}
\CommentTok{\# provenance, manuscript{-}facing outputs, and compact essential audits.}
\NormalTok{diagnostics\_overall\_status }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ diagnostics\_audit\_summary\_df }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(metric }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"overall\_status"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{slice\_head}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{n =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{pull}\NormalTok{(value)}

\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{ (}\SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{length}\NormalTok{(diagnostics\_overall\_status) }\SpecialCharTok{||} \SpecialCharTok{!}\FunctionTok{nzchar}\NormalTok{(diagnostics\_overall\_status)) \{}
  \FunctionTok{stop}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"diagnostics\_audit\_summary.csv did not provide metric == \textquotesingle{}overall\_status\textquotesingle{}."}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{call. =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}

\NormalTok{build\_status\_components }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  validation\_static\_summary,}
\NormalTok{  tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{component =} \StringTok{"diagnostics\_audit"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{status =}\NormalTok{ diagnostics\_overall\_status,}
    \AttributeTok{detail =} \FunctionTok{paste0}\NormalTok{(}
      \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(diagnostics\_audit\_issues\_df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{severity }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"high"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{" high / "}\NormalTok{,}
      \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(diagnostics\_audit\_issues\_df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{severity }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"medium"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{" medium / "}\NormalTok{,}
      \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(diagnostics\_audit\_issues\_df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{severity }\SpecialCharTok{==} \StringTok{"low"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{), }\StringTok{" low diagnostics issues."}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  )}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{final\_build\_status }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{collapse\_validation\_status}\NormalTok{(build\_status\_components}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{status)}

\NormalTok{validation\_build\_display }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{bind\_rows}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  tibble}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{tibble}\NormalTok{(}
    \AttributeTok{component =} \StringTok{"overall\_build"}\NormalTok{,}
    \AttributeTok{status =}\NormalTok{ final\_build\_status,}
    \AttributeTok{detail =} \StringTok{"Final validation status derived from artifact checks, glyph audit, duplicate audit, and diagnostics audit."}
\NormalTok{  ),}
\NormalTok{  build\_status\_components}
\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{provenance\_summary\_display }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ artifact\_provenance\_manifest }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{count}\NormalTok{(section, kind, status, source\_type, pdf\_display, }\AttributeTok{name =} \StringTok{"n\_assets"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(section, kind, status)}

\NormalTok{artifact\_check\_summary\_display }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ artifact\_check\_status }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{count}\NormalTok{(check\_status, severity, allowed\_missing, }\AttributeTok{name =} \StringTok{"n\_rows"}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{desc}\NormalTok{(n\_rows), check\_status)}

\NormalTok{diagnostics\_audit\_summary\_display }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ diagnostics\_audit\_summary\_df }\SpecialCharTok{|\textgreater{}}
\NormalTok{  dplyr}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(component, metric, status, severity, value, note)}

\FunctionTok{render\_table\_pdf}\NormalTok{(}
\NormalTok{  validation\_build\_display,}
  \AttributeTok{caption =} \StringTok{"Validation build status"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{file\_stub =} \StringTok{"validation\_build\_status"}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{wide =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{digits =} \DecValTok{0}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{max\_cols =} \DecValTok{3}\NormalTok{,}
  \AttributeTok{landscape =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

domain & metric & value & interpretation\\

Imputation run & Completed imputations & 20 & Primary analysis imputation count used in this render.\\
Imputation run & Iterations per imputation & 5 & Configured MICE iteration count for this render.\\
Imputation run & Variables imputed & 16 & Variables with non-empty MICE imputation methods and observed missingness.\\
Monte Carlo error & Maximum MC error / SE in diagnostic model & 0.159 & Diagnostic model ratio; lower values indicate less simulation noise relative to model SE.\\
Chain diagnostics & Variables with available chain diagnostics & 16 & Imputed variables with traceable chain-mean diagnostics.\\
\addlinespace
Chain diagnostics & Variables flagged for drift & 7 & Variables exceeding drift/slope screening thresholds.\\
MICE logged events & Total logged events & 0 & Rows reported by mice::loggedEvents across batches.\\
Captured warnings & Captured warning rows & 0 & Warnings captured by notebook-level diagnostics wrappers.\\
Outcome fit diagnostics & MI model fits audited & 692 & Outcome-model diagnostic rows captured for MI analyses.\\
Outcome fit diagnostics & Fits with nonconvergence flags & 0 & Potential convergence problems requiring review if nonzero.\\
\addlinespace
Outcome fit diagnostics & Fits with separation/extreme-probability flags & 425 & Known separation/extreme-probability screen; interpret affected estimates cautiously.\\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}}

  \FunctionTok{tryCatch}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{capture.output}\NormalTok{(renv}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{status}\NormalTok{()), }\AttributeTok{error =} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(e) }\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"renv::status() failed:"}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{conditionMessage}\NormalTok{(e)))}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Purpose: numbering hygiene scan.}
\NormalTok{qmd\_file }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{resolve\_current\_qmd}\NormalTok{()}
\NormalTok{src\_lines }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{readLines}\NormalTok{(qmd\_file, }\AttributeTok{warn =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{pattern\_manual }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \StringTok{"(\^{}\#+}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s+[0{-}9]+(}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{.[0{-}9]+)*}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s+[0{-}9]+}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{))|(Table}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s+[0{-}9]+:}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s+Table}\SpecialCharTok{\textbackslash{}\textbackslash{}}\StringTok{s+[0{-}9]+)"}
\NormalTok{hits }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{which}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{grepl}\NormalTok{(pattern\_manual, src\_lines))}
\NormalTok{scan\_df }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
  \AttributeTok{line\_no =}\NormalTok{ hits,}
  \AttributeTok{line =}\NormalTok{ src\_lines[hits],}
  \AttributeTok{stringsAsFactors =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}
\NormalTok{)}
\FunctionTok{write\_csv\_safely}\NormalTok{(scan\_df, }\FunctionTok{results\_path}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"numbering\_hygiene\_scan.csv"}\NormalTok{), }\AttributeTok{row\_names =} \ConstantTok{FALSE}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}
